V005-N00526.label: 带脉
V005-N00526.path: 十四经穴名称与定位｜足少阳胆经穴
V005-N00526.definition:
在侧腹部，第11肋骨游离端垂线与脐水平线的交点上。
注1：侧卧举臂，屈上足伸下足，先确认第12 肋游离端，再沿着肋弓缘向前触摸到的浮肋即第11肋骨游离端，直下与脐相平处取之。
注2：章门(LR13)直下，横平脐(中)。

V005-N00526.label: 带脉
V005-N00526.definition: 奇经八脉之一。起于季胁，斜向横行，绕腰腹一周。

V005-N00526.label: 带脉
V005-N00526.path: 腧穴｜十四经穴｜足少阳胆经穴

V005-N00526.label: 带脉
V005-N00526.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00526.definition: 起于季胁，斜向下行到带脉穴、五枢穴、维道穴，横行腰腹，绕身一周。

V005-N00526.label: 带脉
V005-N00526.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜腧穴
V005-N00526.definition: 足少阳胆经穴。在侧腹部，章门下1.8 寸，当第十一肋骨游离端下方垂线与脐水平线的交点上。

V005-N00526.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00526.definition: The Dai meridian is mainly distributed over the waist, subcostal area and abdomen. It encircles the waist like a girdle.

V005-N00526.englishNames: belt vessel; belt vessel(BV); Belt Channel; Belt Vessel

V005-N00526.definition: one of the eight extra meridians which originates from the lower part of hypochondrium and passes around the waist

V005-N00228.definition: 在腰部，第2腰椎棘突下凹陷中，后正中线上。

V005-N00228.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象

V005-N00228.definition: 督脉穴。在腰部，当后正中线上，第2腰椎棘下凹陷中。

V005-N00228.path: 中医基础理论术语｜藏象[基础理论]
V005-N00228.definition: The root of life and origin of qi transformation. It is closely associated with the functions of the kidney.

V005-N00228.definition: (1) the place where qi transformation of the human body originates, serving as the root of life; (2) right kidney; (3) acupuncture point (GV4)

在会阴部，男性在阴囊根部与肛门连线的中点，女性在大阴唇后联合与肛门连线的中点。
GB/T 12346-2021
注：胸膝位或侧卧位，在前后二阴中间。

V005-N00808.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V005-N00808.label: 液脱病
V005-N00808.path: 气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜脱病
V005-N00808.definition: 因外感热病，或突发剧烈呕吐、腹泻等，致使津液急剧耗失，气阴欲脱所致。临床以口渴、唇枯，少尿或无尿,肌肤干瘪，目眶凹陷,四肢冰冷，起立晕厥,甚则嗜睡、意识不清，脉微或细数等为特征的脱病。

V005-N00808.label: 液脱
V005-N00808.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00808.definition: 由于汗、吐、下损伤津液，造成阴液脱失的病理变化。

V005-N00808.label: 液脱
V005-N00808.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜急症
V005-N00808.definition: 津液大量急剧耗失，气阴欲脱，以形体消瘦，□唇焦裂，皮肤枯瘪，眼眶凹陷，关节不利，小便短少，大便干结，舌千无津，脉细弱，血压显著降低等为常见症的脱证。

V005-N00808.label: 液脱病
V005-N00808.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜脱病

V005-N00808.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00808.label: 液脱
V005-N00808.englishNames: liquid depletion; liquid collapse; turbid fluid depletion

V005-N00781.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V005-N00781.label: 气脱病
V005-N00781.path: 气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜脱病
V005-N00781.definition: 因各种原因引起大出血，或剧烈吐泻、疼痛、外邪壅闭等，致使真气急骤外泄所致。临床以骤然昏仆,面色苍白,冷汗淋漓,气短不续，甚或伴见目合、口开，鼻息低微，手撒、肢凉，二便自遗等为特征的脱病。

V005-N00781.label: 气脱
V005-N00781.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00781.definition: 由于邪气太盛，正气骤伤;或长期损耗，正气衰竭;或大汗、大吐、大出血致气随液脱、气随血脱等原因，导致气不内守而外逸脱失的危重病理变化。

V005-N00781.label: 气脱病
V005-N00781.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜脱病

V005-N00781.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00781.label: 气脱
V005-N00781.englishNames: qi desertion; qi collapse; qi prostration; Qi collapse
V005-N00781.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00781.definition: A pathological state in which extreme deficiency of qi causes qi to float on the exterior of the body.

V005-N00781.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00781.label: 气脱
V005-N00781.englishNames: qi prostration; qi collapse; qi desertion

V005-N00781.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00781.label: 气脱
V005-N00781.definition: desertion of qi due to sudden damage to the healthy qi, massive loss of blood, profuse sweating, excessive vomiting and diarrhea, or due to prolonged consumption in a chronic disease

V005-N00795.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V005-N00795.label: 血脱病
V005-N00795.path: 气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜脱病
V005-N00795.definition: 因各种原因导致大量失血，血脉空虚，甚或气血欲脱所致。临床以突发大出血，面色苍白，脉微或孔，肢体冰冷，伴见血压持续下降等为特征的脱病。

V005-N00795.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V005-N00795.label: 血脱
V005-N00795.definition: 突然大量失血，或长期反复出血，血脉空虚，气血欲脱,以出血，面色苍白,头晕目眩，心悸征忡，气微而短,四肢厥冷,渐致神志昏蒙,舌淡白，脉微或，或微细欲绝，血压持续下降，低于90/60mmHg 等为特征的脱病。

V005-N00795.label: 血脱
V005-N00795.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00795.definition: 各种急性大出血，导致的血海空虚，血液脱失的危重病理变化。

V005-N00795.label: 血脱
V005-N00795.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜急症
V005-N00795.definition: 突然大量失血，或长期反复出血，血脉空虚，气血欲脱，以出血，面色苍白，头晕目眩，心悸怔忡，气微而短，四肢厥冷，渐致神志昏蒙，舌淡白，脉微或孔，或微细欲绝，血压显著降低等为常见症的脱证。

V005-N00795.label: 血脱病
V005-N00795.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜脱病

V005-N00795.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00795.label: 血脱

V005-N00795.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00795.label: 亡血
V005-N00795.definition: acute critical deficiency of blood, mostly due to massive hemorrhage, also called blood desertion

V005-N00927.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V005-N00927.label: 精脱病
V005-N00927.path: 气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜脱病
V005-N00927.definition: 因房事过度，纵欲走阳，或久病劳损，肾精亏损，官窍失养所致。临床以同房时忽然昏冒,精关走泄，大汗淋漓，可伴见腰酸，耳聋等为特征的脱病。

V005-N00927.label: 精脱
V005-N00927.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00927.definition: 过劳伤精耗气，导致肾中精气亏损脱失，官窍失养的病理变化。

V005-N00927.label: 精脱病
V005-N00927.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜脱病

V005-N00927.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00927.label: 精脱
V005-N00927.englishNames: essence prostrstion; essence collapse; depletion of essence

V005-N00927.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00927.label: 精脱
V005-N00927.definition: a pathological change characterized by depletion and loss of kidney essence that leads to impaired hearing

V005-N00666.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V005-N00666.label: 痰饮
V005-N00666.path: 气血津液病类术语｜痰饮类病
V005-N00666.definition: 因饮邪留于肠胃所致。临床以形体素肥今瘦,饮食减少,肠鸣、便溏，或伴见心悸,短气,呕吐涎沫等为特征的痰饮病。

V005-N00666.label: 痰饮
V005-N00666.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00666.definition: 痰与饮的合称，脏腑病变过程中渗出并积存于体内的病理产物，可阻碍气血运行而成为继发的致病因素。

V005-N00666.label: 痰饮
V005-N00666.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜痰饮类病

V005-N00666.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V005-N00666.label: 痰饮
V005-N00666.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜伴随产物

V005-N00666.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00666.label: 痰饮
V005-N00666.englishNames: phlegm fluid retention; phlegm-fluid retention; Phlegm-fluid retention
V005-N00666.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V005-N00666.definition: Characterized by obesity with recent weight loss and a decreased appetite, bowel sounds, and loose stools. Associated symptoms may include palpitations, shortness of breath and vomiting of foamy saliva. Often results from fluid retention in the stomach and intestines.

V005-N00666.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00666.label: 痰饮

V005-N00666.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00666.label: 痰饮
V005-N00666.definition: a combination of phlegm and retained fluid as an entity to cause disease, also called phlegm-fluid retention

V005-N00678.label: 禀赋不足
V005-N00678.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00678.definition: 禀赋，即先天体质因素。先天体质虚弱不足，为发病的内在因素，是正气虚损的主要方面。

V005-N00678.label: 禀赋不足
V005-N00678.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜儿科学｜病机
V005-N00678.definition: 先天禀受母体气血不足，出生后体质怯弱。

V005-N00678.definition: A collective term for a congenitally weak constitution and a deficiency of qi and blood. It is a major contributing factor to a deficiency of healthy qi.

V005-N00738.definition: Characterized by uterus slipping out of place, or sometimes protruding down through the vagina. Often results from qi deficiency of the spleen and kidney.

V005-N00961.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V005-N00961.label: 热入血室
V005-N00961.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病｜月经前后诸病
V005-N00961.definition: 因恰逢经期，感受外邪，邪热乘虚侵入血室，与血相搏所致。临床以月经期或经行前后，骤然寒热往来,或高热、烦渴,或头汗出，下腹或胸胁硬满，甚则谵语,或白天神清,夜晚谵妄等为特征的经行外感病。

V005-N00961.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V005-N00961.label: 热入血室
V005-N00961.englishNames: heat invading blood chamber;heat entering uterus
V005-N00961.path: 第6部分：妇科学｜妇科杂病
V005-N00961.definition: 以妇女在经期或月经前后,因感受外邪,邪热乘虚侵入血室,热与血搏,出现寒热如疟,或胸胁、少腹满痛，或谵语，或伴经量异常为主要表现的疾病。

V005-N00961.label: 热入血室
V005-N00961.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00961.definition: 外感病适逢妇人月经来潮，或月经适断，邪热与血互相搏结的病理变化。

V005-N00961.label: 热入血室
V005-N00961.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜妇科疾病
V005-N00961.definition: 以妇女在经期或月经适断，出现寒热如疟，或胸胁、少腹满痛，或谵语，或伴经量异常为主要表现的疾病。

V005-N00961.label: 热入血室
V005-N00961.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜妇科学｜妇科杂病
V005-N00961.definition: 以妇女在经期或月经前后，出现寒热如疟，或胸胁、少腹满痛，或谵语，或伴经量异常为主要表现的疾病。

V005-N00961.label: 热入血室
V005-N00961.englishNames: heat invading blood chamber; heat entering the uterus
V005-N00961.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病｜月经前后诸病

V005-N00961.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00961.label: 热入血室
V005-N00961.definition: the pathogenic heat exploiting deficiency during menstruation or after childbirth to enter the blood chamber and contend with the blood

V005-N00322.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V005-N00322.label: 胎气病
V005-N00322.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜胎孕类病
V005-N00322.definition: 因怀孕而压迫胞脉、胞络,气血运行不畅或逆上所致。临床以妊娠期间面目虚浮，四肢浮肿，可伴见眩晕，头痛、头胀等为特征的胎孕病。

V005-N00322.label: 胎气病
V005-N00322.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜胎孕类病

V005-N00655.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V005-N00655.label: 酒癖
V005-N00655.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病
V005-N00655.definition: 因长期饮酒，脾胃受损，酒毒湿热内蕴，气血不和，酒毒与痰瘀互结于胁下所致。临床以嗜酒无度，皖胁疼痛，胁下痞块，口渴、烦热，日渐消瘦，可伴见面发赤斑,肝掌,蜘蛛痣，黄疸等为特征的脾系病。

V005-N00655.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V005-N00655.label: 酒癖
V005-N00655.definition: 以嗜酒无度,皖胁疼痛，胁下痞块，口渴、烦热，日渐消瘦，可伴见面发赤斑，肝掌,蜘蛛痣，黄疸等为主要表现的疾病。

V005-N00655.label: 酒癖
V005-N00655.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V005-N00655.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00655.label: 酒癖
V005-N00655.englishNames: alcoholophilia; Alcohol-induced masses; alcohol-induced masses; alcohol-induced mass
V005-N00655.pinyinNames: jiu pi; jiu xian; jiǔ pǐ
V005-N00655.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V005-N00655.definition: Characterized by pain and masses in the subcostal region, thirst, restlessness, and gradual weight loss. Red spots on the face, red palms, spider angioma and jaundice may be present. Contributing factors may include retention of alcoholic toxin, phlegm and stasis in the subcostal region due to prolonged alcohol drinking, damp heat accumulating in the spleen and stomach and disharmony between qi and blood.

V005-N00655.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00655.label: 酒癖
V005-N00655.englishNames: liquor addiction; alcohol addiction; alcoholic abdominal mass

V005-N00655.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00655.label: 酒癖
V005-N00655.englishNames: liquor addiction; alcohol addiction; alcoholic abdominal mass
V005-N00655.definition: the state of heavy dependence on alcohol

V005-N00619.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V005-N00619.label: 秋燥病
V005-N00619.path: 外感病类术语｜外感时令类病
V005-N00619.definition: 因燥邪侵袭肺卫,耗伤阴津所致。临床以发热、头痛，咳嗽或干咳，咯痰不爽,咽干鼻燥，口渴等为特征，多发于秋季的外感时病。

V005-N00619.label: 秋燥
V005-N00619.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜热病
V005-N00619.definition: 秋季感受燥邪引起的温病。

V005-N00619.label: 秋燥病
V005-N00619.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜外感时令类病

V005-N00619.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00619.label: 秋燥病
V005-N00619.englishNames: autumn dryness disease; Autumn dryness; autumn-dryness disease
V005-N00619.pinyinNames: qiu zao bing; qiū zào bìng
V005-N00619.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V005-N00619.definition: A condition characterized by fever, headache, dry cough or difficulty in expectoration of sputum, dry nose and throat, and thirst. Often occurs when dryness affects the exterior and consumes yin fluids.

V005-N00619.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00619.label: 秋燥

V005-N01072.label: 治法
V005-N01072.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V005-N01072.definition: 以治疗原则为指导,针对不同病证采用的具体治疗方法与手段。

V005-N01072.label: 治法
V005-N01072.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜妇科学

V005-N01072.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01072.label: 治法
V005-N01072.aliases: 中医治法； Method of Treatment
V005-N01072.englishNames: method of treatment; Treatment methods; Therapeutic Methods

V005-N01072.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01072.label: 治法
V005-N01072.definition: any specific intervention derived from a principle of treatment

V005-N01088.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01088.label: 扶正固本
V005-N01088.englishNames: reinforcing healthy qi and securing the root
V005-N01088.definition: 对于正气亏虚等所致病证，采用培补正气以愈病的治疗原则。

V005-N01088.label: 扶正固本
V005-N01088.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V005-N01088.definition: 对于正气亏虚的病证,采用培补正气以愈病的治疗原则。

V005-N01088.label: 扶正固本
V005-N01088.englishNames: strengthening and consolidating body resistance; reinforcing healthy qi and securing the root

V005-N01088.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01088.label: 扶正固本
V005-N01088.aliases: 扶正培本； Strength Resist Consol Constit
V005-N01088.englishNames: Reinforce healthy qi to strengthen the body; reinforcing healthy qi and securing the root; Strengthening Body Resistance to Consolidate Constitution
V005-N01088.pinyinNames: fú zhèng gù běn; fu zheng gu ben
V005-N01088.definition: A principle to reinforce anti-pathogenic qi to speed up recovery. It is indicated for deficiency of anti-pathogenic qi.

V005-N01088.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01088.label: 扶正
V005-N01088.definition: a general term for treating disease by strengthening the healthy qi of the body

V005-N01098.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01098.label: 调理阴阳
V005-N01098.aliases: 调平阴阳； 调整阴阳
V005-N01098.definition: 泛指利用药物或食物气味性能的偏胜，或情志的属性，或针灸补泻作用等，以纠正阴阳的偏胜偏衰，使之恢复相对协调、平和状态的治疗原则。

V005-N01098.label: 调理阴阳
V005-N01098.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V005-N01098.definition: 又称"调整阴阳”。利用药物或食物的气味性能、情志的属性、针灸补泻的作用等，以纠正人体阴阳的偏胜偏衰，使之恢复相对平衡协调的治疗原则。

V005-N01098.label: 调理阴阳
V005-N01098.aliases: 调平阴阳； 调整阴阳
V005-N01098.englishNames: regulating yin and yang; coordinating yin and yang

V005-N01098.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01098.label: 调理阴阳
V005-N01098.aliases: 调平阴阳； 调整阴阳
V005-N01098.englishNames: Regulate and balance yin and yang; regulating yin and yang
V005-N01098.definition: A principle to restore yin-yang equilibrium through medicines, food, emotions or reinforcing/reducing needling techniques.

V005-N01104.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01104.label: 从阳引阴
V005-N01104.definition: 根据阴阳互根原理，在补阴时适当配用补阳之品，以助阴气生成的方法。

V005-N01104.label: 从阳引阴
V005-N01104.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜调理阴阳

V005-N01104.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01104.label: 从阳引阴
V005-N01104.aliases: 阳中求阴； 病在阳而治其阴
V005-N01104.englishNames: Seeking yin from yang; treating yang for yin disorder; treating yin for yang disorder; seeking yin from yang
V005-N01104.pinyinNames: cóng yáng yǐn yīn; cong yang yin yin
V005-N01104.definition: This is originally a needling method to puncture yang meridians for problems of yin meridians. Later, this method has been developed into a principle based on interdependence between yin and yang: to add some yang-reinforcing medicines to yin-nourishing formulas to assist the generation of yin qi.

V005-N01101.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01101.label: 从阳引阴
V005-N01101.definition: 根据阴阳互根原理，在补阴时适当配用补阳之品，以助阴气生成的方法。

V005-N01101.label: 从阳引阴
V005-N01101.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜调理阴阳

V005-N01101.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01101.label: 从阳引阴
V005-N01101.aliases: 阳中求阴； 病在阳而治其阴
V005-N01101.englishNames: Seeking yin from yang; treating yang for yin disorder; treating yin for yang disorder; seeking yin from yang
V005-N01101.pinyinNames: cóng yáng yǐn yīn; cong yang yin yin
V005-N01101.definition: This is originally a needling method to puncture yang meridians for problems of yin meridians. Later, this method has been developed into a principle based on interdependence between yin and yang: to add some yang-reinforcing medicines to yin-nourishing formulas to assist the generation of yin qi.

V005-N01101.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01101.label: 阳中求阴
V005-N01101.englishNames: Formulas that seek yin within yang
V005-N01101.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V005-N01101.definition: A method to combine a small amount of yang-tonifying medicines for kidney yin deficiency. This method enhances the effect of nourishing yin. The representative formula is Zuo Gui Wan (Left-Restoring Pill).

V005-N01101.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01101.label: 阳中求阴

V005-N01103.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01103.label: 从阴引阳
V005-N01103.definition: 根据阴阳互根原理,在补阳时须适当配用补阴之品,以助阳气生化的方法。

V005-N01103.label: 从阴引阳
V005-N01103.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜调理阴阳

V005-N01103.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01103.label: 从阴引阳
V005-N01103.aliases: 病在阳而治其阴； 阴中求阳
V005-N01103.englishNames: treating yin for yang disorder; treating yang for yin disorder; Seeking yang from yin; seeking yang from yin
V005-N01103.pinyinNames: cong yin yin yang; cóng yīn yǐn yáng
V005-N01103.definition: This is originally a needling method to puncture yin meridians for problems of yang meridians. Later, this method has been developed into a treatment principle based on interdependence between yin and yang: to add some yin-nourishing medicines to yang-reinforcing formulas to assist the transformation of yang qi.

V005-N01102.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01102.label: 从阴引阳
V005-N01102.definition: 根据阴阳互根原理,在补阳时须适当配用补阴之品,以助阳气生化的方法。

V005-N01102.label: 从阴引阳
V005-N01102.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜调理阴阳

V005-N01102.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01102.label: 从阴引阳
V005-N01102.aliases: 病在阳而治其阴； 阴中求阳
V005-N01102.englishNames: treating yin for yang disorder; treating yang for yin disorder; Seeking yang from yin; seeking yang from yin
V005-N01102.pinyinNames: cong yin yin yang; cóng yīn yǐn yáng
V005-N01102.definition: This is originally a needling method to puncture yin meridians for problems of yang meridians. Later, this method has been developed into a treatment principle based on interdependence between yin and yang: to add some yin-nourishing medicines to yang-reinforcing formulas to assist the transformation of yang qi.

V005-N01102.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01102.label: 阴中求阳
V005-N01102.englishNames: Formulas that seek yang within yin
V005-N01102.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V005-N01102.definition: Formulas to combine a small amount of yin-nourishing medicines for kidney yang deficiency. This method enhances the effect of warming yang. The representative formula is You Gui Wan (Right-Restoring Pill).

V005-N01102.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01102.label: 阴中求阳

V005-N01092.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01092.label: 攻补兼施
V005-N01092.englishNames: treating with both elimination and reinforcement
V005-N01092.definition: 泛指对虚实夹杂,或虚实程度相当的病证,采用扶正与祛邪并重,或相机先后或主次处理策略的治疗原则。

V005-N01092.label: 攻补兼施
V005-N01092.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V005-N01092.definition: 对于虚实夹杂，或虚实病情相当的病证，可采用既祛邪又培补，即攻邪与扶正并重的治疗原则。

V005-N01092.label: 攻补兼施
V005-N01092.englishNames: treating with both elimination and reinforcement; reinforcing healthy qi and eliminating pathogenic factor; reinforcement and elimination in combination

V005-N01092.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01092.label: 攻补兼施
V005-N01092.englishNames: treat with both elimination and reinforcement; Reinforce healthy qi and remove pathogenic factors simultaneously; treating with both elimination and reinforcement; simultaneous eliminination and reinforcement; Reinforcement and Elimination
V005-N01092.pinyinNames: gōng bǔ jiān shī; gong bu jian shi
V005-N01092.definition: A principle to reinforce anti-pathogenic qi and, at the same time, remove pathogenic factors. It is indicated for excessive pathogenic factors coupled with deficiency of healthy qi.

V005-N01092.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01092.label: 攻补兼施
V005-N01092.englishNames: reinforcing healthy qi and eliminating pathogenic factor

V005-N01092.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01092.label: 攻补兼施
V005-N01092.englishNames: simultaneous eliminination and reinforcement; treat with both elimination and reinforcement; reinforcement and elimination in combination
V005-N01092.definition: a principle of treatment with eliminating and reinforcing methods used in combination, suitable for patients with a weak constitution suffering from an excess syndrome

V005-N01091.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01091.label: 先攻后补
V005-N01091.englishNames: eliminating pathogenic factors prior to reinforcing healthy qi
V005-N01091.definition: 对虚实夹杂,体弱正虚而又有急待攻下或祛散病邪的病证,采用先攻邪、后培补的治疗策略。

V005-N01091.label: 先攻后补
V005-N01091.englishNames: application of elimination prior to tonification
V005-N01091.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜攻补兼施

V005-N01091.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01091.label: 先攻后补
V005-N01091.englishNames: eliminating pathogenic factors prior to reinforcing healthy qi; Remove pathogenic factors before reinforcing healthy qi; Attacking the Pathogens before Tonifying; reinforcement after elimination
V005-N01091.pinyinNames: xiān gōng hòu bǔ; xian gong hou bu
V005-N01091.definition: A principle to remove the invading pathogenic factors, followed by reinforcing anti-pathogenic qi. It is indicated for deficiency of healthy qi coupled with acute conditions that require immediate removal of pathogenic factors.

V005-N01090.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01090.label: 先补后攻
V005-N01090.englishNames: reinforcing healthy qi prior to eliminating pathogenic factors
V005-N01090.definition: 对虚实夹杂，邪实须攻，或攻下又有正虚体弱、不堪攻击的病证，采用先补虚、后攻邪的治疗策略。

V005-N01090.label: 先补后攻
V005-N01090.englishNames: application of tonification prior to elimination
V005-N01090.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜攻补兼施

V005-N01090.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01090.label: 先补后攻
V005-N01090.englishNames: elimination after reinforcement; reinforcing healthy qi prior to eliminating pathogenic factors; Reinforce healthy qi before removing pathogenic factors; Tonifying before Attacking the Pathogens
V005-N01090.pinyinNames: xiān bǔ hòu gōng; xian bu hou gong
V005-N01090.definition: A principle to reinforce healthy qi, followed by removing the invading pathogenic factors. It is indicated for acute conditions that require immediate removal of pathogneic factors coupled with deficiency of healthy qi.

V005-N01095.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01095.label: 因时制宜
V005-N01095.definition: 在诊断和治疗时,兼顾时令、节气和气候等的不同,选择适宜的方法、药物等进行防治的原则。

V005-N01095.label: 因时制宜
V005-N01095.englishNames: treatment in accordance with seasonal conditions
V005-N01095.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V005-N01095.definition: 考虑到时令气候寒热燥湿的不同而选择适宜的治法、方药的治疗原则。

V005-N01095.label: 因时制宜
V005-N01095.englishNames: treatment in accordance with seasons; treatment in accordance with seasonal conditions

V005-N01095.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01095.label: 因时制宜
V005-N01095.englishNames: Treatment in Accordance with Seasonal Conditions; Treat according to time; treatment in accordance with seasons; treatment in accordance with time
V005-N01095.pinyinNames: yin shi zhi yi; yīn shí zhì yí
V005-N01095.definition: A principle to use an appropriate method and medicine according to seasonal climate changes.

V005-N01081.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01081.label: 塞因塞用
V005-N01081.definition: 用补益或固涩的方药或相关疗法，治疗因正虚所致闭塞不通病证的方法。

V005-N01081.label: 塞因塞用
V005-N01081.englishNames: treating obstructive syndrome with tonifying methods
V005-N01081.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V005-N01081.definition: 针对正气虚损所致闭塞不通病证应采用补益、固涩方药进行治疗的原则。

V005-N01081.label: 塞因塞用
V005-N01081.englishNames: treating the stopped by stopping; treating obstructive syndrome with tonifying methods
V005-N01081.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜反治法

V005-N01081.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01081.label: 塞因塞用

V005-N01081.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01081.label: 塞因塞用
V005-N01081.englishNames: treating the stopped by stopping; treating obstructive syndrome with tonics
V005-N01081.definition: applying stopping method to stopped conditions , e.g., using tonification to treat constipation due to qi deficien

V005-N01079.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01079.label: 寒因寒用
V005-N01079.definition: 采用寒凉方药或相关疗法治疗真热假寒证的方法。

V005-N01079.label: 寒因寒用
V005-N01079.englishNames: treating falsecold syndrome with cold methods
V005-N01079.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V005-N01079.definition: 针对真热假寒证应采用寒凉方药进行治疗的原则。

V005-N01079.label: 寒因寒用
V005-N01079.englishNames: treating falsecold syndrome with cold methods; treating cold with cold
V005-N01079.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜反治法

V005-N01079.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01079.label: 寒因寒用
V005-N01079.englishNames: treating cold with cold; Treat false cold with cold; treating coldness with coldness; Cold Drugs Treating Pseudocold
V005-N01079.pinyinNames: hán yīn hán yòng; han yin han yong
V005-N01079.definition: A principle to treat false cold (true heat) symptoms with medicines cool or cold in nature.

V005-N01079.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01079.label: 寒因寒用

V005-N01079.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准

V005-N01079.englishNames: treating coldness with coldness; treating cold with cold; treating falsecold syndrome with cold methods
V005-N01079.definition: treating pseudo-cold symptoms with medicines cool or cold in nature

V005-N01082.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01082.label: 通因通用
V005-N01082.definition: 用通利的方药或相关疗法，治疗因邪实所致呕吐、泻痫、崩漏等病证的方法。

V005-N01082.label: 通因通用
V005-N01082.englishNames: treating incontinent syndrome with dredging methods
V005-N01082.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V005-N01082.definition: 针对因邪实所致呕泻崩漏等病证应采用通利的方药进行治疗的原则。

V005-N01082.label: 通因通用
V005-N01082.englishNames: treating incontinent syndrome with dredging methods; treating the unstopped by unstopping
V005-N01082.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜反治法

V005-N01082.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01082.label: 通因通用
V005-N01082.englishNames: Purgatives Treating Diarrhea; Treat uncontrolled discharge by unblocking; treating incontinent syndrome with dredging method; treating uncontrolled discharge with purgation; treating the unstopped by unstopping; treating diarrhea with purgatives
V005-N01082.pinyinNames: tong yin tong yong; tōng yīn tōng yòng
V005-N01082.definition: A principle to treat food stagnation-related vomiting and diarrhoea or uterine bleeding due to blood stasis with purgative or stasis-unblocking medicines or formulas.

V005-N01082.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01082.label: 通因通用
V005-N01082.englishNames: treating incontinent syndrome with dredging method

V005-N01082.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01082.label: 通因通用
V005-N01082.englishNames: treating the unstopped by unstopping; treating incontinent syndrome with dredging method
V005-N01082.definition: applying unstopping method to unstopped conditions , e.g., using purgation to treat diarrhea caused by food stagnation

V005-N01080.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01080.label: 热因热用
V005-N01080.definition: 采用温热方药或相关疗法治疗真寒假热证的方法。

V005-N01080.label: 热因热用
V005-N01080.englishNames: treating heat with heat; treating falseheat syndrome with heat methods
V005-N01080.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜反治法

V005-N01080.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01080.label: 热因热用
V005-N01080.englishNames: treating heat with heat; treating hotness with hotness; Hot Drugs Treating Pseudoheat; Treat false heat with heat
V005-N01080.pinyinNames: re yin re yong; rè yīn rè yòng
V005-N01080.definition: A principle to treat false heat (true cold) symptoms with medicines warm or hot in nature.

V005-N01080.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01080.label: 热因热用

V005-N01080.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01080.label: 热因热用
V005-N01080.englishNames: treating hotness with hotness; treating heat with heat; treating falseheat syndrome with heat methods
V005-N01080.definition: treating pseudo-heat symptoms with medicines warm or hot in nature

V005-N01086.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01086.label: 标本兼治
V005-N01086.englishNames: treating both the tip and root
V005-N01086.definition: 在病症出现标本并重的情况下，采用治标与治本相兼或同时并用的治疗原则。

V005-N01086.label: 标本兼治
V005-N01086.englishNames: treating both manifestation and root cause of disease; treating both the tip and root

V005-N01086.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01086.label: 标本兼治
V005-N01086.aliases: 标本同治； Treat Both Symptom and Radical
V005-N01086.englishNames: treating both the tip and root; Treat both the tip and root; Treating Both Symptoms and Radical
V005-N01086.pinyinNames: biāo běn jiān zhì; biao ben jian zhi
V005-N01086.definition: A principle to address both symptoms and root cause simultaneously when needed.

V005-N01087.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01087.label: 扶正祛邪
V005-N01087.englishNames: reinforcing healthy qi and eliminating pathogenic factors
V005-N01087.definition: 对于正气虚弱而病邪不能外达，或因虚致实等病证，采用扶助正气为主，辅之以祛邪的方法，以促使正胜邪退的治疗原则。

V005-N01087.label: 扶正祛邪
V005-N01087.englishNames: reinforcing the healthy qi to eliminate the pathogenic factors
V005-N01087.definition: 扶助正气、驱除病邪，使疾病趋向良性转归的针灸治疗原则。

V005-N01087.label: 扶正祛邪
V005-N01087.englishNames: strengthening vital qi to eliminate pathogenic factor
V005-N01087.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V005-N01087.definition: 对于正虚为主、因虚致实的病证，应采取扶助正气为主，使正气加强，从而达到驱除病邪目的的治疗原则。

V005-N01087.label: 扶正祛邪
V005-N01087.englishNames: strengthening vital qi to eliminate pathogenic factor; reinforcing healthy qi and eliminating pathogenic factors

V005-N01087.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01087.label: 扶正祛邪
V005-N01087.aliases: 扶正达邪； Strength Resist Elimin Pathog
V005-N01087.englishNames: strengthening healthy qi and eliminating pathogen; Strengthening Body Resistance to Eliminate Pathogenic Factors; reinforcing the healthy qi to eliminate the pathogenic factors; Reinforce healthy qi to eliminate pathogenic factors; reinforcing healthy qi and eliminating pathogenic factors; reinforce the healthy qi and eliminate the pathogenic factors
V005-N01087.pinyinNames: fu zheng qu xie; fu zheng 祛xie; fú zhèng qū xié
V005-N01087.definition: A principle to reinforce anti-pathogenic qi to drive out the invading pathogenic factors. It is indicated for deficiency of anti-pathogenic qi coupled with exposure to pathogenic factors.

V005-N01087.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01087.label: 扶正祛邪
V005-N01087.englishNames: strengthening healthy qi and eliminating pathogen; reinforce the healthy qi and eliminate the pathogenic factors; strengthening vital qi to eliminate pathogenic factor
V005-N01087.definition: two general principles of treatment — to reinforce the patient’s healthy qi and to eliminating the invading pathogenic factors, which can be applied separately or in combination according to the particular condition of the case

V005-N01096.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01096.label: 因地制宜
V005-N01096.englishNames: treatment in accordance with geographic features
V005-N01096.definition: 在诊断和治疗时,兼顾地域、自然环境及生活习俗等的不同,选择适宜的方法、药物等进行防治的原则。

V005-N01096.label: 因地制宜
V005-N01096.englishNames: treatment in accordance with local conditions
V005-N01096.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V005-N01096.definition: 考虑到地域环境的不同而选择适宜的治法、方药的治疗原则。

V005-N01096.label: 因地制宜
V005-N01096.englishNames: treatment in accordance with local conditions

V005-N01096.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01096.label: 因地制宜
V005-N01096.englishNames: Treatment in Accordance with Local Conditions; Treat according to place; treatment in accordance with geographic features; treatment in accordance with place
V005-N01096.pinyinNames: yin di zhi yi; yīn dì zhì yí
V005-N01096.definition: A principle to use an appropriate method and medicine according to geographic features.

V005-N01109.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01109.label: 实者泻其子
V005-N01109.englishNames: purging the child-organ for excess syndrome/patterns
V005-N01109.definition: 根据五行学说的母子相生关系，间接清泻脏腑实邪的治疗方法。

V005-N01109.label: 实者泻其子
V005-N01109.englishNames: purgingchild viscera for treating excess of mother viscera
V005-N01109.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V005-N01109.definition: 又称"实则泻其子”。根据五行相生和五脏母子关系的理论，对于五脏实证应采用攻泻“我生"之脏的方药进行治疗的原则。

V005-N01109.label: 实者泻其子
V005-N01109.englishNames: purging child viscera for treating excess of mother viscera; purging the child-organ in dealing with excess syndrome/patterns

V005-N01109.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01109.label: 实者泻其子
V005-N01109.englishNames: reducing chuild-element in excess condition; Reduce the son (element) for excess pattern; purging the child-organ for excess syndrome/patterns
V005-N01109.definition: A principle to treat excess of zang–fu organs based on the five-element theory. For example, since (heart) fire promotes (spleen earth), hyperactivity of heart fire can be treated by reducing the spleen and stomach.

V005-N01074.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01074.label: 寒者热之
V005-N01074.definition: 对于寒性病证，使用温热的方药或相关疗法进行治疗的原则。

V005-N01074.label: 寒者热之

V005-N01074.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V005-N01074.definition: 针对寒性的病证应使用温热方药进行治疗的原则。

V005-N01074.label: 寒者热之
V005-N01074.englishNames: treating cold with heat; treating cold syndrome with heat methods
V005-N01074.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜正治法

V005-N01074.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01074.label: 寒者热之
V005-N01074.englishNames: treat cold with heat; Treat cold with heat; treating cold with heat; treating coldness with heat
V005-N01074.definition: A principle to treat cold conditions with medicines or formulas that are warm or hot in nature.

V005-N01074.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V005-N01074.definition: treat cold conditions with warming or heating method

V005-N01076.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01076.label: 虚则补之
V005-N01076.definition: 对于虚弱病证，使用补益的方药或相关疗法进行治疗的方法。

V005-N01076.label: 虚则补之
V005-N01076.definition: 正气虚弱、体质较差者，针刺可用补的方法治疗。

V005-N01076.label: 虚者补之
V005-N01076.englishNames: treating deficiency syndrome with tonifying methods
V005-N01076.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V005-N01076.definition: 又称“虚则补之”。针对虚弱性的病证采用补益方药进行治疗的原则。

V005-N01076.label: 虚则补之
V005-N01076.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜正治法

V005-N01076.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01076.label: 虚则补之
V005-N01076.englishNames: treat deficiency by tonification; Treat deficiency with reinforcement; Treating Deficiency by Tonifying; treating deficiency with reinforcement; treating deficiency with tonification
V005-N01076.pinyinNames: xū zé bǔ zhī; xu ze bu zhi
V005-N01076.definition: A principle to treat deficiency conditions with tonic medicines or formulas.

V005-N01076.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01076.label: 虚者补之

V005-N01076.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01076.label: 虚则补之
V005-N01076.definition: treat deficiency conditions by supplementation or tonification

V005-N01075.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01075.label: 热者寒之
V005-N01075.definition: 对于热性病证，使用寒凉的方药或相关疗法进行治疗的方法。

V005-N01075.label: 热者寒之
V005-N01075.englishNames: treating heat syndrome with cold methods
V005-N01075.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V005-N01075.definition: 针对热性的病证应使用寒凉方药进行治疗的原则。

V005-N01075.label: 热者寒之
V005-N01075.englishNames: treating heat syndrome with cold methods; treating heat with cold
V005-N01075.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜正治法

V005-N01075.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01075.label: 热者寒之
V005-N01075.englishNames: treating hotness with coldness; treat heat with cold; Treat heat with cold; treating heat with cold
V005-N01075.definition: A principle to treat heat conditions with medicines or formulas that are cool or cold in nature.

V005-N01075.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01075.label: 热者寒之

V005-N01075.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01075.label: 热者寒之
V005-N01075.definition: treat heat conditions with cold or cooling method

V005-N01084.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01084.label: 急则治标
V005-N01084.englishNames: treating the tip in acute phases
V005-N01084.definition: 与缓则治本相对。在大出血或暴泻、剧痛、尿闭等标病、标症紧急情况下,及时采用止血或止泻、止痛、利尿等救治标病、标症的方法，然后再治其本病的治疗原则。

V005-N01084.label: 急则治标
V005-N01084.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V005-N01084.definition: 与缓则治本相对而言，在大出血、暴泻、剧痛等标症甚急的情况下，及时救治标病，如止血、止泻、止痛等，然后治其本病的治疗原则。

V005-N01084.label: 急则治标
V005-N01084.englishNames: symptomatic treatment in acute condition; treating the tip in acute disease

V005-N01084.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01084.label: 急则治标
V005-N01084.englishNames: treating symptom for urgency; Treat the tip first in acute conditions; treating the tip in acute phases; ji ze zhi biao
V005-N01084.pinyinNames: jí zé zhì biāo; Symptomatic Treatment in Acute Condition
V005-N01084.definition: A principle to address symptoms in acute conditions, for example, it is important to stop bleeding for heavy blood loss, to arrest diarrhoea for fulminant diarrhoea, alleviate pain for severe, intense pain and promote urination for urine retention.

V005-N01108.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01108.label: 虚者补其母
V005-N01108.englishNames: nourishing the mother-organ in dealing for deficiency syndrome/patterns
V005-N01108.definition: 根据五行学说的母子相生关系，间接调补脏腑虚损的治疗方法。

V005-N01108.label: 虚则补其母
V005-N01108.definition: 虚证，补其所属的母经或母穴的方法。

V005-N01108.label: 虚者补其母
V005-N01108.englishNames: reinforcing mother viscera for treating deficiency of child viscera
V005-N01108.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V005-N01108.definition: 又称"虚则补其母”。根据五行相生和五脏母子关系的理论，对于五脏虚证应采用补益“生我"之脏的方药进行治疗的原则。

V005-N01108.label: 虚者补其母
V005-N01108.englishNames: nourishing the mother-organ in dealing with deficiency syndrome/patterns; reinforcing mother viscera for treating deficiency of child viscera

V005-N01108.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01108.label: 虚者补其母
V005-N01108.englishNames: Reinforce the mother (element) for deficiency pattern; reinforcing mother-element in deficiency condition; nourishing the mother-organ in dealing for deficiency syndrome/patterns
V005-N01108.definition: A principle to treat deficiency of zang–fu organs based on the five-element theory. For example, since (spleen) earth promotes (lung) metal, lung deficiency can be treated by reinforcing the spleen and stomach.

V005-N01059.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01059.label: 未病先防
V005-N01059.definition: 泛指在尚未患病,或在发病之前，从增强人体正气和防止病邪侵害两方面入手来防治疾病的治疗原则。

V005-N01059.label: 未病先防
V005-N01059.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜治未病法

V005-N01059.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01059.label: 未病先防
V005-N01059.englishNames: Preventing a disease before it arises
V005-N01059.path: 中医基础理论术语｜养生预防类
V005-N01059.definition: A method to strengthen the healthy qi and eliminate potential harmful factors to prevent the occurrence of a disease.

V005-N01059.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01059.label: 未病先防

V005-N01063.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01063.label: 已病防变
V005-N01063.definition: 泛指根据疾病发生、发展规律及其传变途径等,在其发作或加重之前，采取各种方法避免、阻止病情加重或传变的治疗原则。

V005-N01063.label: 已病防变
V005-N01063.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜治未病法

V005-N01063.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01063.label: 既病防变
V005-N01063.englishNames: Preventing transmission of a disease after its onset
V005-N01063.path: 中医基础理论术语｜养生预防类
V005-N01063.definition: A method to use early diagnosis and early intervention to prevent disease progression and transmission.

V005-N01063.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01063.label: 既病防变

V005-N01066.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01066.label: 瘥后防复
V005-N01066.definition: 泛指在疾病基本康复，或疾病尚未发作的稳定期、间歇期，为防止余邪复作，或劳累、饮食不当等因素而导致疾病复发，采取各种方法扶助正气、强身健体，以促进康复的治疗原则。

V005-N01066.label: 瘥后防复
V005-N01066.pinyinNames: chai hou fang fu; 瘥hou fang fu
V005-N01066.path: 治法｜治则类术语｜治未病法

V005-N01097.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01097.label: 因人制宜
V005-N01097.englishNames: treatment in accordance with individualized conditions
V005-N01097.definition: 在诊断和治疗时,兼顾病人性别、年龄、秉质、性情等个体差异,选择适宜的方法、药物等进行防治的原则。

V005-N01097.label: 因人制宜
V005-N01097.englishNames: treatment in accordance with patient's individuality
V005-N01097.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V005-N01097.definition: 考虑到病人的体质、性别、年龄、生活习惯以及过去病史等个体差异性而选择适宜的治法、方药的治疗原则。

V005-N01097.label: 因人制宜
V005-N01097.englishNames: treatment in accordance with patient's individuality; treatment in accordance with individuality

V005-N01097.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01097.label: 因人制宜
V005-N01097.englishNames: Treatment in Accordance with Patient's Individuality; treatment in accordance with individual; treatment in accordance with individualized conditions; Treat according to person
V005-N01097.pinyinNames: yin ren zhi yi; yīn rén zhì yí
V005-N01097.definition: A principle to use an appropriate method and medicine according to individual gender, age and constitution.

V005-N01085.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01085.label: 缓则治本
V005-N01085.englishNames: treating the root in remissive phases
V005-N01085.definition: 与急则治标相对。在病势相对缓和，或病情稳定的情况下,先治疗其本病，或采取以调理、补益等为主的治疗原则。

V005-N01085.label: 缓则治本
V005-N01085.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V005-N01085.definition: 与急则治标相对而言，在病势缓和、病情缓慢的情况下，针对本病的病机治疗或采取调理、补益为主的治疗原则。

V005-N01085.label: 缓则治本
V005-N01085.englishNames: radical treatment in chronic case; treating the root in chronic disease

V005-N01085.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01085.label: 缓则治本
V005-N01085.englishNames: treating the root in remissive phases; Treat the root in remissive stages; treating root cause for non-urgency; Radical Treatment in Chronic Case
V005-N01085.pinyinNames: huǎn zé zhì běn; huan ze zhi ben
V005-N01085.definition: A principle to regulate and reinforce the body to address the root cause when medical conditions become stable.

V005-N01105.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01105.label: 调和气血
V005-N01105.aliases: 理气和血； 调理气血
V005-N01105.englishNames: regulating and harmonizing qi and blood
V005-N01105.definition: 运用具有健脾理气、养血活血等作用的方药或相关疗法，以治疗气血失调、气血两虚等所致病证的治法。

V005-N01105.label: 调和气血
V005-N01105.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜内治法
V005-N01105.definition: 用具有理气和血作用的方药治疗气血不和病证的治法。

V005-N01105.label: 调和气血
V005-N01105.aliases: 调理气血； 理气和血； Harmonizing Qi Blood
V005-N01105.englishNames: harmonizing qi and blood; regulating and harmonizing qi and blood; Harmonizing Qi and Blood; harmonize qi and blood
V005-N01105.pinyinNames: diao he qi xue; tiao he  qi  xue
V005-N01105.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜和解法

V005-N01105.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01105.label: 调和气血
V005-N01105.aliases: 调理气血； 理气和血； Regulate qi and harmonize blood； Harmonizing Qi Blood
V005-N01105.englishNames: harmonizing qi and blood; regulating and harmonizing qi and blood; Regulate and harmonize qi and blood; Harmonizing Qi and Blood; harmonize qi and blood
V005-N01105.pinyinNames: diao he qi xue; tiáo hé qì xuè; tiao he  qi  xue
V005-N01105.definition: A treatment method to use qi-regulating and blood-circulating formulas. It is indicated for conditions due to disharmony between qi and blood.

V005-N01105.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01105.label: 调和气血

V005-N01105.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01105.label: 调和气血
V005-N01105.definition: a therapeutic method of using qi-regulating and blood-activating medicinals to treat disharmony of qi and blood

V005-N00155.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N00155.label: 金水相生
V005-N00155.englishNames: mutual promotion between metal and water
V005-N00155.definition: 运用具有补肺、滋肾等作用的方药或相关疗法，促使金水相互资生、充盛，以治疗肺肾两虚或肺阴虚、肾阴虚等所致病证的治法。

V005-N00155.label: 肺肾相生
V005-N00155.englishNames: mutually promotion of lung and kidney
V005-N00155.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V005-N00155.definition: 肺肾之间存在相互资生的关系,肺属金，肾属水，金能生水，肺阴下达于肾可滋养肾阴；肾阴为一身阴液之根本，故肾阴亦可上济于肺以滋养肺阴。

V005-N00155.label: 金水相生
V005-N00155.englishNames: mutual promotion between metal and water
V005-N00155.path: 治法｜治法类术语｜其他治法

V005-N00155.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00155.label: 金水相生
V005-N00155.englishNames: mutual promotion between metal and water; Mutual generation between metal and water
V005-N00155.pinyinNames: jin shui xiang sheng; jīn shuǐ xiāng shēng
V005-N00155.definition: A treatment method to tonify the kidney and nourish the lung for lung deficiency and kidney deficiency, since the lung (metal) and kidney (water) mutually support physiologically and mutually affect pathologically.

V005-N00155.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00155.label: 金水相生
V005-N00155.englishNames: mutual generation between metal and water

V005-N00155.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00155.label: 肺肾相生
V005-N00155.englishNames: mutual promotion between lung and kidney

V005-N00015.label: 证候
V005-N00015.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V005-N00015.definition: 证的外候,即疾病过程中一定阶段的病位、病因、病性、病势及机体抗病能力的强弱等本质有机联系的反应状态，表现为临床可被观察到的症状等。

V005-N00015.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00015.label: 证候

V005-N00015.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00015.label: 证
V005-N00015.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜诊断基本概念与原则类
V005-N00015.definition: A pathological summarization on the disease location, etiological factors, nature, severity and prognosis in a certain stage.

V005-N00015.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00015.label: 证候

V005-N00914.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V005-N00914.label: 肝阳挟痰上扰证
V005-N00914.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver yang with phlegm disturbing the upper
V005-N00914.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝实证｜肝阳实证
V005-N00914.definition: 因肝阳亢盛，血随气逆，挟痰上扰清窍所致。临床以舌强、言謇，甚或失语，口眼喎斜，半身不遂，舌质暗或紫滞，舌苔白腻，脉弦滑，伴见头痛、眩晕，面赤，耳鸣，肢体麻木等为特征的证候。

V005-N00914.label: 肝阳上亢
V005-N00914.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00914.definition: 肝肾阴虚,阴不制阳,肝阳亢逆于上,导致上实下虚的病理变化。

V005-N00914.label: 肝阳挟痰上扰证
V005-N00914.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver yang with phlegm disturbing the upper
V005-N00914.pinyinNames: gan yang xie tan shang rao zheng
V005-N00914.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝实证｜肝阳实证

V005-N00914.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00914.label: 肝阳上亢
V005-N00914.englishNames: hyperactivity of liver yang; ascendant hyperactivity of liver yang; upper hyperactivity of liver yang

V005-N00914.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00914.label: 肝阳上亢

V005-N00782.label: 气闭
V005-N00782.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00782.definition: 由情志抑郁,或外邪、痰浊等阻碍气机,使气机闭阻不通的病理变化。

V005-N00782.label: 气闭
V005-N00782.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜耳鼻喉科学｜病因病机
V005-N00782.definition: 气郁气逆而致听力下降的病理变化。 qing qiao bu li

V005-N00782.label: 闭证
V005-N00782.aliases: 气闭； 中风闭证； blockage syndrome
V005-N00782.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of obstruction; Excess Syndrome of Stroke

V005-N00782.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00782.label: 气闭
V005-N00782.englishNames: qi blockage; Qi blockage; qi block
V005-N00782.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00782.definition: A pathological state in which qi is obstructed inside.

V005-N00782.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00782.label: 闭证
V005-N00782.aliases: 气闭； 中风闭证； blockage syndrome
V005-N00782.englishNames: Blockage pattern; syndrome/pattern of obstruction; Excess Syndrome of Stroke
V005-N00782.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V005-N00782.definition: Characterized by trismus, closed hands, unconsciousness, fever or cold limbs. This pattern often results from wind stroke or heat entering the Ying nutrients and blood phases.

V005-N00782.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00782.label: 气闭

V005-N00782.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00782.label: 气闭
V005-N00782.definition: a pathological change marked by obstruction of the normal movement of qi

V005-N00996.label: 气分证
V005-N00996.aliases: 气分热盛； 热炽气分
V005-N00996.englishNames: Qi phase patterns; syndrome/pattern of qi phase; qi aspect pattern/ syndrome; Qifen Syndrome
V005-N00996.path: 证候｜卫气营血证候类术语｜气分证类

V005-N00996.label: 气分证
V005-N00996.aliases: 气分热盛； 热炽气分
V005-N00996.englishNames: Qi phase patterns; syndrome/pattern of qi phase; qi aspect pattern/ syndrome; Qifen Syndrome
V005-N00996.path: 传统医学证候｜卫气营血证

V005-N00996.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00996.label: 气分证
V005-N00996.aliases: 气分热盛证； 气分热盛； 热炽气分
V005-N00996.englishNames: Qi phase pattern; Qi phase patterns; syndrome/pattern of qi phase; qi aspect pattern/ syndrome; Qifen Syndrome
V005-N00996.pinyinNames: qì fèn zhèng; qi fen zheng
V005-N00996.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V005-N00996.definition: Characterized by fever without aversion to cold. The tongue coating turns yellow. This pattern often occurs when pathogenic warm transforms into heat.

V005-N00996.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00996.label: 气分证
V005-N00996.aliases: 气分热盛； 热炽气分
V005-N00996.englishNames: qi aspect pattern/ syndrome; Qifen Syndrome
V005-N00996.path: 诊断学｜卫气营血辨证类
V005-N00996.definition: the second stage of an epidemic febrile disease showing intrusion of pathogenic heat on the yang brightness meridian or the lung, gallbladder, spleen, stomach or large intestine, marked by high fever without chills, strong thirst, flushed face, dark u

V005-N01055.vocabName: GBT16751.3-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第3部分：治法
V005-N01055.label: 治未病
V005-N01055.definition: 泛指以强健身体，和畅情志，顺应自然变化，提高人体正气为目的，采取适宜的中医药防治方法，避免、阻滞疾病发生或进一步发展的防治原则。

V005-N01055.label: 治未病
V005-N01055.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V005-N01055.definition: 采取一定的措施防止疾病产生和发展的治疗原则，包括未病先防和既病防变两个方面。

V005-N00003.label: 中医药学
V005-N00003.definition: 中医学与中药学的合称，侧重反映中医与中药两者共同发展，密不可分。

V005-N00004.label: 中医基础理论
V005-N00004.englishNames: basic theory of traditional Chinese medicine
V005-N00004.definition: 研究和阐明中医学的基本概念、基本理论、 基本规律、基本原则的学科。

V005-N00004.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00004.label: 中医基础理论
V005-N00004.aliases: Basic Theories (TCM)； Basic theory of traditional Chinese medicine
V005-N00004.englishNames: Basic Theory of Traditional Chinese Medicine; Fundamentals of traditional Chinese medicine; fundamental theory of traditional Chinese medicine
V005-N00004.pinyinNames: zhong yi ji chu li lun; zhōng yī jī chǔ lǐ lùn
V005-N00004.path: 中医基础理论术语｜其他类
V005-N00004.definition: Rational understandings of fundamental knowledge in traditional Chinese medicine. These include essential concepts, regular patterns, theories and principles. These understandings guide the application of traditional Chinese medicine in health preservation and disease prevention, diagnosis and treatment as well as rehabilitation.

V005-N00005.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00005.label: 整体观念
V005-N00005.englishNames: Holistic concept; concept of holism; holism
V005-N00005.pinyinNames: zhěng tǐ guān niàn; zheng ti guan nian
V005-N00005.path: 中医基础理论术语｜其他类
V005-N00005.definition: The integral entity of the human body. The integration of human beings with nature and society.

V005-N00006.label: 天人相应
V005-N00006.englishNames: correspondence between human body and natural environment

V005-N00006.definition: 强调人对自然的依存与适应关系。

V005-N00006.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00006.label: 天人合一
V005-N00006.path: 中医基础理论术语｜其他类
V005-N00006.definition: The oneness of human beings, heaven, earth and nature.

V005-N00006.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM

V005-N00006.englishNames: correspondence between nature and human; correspondence between human body and natural environment; Man–nature correspondence; Correspondence between Human Body and Natural Environment

V005-N00006.path: 中医基础理论术语｜其他类

V005-N00006.path: 基础理论｜精气学说，阴阳学说，五行学说
V005-N00006.definition: one of the basic concepts in traditional Chinese medicine which emphasizes that humans are in adaptive conformity with the natural environment

V005-N00014.definition: A pathological summarization on the disease location, etiological factors, nature, severity and prognosis in a certain stage.

V005-N00016.label: 辨证论治
V005-N00016.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N00016.definition: 中医临床诊断治疗疾病的思维方法和过程。通过四诊收集患者的病史、症状等临床资料，根据中医理论进行综合分析，分辨出证候，并拟定治疗方法。也包括中医理论贯穿在预防与养生实践中的过程。

V005-N00016.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00016.label: 辨证论治
V005-N00016.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜诊断基本概念与原则类
V005-N00016.definition: The whole process of applying theories, principles, prescriptions and medicines to clinical treatment. Pattern differentiation aims to analyse the signs and symptoms collected by the four examination methods according to the fundamental theories of the eight principles, zang–fu organs, etiology and pathogenesis. Treatment refers to specific therapeutic methods directed at the differentiated pattern.

V005-N00016.definition: diagnosis of the pattern/syndrome, through comprehensive analysis of symptoms and signs, which has implications for determining the cause, nature and location of the illness and the patient’s physical condition, and their treatment

V005-N00018.label: 阴阳学说
V005-N00018.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N00018.definition: 在阴阳概念基础上建立起来的中医学基本理论,认为阴阳对立统一、消长转化、相反相成的关系贯穿于自然与人体等一切事物之中,是人体生理和病理发生、发展、变化的根源及规律。

V005-N00018.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00018.label: 阴阳学说

V005-N00018.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00018.label: 阴阳学说
V005-N00018.path: 基础理论｜精气学说，阴阳学说，五行学说
V005-N00018.definition: an ancient Chinese philosophical concept, dealing with two opposite aspects of matters in nature which are interrelated with each other. Its principle is widely applied to traditional Chinese medicine

V005-N00019.label: 阴阳
V005-N00019.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N00019.definition: 阴气与阳气的合称,事物普遍存在的相互对立的两种属性，阴阳相反相成是事物发生、发展、变化的规律和根源。

V005-N00019.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00019.label: 阴阳
V005-N00019.path: 中医基础理论术语｜阴阳类
V005-N00019.definition: A concept defined as the opposing but complementary qualities of interrelated entities/phenomena in the natural world.

V005-N00019.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00019.label: 阴阳

V005-N00019.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00019.label: 阴阳
V005-N00019.path: 基础理论｜精气学说，阴阳学说，五行学说
V005-N00019.definition: the general descriptive terms for the two opposite, complementary and inter-related cosmic forces found in all matter in nature. The ceaseless motion of both yin and yang gives rise to all changes seen in the world

V005-N00020.path: 中医基础理论术语｜阴阳类
V005-N00020.definition: Yin is the opposite of yang. The qualities of yin include cold/cool, dimness, descending, stillness, introversion, heaviness, etc.

V005-N00020.label: 阴

V005-N00020.path: 基础理论｜精气学说，阴阳学说，五行学说

V005-N00021.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00021.label: 阳
V005-N00021.path: 中医基础理论术语｜阴阳类
V005-N00021.definition: Yang is the opposite of yin. The qualities of yang include warm/hot, bright, ascending, movement, extroversion, light, clearness, etc.

V005-N00021.path: 基础理论｜精气学说，阴阳学说，五行学说
V005-N00021.definition: In Chinese philosophy, the masculine, active and positive principle (characterized by light, warmth, dryness, activity, etc.) of the two opposing cosmic

V005-N00022.label: 阴气
V005-N00022.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N00022.definition: 事物或运动中具有内里的、向下的、抑制的、重浊的、形质性的等具有阴属性的一面。

V005-N00022.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00022.label: 阴气
V005-N00022.path: 中医基础理论术语｜阴阳类
V005-N00022.definition: Yin qi is the opposite of yang qi. The qualities of yin qi include condensation, moistening, inhibition, etc.

V005-N00023.label: 阳气
V005-N00023.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N00023.definition: 事物及运动中具有外表的、向上的、亢盛的、轻清的、功能性的等具有阳属性的一面。

V005-N00023.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00023.label: 阳气
V005-N00023.path: 中医基础理论术语｜阴阳类
V005-N00023.definition: Yang qi is the opposite of yin qi. The qualities of yang qi include warming, activating, excitation, etc.

V005-N00023.label: 阳气

V005-N00023.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00023.label: 阳气
V005-N00023.path: 基础理论｜精, 神, 氣, 血,
V005-N00023.definition: the yang aspect of qi, particularly referring to that aspect of qi as functional activities

V005-N00024.label: 阳化气
V005-N00024.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N00024.definition: 阳主气化，阳性动而发散，事物从有形到无形的变化属阳。

V005-N00025.label: 阴成形
V005-N00025.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N00025.definition: 阴主成形，阴性静而凝聚，事物从无形到有形的变化属阴。

V005-N00026.definition: A collective term for Jueyin, Shaoyin and Taiyin; Shaoyang, Yangming and Taiyang.

V005-N00026.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00026.label: 三阴三阳

V005-N00028.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N00028.definition: 阴阳相反、相斥、相争的关系。

V005-N00029.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N00029.definition: 阴阳相互依存，互为根本的关系。

V005-N00029.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM

V005-N00029.englishNames: mutual rooting of yin and yang; Yin and yang reciprocally root

V005-N00029.path: 中医基础理论术语｜阴阳类
V005-N00029.definition: Yin and yang have reciprocal roots and cannot be separated.

V005-N00029.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V005-N00029.path: 基础理论｜精气学说，阴阳学说，五行学说
V005-N00029.definition: the mutually dependent relationship between yin and yang, the same as interdependence between yin and yang

V005-N00030.label: 阴阳消长
V005-N00030.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N00030.definition: 阴阳存在着始终不断的增减盛衰的运动变化。

V005-N00030.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00030.label: 阴阳消长
V005-N00030.path: 中医基础理论术语｜阴阳类

V005-N00065.definition: the category of water generates or promotes the category of wood, also called water generating wood

V005-N00066.label: 五行相克
V005-N00066.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N00066.definition: 木、火、土、金、水之间存在着递相克制、制约的关系，其规律是木克土，土克水,水克火，火克金，金克木。

V005-N00066.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00066.label: 五行相克
V005-N00066.aliases: Mutual controlling among the five elements； Restriction in Five Elements
V005-N00066.englishNames: restriction among five elements/phases; The five elements mutually restrain; Mutual Restriction of Five Phases
V005-N00066.pinyinNames: wu xing xiang ke; wǔ xíng xiāng kè
V005-N00066.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五行类
V005-N00066.definition: The five elements mutually control and restrain one another. The sequential restraining relationships among the five elements are, specifically, wood restrains earth, earth restrains water, water restrains fire, fire restrains metal, and metal restrains wood.

V005-N00066.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00066.label: 五行相克
V005-N00066.englishNames: Mutual Restriction of Five Phases; restriction among five elements/phases

V005-N00067.label: 所胜
V005-N00067.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N00067.definition: 在五行相克关系中，“我克"者为"我所胜”。如"木克土”，木为"我”，木之“所胜"是土。

V005-N00067.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00067.label: 所胜

V005-N00068.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N00068.definition: 在五行相克关系中，“克我”者为“我所不胜”。如“木克土”，土为“我”，土之“所不胜”是木。

V005-N00068.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00068.label: 所不胜

V005-N00069.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N00069.definition: 五行之中,木有克伐、制约土的作用,用以说明肝对脾的制约关系。

V005-N00069.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00069.label: 木克土
V005-N00069.englishNames: wood restrains earth; wood restricting earth

V005-N00069.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00069.label: 木克土
V005-N00069.englishNames: wood restrains earth; wood restricting earth
V005-N00069.path: 基础理论｜精气学说，阴阳学说，五行学说
V005-N00069.definition: the category of wood restricts or checks the category of earth, also called wood controlling earth

V005-N00070.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N00070.definition: 五行之中，土有克伐、制约水的作用，用以说明脾对肾的制约关系。

V005-N00070.englishNames: earth restrains water; earth restricting water

V005-N00070.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00070.label: 土克水
V005-N00070.path: 基础理论｜精气学说，阴阳学说，五行学说
V005-N00070.definition: the category of earth restricts or checks the category of water, also called earth controlling water

V005-N00071.label: 水克火
V005-N00071.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N00071.definition: 五行之中，水有克伐、制约火的作用，用以说明肾对心的制约关系。

V005-N00071.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00071.label: 水克火

V005-N00071.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00071.label: 水克火
V005-N00071.path: 基础理论｜精气学说，阴阳学说，五行学说
V005-N00071.definition: the category of water restricts or checks the category of fire, also called water controlling fire

V005-N00072.label: 火克金
V005-N00072.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N00072.definition: 五行之中，火有克伐、制约金的作用，用以说明心对肺的制约关系。

V005-N00072.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V005-N00072.englishNames: fire restrains metal; fire restricting metal

V005-N00072.label: 火克金
V005-N00072.path: 基础理论｜精气学说，阴阳学说，五行学说
V005-N00072.definition: the category of fire restricts or checks the category of metal, also called fire controlling metal

V005-N00073.label: 金克木
V005-N00073.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N00073.definition: 五行之中，金有克伐、制约木的作用,用以说明肺对肝的制约关系。

V005-N00073.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00073.label: 金克木
V005-N00073.englishNames: metal restrains wood; metal restricting wood

V005-N00073.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00073.label: 金克木
V005-N00073.path: 基础理论｜精气学说，阴阳学说，五行学说
V005-N00073.definition: the category of metal restricts or checks the category of wood, also called metal controlling wood

V005-N00074.label: 五行相乘
V005-N00074.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N00074.definition: 五行中某一行对其所胜一行的过度克制，为五行之间的异常克制现象。

V005-N00074.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00074.label: 五行相乘
V005-N00074.englishNames: over-restriction among five elements/phases; The five elements mutually over-restrain one another
V005-N00074.pinyinNames: wu xing xiang cheng; wǔ xíng xiāng chéng
V005-N00074.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五行类
V005-N00074.definition: Excessive restraint of an element over the element it controls.

V005-N00074.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00074.label: 五行相乘

V005-N00080.label: 五行相侮
V005-N00080.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N00080.definition: 五行中某一行对其所不胜一行的反向克制，为五行之间的异常克制现象。

V005-N00080.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00080.label: 五行相侮
V005-N00080.aliases: Reverse restraining/insulting among the five elements
V005-N00080.englishNames: counter-restriction among five elements/phases; The five elements mutually counter-restrain one another
V005-N00080.pinyinNames: wu xing xiang wu; wǔ xíng xiāng wǔ
V005-N00080.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五行类
V005-N00080.definition: A restraining element becomes controlled by the element it controls.

V005-N00080.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00080.label: 五行相侮

V005-N00084.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V005-N00085.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00085.label: 土侮木

V005-N00088.label: 制化
V005-N00088.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N00088.definition: 制即克制，化即生化。五行之间相互制约，相互化生，化中有制，制中有化，二者相辅相成，才能维持其相对平衡和正常的协调关系。

V005-N00088.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00088.label: 五行制化
V005-N00088.englishNames: The five elements mutually control and transform
V005-N00088.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五行类
V005-N00088.definition: A balanced, harmonized state maintained by mutual generating and restraining relationships among the five elements.

V005-N00088.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00088.label: 制化
V005-N00088.englishNames: inhibition and generation; restriction and generation

V005-N00088.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00088.label: 制化
V005-N00088.path: 基础理论｜精气学说，阴阳学说，五行学说
V005-N00088.definition: the engendering and restraining relationships for maintaining a relative balance and normal coordination in the five phase theory

V005-N00089.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00089.label: 五行胜复
V005-N00089.englishNames: The five elements overcome and retaliate
V005-N00089.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五行类
V005-N00089.definition: The five elements have the actions of overcoming and retaliating with one another.

V005-N00090.label: 亢害承制
V005-N00090.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N00090.definition: 五行某一行偏亢则失去平衡而为害，惟有随之克制亢害之行才能恢复相对平衡。

V005-N00090.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00090.label: 亢害承制

V005-N00090.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00090.label: 亢害承制
V005-N00090.path: 基础理论｜精气学说，阴阳学说，五行学说
V005-N00090.definition: one of the principles of the five phase theory indicating that hyperactivity of any phase is harmful, and its restriction will restore the normal balance

V005-N00092.label: 脏象学说
V005-N00092.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V005-N00092.definition: 研究人体脏腑生理功能、病理变化规律及相互关系与外在征象的学说。

V005-N00092.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00092.label: 脏象学说
V005-N00092.definition: the theory dealing with the study of physiological functions and pathological changes of the internal organs as well as their interrelationship and external manifestation

V005-N00093.label: 脏象
V005-N00093.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论

V005-N00093.label: 脏象
V005-N00093.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V005-N00093.definition: 脏腑生理功能、病理变化表现于外的征象。脏，指藏于体内的内脏;象，为表现于外的生理功能和病理现象。

V005-N00093.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00093.label: 藏象
V005-N00093.path: 中医基础理论术语｜藏象[基础理论]
V005-N00093.definition: The word “zang” means the internal organs; and the word “xiang” means the outward manifestations of physiological functions and pathological changes of the internal organs.

V005-N00093.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00093.label: 脏象

V005-N00093.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00093.label: 脏象
V005-N00093.definition: the outward manifestation of internal organs through which physiological functions as well as pathological changes can be detected and the state of health appraised

V005-N00094.label: 脏腑
V005-N00094.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V005-N00094.definition: 指人体的内脏器官，为五脏、六腑、奇恒之腑的统称。

V005-N00094.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00094.label: 脏腑
V005-N00094.path: 中医基础理论术语｜藏象[基础理论]
V005-N00094.definition: A collective term for the internal organs of human beings, including five zang organs, six fu organs and extraordinary organs.

V005-N00094.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00094.label: 脏腑
V005-N00094.englishNames: zang-fu viscera; Zang Fu Viscera; zang-fu organs

V005-N00094.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00094.label: 脏腑
V005-N00094.definition: a collective term for internal organs, also called zangorgans and fu-organs

V005-N00096.label: 脏腑相合
V005-N00096.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V005-N00096.definition: 脏属阴，腑属阳;脏为里，腑为表。脏与腑之间相互联系的阴阳表里关系。

V005-N00096.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00096.label: 脏腑相合
V005-N00096.path: 中医基础理论术语｜藏象[基础理论]
V005-N00096.definition: The zang–fu organs mutually correspond with one another, with a (yin) interior–(yang) exterior connection between the zang and fu organs. Specifically, the heart is internally–externally connected with the small intestine, the lung with the large intestine, the spleen with the stomach, the liver with the gallbladder, the kidney with the urinary bladder, and the pericardium with sanjiao.

V005-N00096.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00096.label: 脏腑相合
V005-N00096.englishNames: zang and fu viscus in pair; zang and fu organs in pairs; interconnection of zang-fu viscera

V005-N00098.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00098.label: 腑输精于脏

V005-N00099.label: 五脏
V005-N00099.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V005-N00099.definition: 心、肝、脾、肺、肾五个脏器的合称，具有化生、贮藏功能,生理特点是藏精气而不泻，满而不能实。中医五脏不局限于解剖概念。

V005-N00099.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00099.label: 五脏
V005-N00099.path: 中医基础理论术语｜藏象[基础理论]
V005-N00099.definition: A collective term for the five internal organs—the heart, liver, spleen/pancreas, lung and kidney.

V005-N00099.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00099.label: 五脏
V005-N00099.englishNames: five viscera; five zang-organs; five zang viscera

V005-N00099.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00099.label: 五脏
V005-N00099.definition: a collective term for the heart, liver, spleen, lung and kidney

V005-N00100.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00100.label: 五脏所藏
V005-N00100.englishNames: Storage of the five zang organs
V005-N00100.path: 中医基础理论术语｜藏象[基础理论]
V005-N00100.definition: The heart stores the spirit; the lung stores the corporeal soul; the liver stores the ethereal soul; the spleen stores the intent; and the kidney stores the will.

V005-N00100.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00100.label: 五脏所藏

V005-N00101.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00101.label: 五脏所主
V005-N00101.englishNames: Governance of the five zang organs
V005-N00101.path: 中医基础理论术语｜藏象[基础理论]
V005-N00101.definition: The heart governs blood vessels; the lung governs the skin; the spleen governs the flesh; the liver governs the sinew/tendon; and the kidney governs the bones.

V005-N00102.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00102.label: 五脏化液
V005-N00102.englishNames: Fluids of the five zang organs
V005-N00102.path: 中医基础理论术语｜藏象[基础理论]
V005-N00102.definition: The fluid of the heart is sweat; the fluid of the lung is nasal mucus; the fluid of the spleen is thin saliva; the fluid of the liver is tears; and the fluid of the kidney is the thick saliva.

V005-N00102.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00102.label: 五脏化液
V005-N00102.englishNames: liquids transformed by five zang viscera; secretions transformed from five zang-organs

V005-N00103.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00103.label: 五脏外华
V005-N00103.englishNames: Lustres of the five zang organs
V005-N00103.path: 中医基础理论术语｜藏象[基础理论]
V005-N00103.definition: The lustre of the heart shows in the face; the lustre of the lung shows in the skin hair; the lustre of the spleen shows in the lips; the lustre of the liver shows in the nails; and the lustre of the kidney shows in the hair.

V005-N00104.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00104.label: 五脏所恶
V005-N00104.englishNames: Dislikes of the five zang organs
V005-N00104.path: 中医基础理论术语｜藏象[基础理论]
V005-N00104.definition: The heart dislikes heat; the lung dislikes cold; the spleen dislikes dampness; the liver dislikes wind; and the kidney dislikes dryness.

V005-N00104.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V005-N00105.label: 藏精气而不泻
V005-N00105.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V005-N00105.definition: 五脏贮藏精气,勿使外泄的生理功能特点。

V005-N00106.label: 心
V005-N00106.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V005-N00106.definition: 五脏之一，位居胸腔之内，膈之上，有心包卫护于外,其主要生理功能是主血脉、主神志，并与舌和汗液密切相关。

V005-N00106.label: 心
V005-N00106.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜耳穴名称和头皮穴线名称
V005-N00106.definition: 耳穴。在耳甲腔正中凹陷处。

V005-N00106.label: 心

V005-N00106.label: 心
V005-N00106.path: 上編 簡帛醫學詞語｜病症詞語

V005-N00106.path: 上編 簡帛醫學詞語｜病症詞語

V005-N00106.label: 心

V005-N00106.label: 心

V005-N00106.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00106.label: 心
V005-N00106.definition: the organ located in the thoracic cavity above the diaphragm, which controls blood circulation and mental activities

V005-N00107.label: 心气
V005-N00107.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V005-N00107.definition: 心之精气，表现为心主血脉，主神志的功能活动。

V005-N00107.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00107.label: 心气
V005-N00107.path: 中医基础理论术语｜藏象[基础理论]
V005-N00107.definition: The qi stored by the heart, as opposed to heart blood. It is the driving force of physiological activities of the heart.

V005-N00107.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00107.label: 心气

V005-N00107.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00107.label: 心气
V005-N00107.path: 基础理论｜精, 神, 氣, 血,
V005-N00107.definition: essential qi of the heart, the physical substrata and dynamic force of the functional activities of the heart

V005-N00108.label: 心血
V005-N00108.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V005-N00108.definition: 心所主之血,来源于脾胃化生的水谷精微，在心气的推动下，流注全身，发挥营养和滋润作用，亦是神志活动的物质基础。

V005-N00108.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00108.label: 心血
V005-N00108.path: 中医基础理论术语｜藏象[基础理论]
V005-N00108.definition: The blood stored by the heart, as opposed to heart qi. It is the material foundation of physiological activities of the heart.

V005-N00108.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00108.label: 心血

V005-N00108.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00108.label: 心血
V005-N00108.definition: the blood governed by the heart, which flows all over the body, particularly that part of blood serving as the basis for the physiological activities of the heart, including mental activities

V005-N00109.label: 心阴
V005-N00109.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V005-N00109.definition: 心之阴气，与心阳相对而言，心之宁静、内守、濡润的一面,并可制约过亢的阳热。

V005-N00109.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00109.label: 心阴
V005-N00109.path: 中医基础理论术语｜藏象[基础理论]
V005-N00109.definition: The yin essence of the heart, as opposed to heart yang. It refers to the quiescent and moistening aspect of the heart’s function.

V005-N00109.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00109.label: 心阴

V005-N00109.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00109.label: 心阴
V005-N00109.definition: yin essence of the heart, the opposite of heart yang, the quiescent and moistening aspect of heart function

V005-N00110.label: 心阳
V005-N00110.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V005-N00110.definition: 心之阳气,与心阴相对而言，心之兴奋、推动、温煦的一面。

V005-N00110.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00110.label: 心阳
V005-N00110.path: 中医基础理论术语｜藏象[基础理论]
V005-N00110.definition: The yang qi of the heart, as opposed to heart yin. It refers to the activating, impelling and warming aspect of the heart’s function.

V005-N00110.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00110.label: 心阳

V005-N00110.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00110.label: 心阳
V005-N00110.definition: yang qi of the heart, which stimulates the activities of the heart and mind, and has a warming action

V005-N00111.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00111.label: 心系
V005-N00111.path: 中医基础理论术语｜藏象[基础理论]
V005-N00111.definition: A functional system composed of the heart, small intestine, blood vessels, face, tongue and heart meridian.

V005-N00112.label: 心藏神
V005-N00112.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V005-N00112.definition: 心藏之神,指人的神志活动。心具有主宰五脏六腑、形体官窍的一切生理活动和精神意识思维活动的功能。

V005-N00112.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00112.label: 心主神明
V005-N00112.aliases: 心主神志； 心藏神； The heart governs spirit and/or mind； The heart governs mental activities
V005-N00112.englishNames: The heart governs the bright spirit
V005-N00112.path: 中医基础理论术语｜藏象[基础理论]
V005-N00112.definition: The heart dominates the vital activities and governs mental, conscious and thinking activities.

V005-N00112.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00112.label: 心藏神

V005-N00114.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00114.label: 心主言
V005-N00114.englishNames: heart dominating speech; heart governing speech

V005-N00115.label: 心主血脉
V005-N00115.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V005-N00115.definition: 心气推动血液运行于脉中，流注全身，循环不休，发挥营养和濡润作用。

V005-N00115.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00115.label: 心主血脉
V005-N00115.englishNames: The heart governs the blood and vessels
V005-N00115.path: 中医基础理论术语｜藏象[基础理论]
V005-N00115.definition: The normal functioning of the heart in pumping blood to circulate within the vessels.

V005-N00115.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00115.label: 心主血脉
V005-N00115.aliases: Heart Being in Charge of Controlling  Blood Circulation； Heart Control Blood Circulat
V005-N00115.englishNames: heart domainating blood and vessel; Heart Governing Blood and Vessels; heart governing blood and vessels; heart governing blood andvessels

V005-N00120.label: 心开窍于舌
V005-N00120.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V005-N00120.definition: 心之经脉与舌根相连，心气上通于舌，心的生理和病理表现，可由舌反映出来。

V005-N00120.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00120.label: 心开窍于舌
V005-N00120.englishNames: The heart opens into the tongue
V005-N00120.path: 中医基础理论术语｜藏象[基础理论]
V005-N00120.definition: The tongue is nourished by heart qi and blood. It is the opening orifice of the heart.

V005-N00120.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00120.label: 心开窍于舌
V005-N00120.definition: the heart opens into the tongue, reflecting its physiological and pathological conditions

V005-N00121.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00121.label: 舌为心之苗
V005-N00121.englishNames: The tongue is the expression of the heart
V005-N00121.path: 中医基础理论术语｜藏象[基础理论]
V005-N00121.definition: The physiological functions and pathological changes of heart can manifest on the tongue.

V005-N00124.label: 心恶热
V005-N00124.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V005-N00124.definition: 恶"为讨厌畏惧之意。如阳热太盛,易影响心的生理功能，可致心神被扰，迫血妄行。

V005-N00124.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00124.label: 心恶热
V005-N00124.path: 中医基础理论术语｜藏象[基础理论]
V005-N00124.definition: The heart is intolerant of heat. It is fire in nature and can be easily damaged by fire heat.

V005-N00124.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00124.label: 心恶热

V005-N00125.label: 心合小肠
V005-N00125.englishNames: heart being connected with small intestine
V005-N00125.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V005-N00125.definition: 心与小肠相表里，手少阴心经与手太阳小肠经相互络属,构成心和小肠的阴阳表里相合关系。二者生理上相互配合，心主血，小肠主分清泌浊,奉心生血。病理上二者也互相影响。

V005-N00125.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00125.label: 心合小肠
V005-N00125.englishNames: The pairing between the heart and small intestine
V005-N00125.path: 中医基础理论术语｜藏象[基础理论]
V005-N00125.definition: The heart is externally–internally paired with the small intestine through meridians.

V005-N00125.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00125.label: 心合小肠
V005-N00125.englishNames: heart and small intestine in pair

V005-N00126.label: 心包络
V005-N00126.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V005-N00126.definition: 心脏外围的包膜,有络,可通行气血,具有保护心脏的作用。

V005-N00126.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00126.label: 心包
V005-N00126.path: 中医基础理论术语｜藏象[基础理论]
V005-N00126.definition: The membrane that encircles and protects the heart.

V005-N00126.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00126.label: 心包络

V005-N00126.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00126.label: 心包
V005-N00126.definition: the outer covering of the heart, including the pericardium collateral

V005-N00127.label: 心肾相交
V005-N00127.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V005-N00127.definition: 又称"水火既济”。心肾之间存在协调平衡的关系。心在上焦，属火;肾在下焦，属水。心火下降于肾，能温暖肾水，使肾水不寒；肾水上济于心，能滋养心阴，制约心阳，使心阳不亢。

V005-N00127.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00127.label: 心肾相交
V005-N00127.aliases: 水火既济； Coordination between water and fire/harmony； between the heart and the kidney
V005-N00127.englishNames: Coordination between the heart and the kidney
V005-N00127.path: 中医基础理论术语｜藏象[基础理论]
V005-N00127.definition: The coordinated balance between ascending heart fire (yang) and descending kidney water (yin).

V005-N00127.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00127.label: 心肾相交

V005-N00127.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00127.label: 水火既济

V005-N00127.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00127.label: 心肾相交
V005-N00127.definition: superior-inferior, ascending-descending, water-fire and yin-yang coordination between the heart and kidney

V005-N00128.label: 肺
V005-N00128.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜脏象
V005-N00128.definition: 五脏之一，位于胸腔之内，膈之上,左右各一。其主要生理功能是主气、司呼吸、主宣发肃降、通调水道、朝百脉而主治节，并与鼻窍、皮肤密切相关。

V005-N00128.label: 肺
V005-N00128.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜耳穴名称和头皮穴线名称
V005-N00128.definition: 耳穴。在心、气管区周围处。

V005-N00128.label: 肺
