V005-N00486.label: 血汗同源
V005-N00486.englishNames: Blood and sweat share the same source
V005-N00486.path: 中医基础理论术语｜精气血津液类
V005-N00486.definition: Since blood is composed of body fluids and Ying-nutrient qi and sweat is transformed from body fluids, the blood and sweat share the same source.

V005-N00487.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00487.label: 经络类

V005-N00488.label: 经络学说
V005-N00488.definition: 阐述人体经络系统的循行分布、生理功能、病理变化及其与脏腑相互关系的理论。

V005-N00488.label: 经络学说
V005-N00488.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00488.definition: 在中医医疗实践中建立起来的阐述人体经络系统的循行分布、生理功能、病理变化及其与脏腑和体表相互关系的学说，是中医学理论体系的重要组成部分。

V005-N00488.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00488.label: 经络学说
V005-N00488.englishNames: meridian theory; meridian/channel and collateral theory; channel theory

V005-N00488.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00488.label: 经络学说
V005-N00488.definition: a theory concerned the meridians and collaterals, the same as channels and networks theory

V005-N00489.label: 经络
V005-N00489.definition: 经脉和络脉的总称，是人体运行气血、联络脏腑、沟通内外、贯穿上下的通路。

V005-N00489.label: 经络
V005-N00489.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论

V005-N00489.label: 经络
V005-N00489.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00489.definition: 经脉和络脉的统称，是人体运行气血、联络脏腑、沟通内外、贯串上下的通路。

V005-N00489.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00489.label: 经络
V005-N00489.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00489.definition: Meridians and collaterals are pathways for qi and blood to flow throughout the body. They form a comprehensive network linking the tissues and internal organs into an organic whole.

V005-N00489.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00489.label: 经络
V005-N00489.englishNames: meridian and collateral; meridian/channel and collateral

V005-N00489.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00489.label: 经络
V005-N00489.aliases: 经络系统； Meridian Collaterals； Meridians
V005-N00489.englishNames: meridian and collateral; Meridians and Collaterals; Meridian and Collateral
V005-N00489.definition: a system of conduits through which qi and blood circulate, connecting the bowels, viscera, extremities, superficial organs and tissues, making the body an organic whole, the same as channels and networks; meridians or channels, in short

V005-N00490.label: 经脉
V005-N00490.definition: 人体经络系统的主干，全身气血运行的主要通路。包括十二经脉和奇经八脉。

V005-N00490.label: 经脉
V005-N00490.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00490.definition: 是十二经脉、奇经八脉，以及附属于十二经脉的十二经别的统称，是经络系统中的主干，全身气血运行的主要通道。

V005-N00490.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00490.label: 经脉

V005-N00490.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00490.label: 经脉
V005-N00490.aliases: 解脉； 经隧； 人经
V005-N00490.definition: the main pathways of qi and blood coursing vertically, composed of the twelve regular meridians and the eight extra meridians, the same as channel vessel

V005-N00491.label: 络脉
V005-N00491.definition: 从经脉分出，以十五络脉为主体，遍布全身的分支脉络。

V005-N00491.label: 络脉
V005-N00491.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00491.definition: 从经脉分出,遍布于全身的分支脉络,具有加强表里经脉的联系，通达经脉未能经过的部位等功能。有别络、浮络和孙络之分。

V005-N00491.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00491.label: 络脉
V005-N00491.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00491.definition: Collaterals are branches of meridians, including minute collaterals, blood collaterals and superficial collaterals.

V005-N00491.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00491.label: 络脉

V005-N00491.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00491.label: 络脉
V005-N00491.definition: the small branches of the meridians, serving as a network linking the various aspects of the body

V005-N00492.label: 十四经
V005-N00492.definition: 十二经脉与任脉、督脉的合称。

V005-N00492.label: 十四经
V005-N00492.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00492.definition: 十二经脉和任脉、督脉的合称。

V005-N00492.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00492.label: 十四经
V005-N00492.englishNames: fourteen meridians; fourteen meridians/channels; fourteen channels

V005-N00492.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00492.label: 十四经
V005-N00492.definition: a collective term for the twelve regular meridians plus the governor and conception vessels

V005-N00493.label: 经气
V005-N00493.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00493.definition: 又称"经络之气”。即运行于经络中的气，不但指经脉的运行功能和经脉中的营养物质，而且是整体生命功能的表现。

V005-N00493.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00493.label: 经气
V005-N00493.path: 中医基础理论术语｜精气血津液类
V005-N00493.definition: The qi circulates within the meridians and falls under the category of healthy qi.

V005-N00493.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00493.label: 经气
V005-N00493.aliases: 脉气； 经络之气； Meridian Qi
V005-N00493.englishNames: meridian qi; Channel Qi; meridian/channel qi; channel qi

V005-N00493.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00493.label: 脉气

V005-N00493.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00493.label: 经气
V005-N00493.path: 基础理论｜精, 神, 氣, 血,
V005-N00493.definition: the qi that flows through the meridians, the same as collateral qi

V005-N00493.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00493.label: 脉气

V005-N00494.label: 经隧
V005-N00494.definition: 潜布于体表之下运行气血的经络通路。

V005-N00494.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00494.label: 经脉
V005-N00494.aliases: 解脉； 经隧； 人经
V005-N00494.definition: the main pathways of qi and blood coursing vertically, composed of the twelve regular meridians and the eight extra meridians, the same as channel vessel

V005-N00495.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00495.label: 关阖枢
V005-N00495.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00495.definition: Three objects of a door are used figuratively to express the functions of the three yang and three yin meridians. Of the three yang meridians, Taiyang is compared to the bolt, Yangming to the plank and Shaoyang to the hinge. Of the three yin meridians, Taiyin is compared to the bolt, Jueyin to the plank and Shaoyin to the hinge.

V005-N00496.label: 根结
V005-N00496.definition: 经气的所起与所归。根，根本、开始，经气根于四肢末端的井穴；结，结聚、归结，经气结于头、胸、腹部。

V005-N00496.label: 根结
V005-N00496.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00496.definition: “根"是经气始生的腧穴或部位;“结"是经气归结的腧穴或部位。

V005-N00496.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00496.label: 根结
V005-N00496.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00496.definition: The word “Gen” literally means root. It shares the similar meaning with “Ben”. The word “Jie” literally means knot. It shares the similar meaning with “Biao” (see Biao and Ben).

V005-N00496.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00496.label: 根结
V005-N00496.englishNames: starting and terminal points of meridian; Root and Knot; starting and terminal point of meridians/channels; root and knot

V005-N00497.label: 气街
V005-N00497.definition: 经气聚集通行的道路。包括头之气街、胸之气街、腹之气街、胫之气街。

V005-N00497.label: 气街
V005-N00497.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络

V005-N00497.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00497.label: 气街
V005-N00497.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00497.definition: Qi streets are the pathways for meridian qi to flow over the head and body trunk. There is a total of four qi streets, respectively on the head, chest, abdomen and lower leg.

V005-N00497.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00497.label: 气街
V005-N00497.englishNames: qi pathway; Pathway of Qi; another name forQichong(ST30）; pathway of qi

V005-N00499.label: 四海
V005-N00499.definition: 髓海、血海、气海、水谷之海的总称。脑为髓海，冲脉为血海，膻中为气海，胃为水谷之海。

V005-N00499.label: 四海
V005-N00499.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00499.definition: “海"为汇聚之处。四海是髓海、血海、气海、水谷之海的合称。脑为髓海，冲脉为血海，膻中为气海，胃为水谷之海。

V005-N00499.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00499.label: 四海
V005-N00499.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00499.definition: The four seas include the sea of marrow, sea of qi, sea of water and food, and sea of blood (sea of the twelve meridians).

V005-N00499.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00499.label: 四海

V005-N00500.label: 经络现象
V005-N00500.definition: 人体能够客观检查到的和主观感觉到的，着经络循行路线而出现的各种生理、病理现象的总称。

V005-N00500.label: 经络现象
V005-N00500.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜总论
V005-N00500.definition: 在某些条件下，沿经脉循行路线呈现的感觉异常、形态异常或物理、化学指标的相对特异性变化等现象。

V005-N00500.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00500.label: 经络现象
V005-N00500.englishNames: meridian phenomenon; channel phenomenon; me ridian phenomenon; The meridian phenomena
V005-N00500.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00500.definition: Specific disturbance of sensation, transmission of sensation and visible changes in skin colour and quality along the pathways of meridians.

V005-N00500.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00500.label: 经络现象

V005-N00501.label: 循经感传
V005-N00501.definition: 刺激穴位时，有酸、麻、胀、重的感觉，从被刺激的穴位开始沿经络循行路线进行传导的现象。

V005-N00501.label: 循经感传
V005-N00501.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜针灸学｜总论
V005-N00501.definition: 经穴受到刺激，沿着经络循行路线产生酸、麻、胀、热等感觉的传导现象。

V005-N00501.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00501.label: 循经感传
V005-N00501.englishNames: Transmission of sensation along meridians; propagated sensation along channel; transmission of sensation along meridian
V005-N00501.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00501.definition: Sensations radiating along the pathways of meridians.

V005-N00501.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00501.label: 循经感传
V005-N00501.englishNames: sensation transmission along meridians; sensation transmission along meridian/channel

V005-N00502.label: 十二经脉
V005-N00502.definition: 十二正经手三阴经、手三阳经、足三阴经、足三阳经的总称。

V005-N00502.label: 十二经脉
V005-N00502.englishNames: twelve regular channels; twelve regular meridians
V005-N00502.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00502.definition: 又称“十二正经”。为手三阳经、手三阴经、足三阳经、足三阴经的合称，为经络系统的主体。

V005-N00502.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00502.label: 十二经脉
V005-N00502.aliases: 十二正经； Twelve regular meridians
V005-N00502.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00502.definition: The twelve meridians (i.e. the twelve regular meridians) are: the lung meridian; the large intestine meridian; the stomach meridian; the spleen meridian; the heart meridian; the small intestine meridian; the bladder meridian; the kidney meridian; the pericardium meridian; the Sanjiao meridian; the gallbladder meridian; and the liver meridian.

V005-N00502.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00502.label: 十二经脉
V005-N00502.englishNames: twelve meridians; twelve meridians/channels; twelve regular channels; twelve regular meridians

V005-N00502.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00502.label: 十二经
V005-N00502.aliases: 十二正经； 十二经脉
V005-N00502.definition: a collective term for the three yin meridians and three yang meridians of each hand and foot, also the same as twelve regular meridians

V005-N00503.label: 手三阴经
V005-N00503.definition: 手太阴肺经、手少阴心经和手厥阴心包经的总称。

V005-N00503.label: 手三阴经
V005-N00503.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00503.definition: hand;three yin meridians of hand手太阴肺经、手少阴心经和手厥阴心包经的合称。

V005-N00503.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00503.label: 手三阴经
V005-N00503.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00503.definition: The three hand-yin meridians are lung meridian, heart meridian and pericardium meridian.

V005-N00503.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00503.label: 手三阴经
V005-N00503.englishNames: three yin meridians of hand; three yin meridians/channels of hand

V005-N00504.label: 手太阴肺经
V005-N00504.path: 经络｜十二经脉｜手三阴经
V005-N00504.definition: 十二经脉之一。起于中焦，属于肺脏，联络大肠，止于拇指桡侧端。

V005-N00504.label: 手太阴肺经
V005-N00504.englishNames: Taiyin Lung Channel of Hand;Taiyin Lung Meridian of Hand
V005-N00504.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00504.definition: 本经起于中焦,向下络大肠，回过来沿着胃上口穿过膈肌,入属肺，从肺系横行出于胸壁外上方,出腋下,沿上肢内侧前缘下行,过肘窝入寸口上鱼际,直出拇指桡侧端少商穴。其分支从前臂列缺穴处分出，沿掌背侧走向食指桡侧端,经气于商阳穴与手阳明大肠经相接。

V005-N00504.label: 手太阴肺经
V005-N00504.path: 传统医学证候｜经络证｜十二正经证

V005-N00504.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00504.label: 手太阴肺经
V005-N00504.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00504.definition: The lung meridian pertains to the lung and connects with the large intestine. It mainly travels along the anterior border of the medial aspect of the arm.

V005-N00504.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00504.label: 手太阴肺经
V005-N00504.englishNames: lung meridian of hand taiyin; lung meridian/channel of hand greater yin(LU); Taiyin Lung Channel of Hand; Taiyin Lung Meridian of Hand

V005-N00504.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00504.label: 手太阴肺经
V005-N00504.englishNames: lung meridian (LU); hand great yin lung meridian; channel LU

V005-N00504.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00504.label: 手太阴肺经
V005-N00504.englishNames: lung meridian (LU); hand great yin lung meridian; channel LU
V005-N00504.definition: one of the regular twelve meridians which begins internally in the middle energizer, descends to connect with the large intestine, then ascends to the lung and throat, courses laterally and exits superficially at zhongfu (LU1), and then descends along

V005-N00505.label: 手厥阴心包经
V005-N00505.path: 经络｜十二经脉｜手三阴经
V005-N00505.definition: 十二经脉之一。起于胸中，属心包络，联络三焦，止于中指末端。

V005-N00505.label: 手厥阴心包经
V005-N00505.englishNames: Jueyin Pericardium Channel of Hand;Jueyin Pericardium Meridian of Hand
V005-N00505.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00505.definition: 本经起于胸中,出属心包络,向下穿过膈肌,络于上、中、下三焦。其分支从胸中分出，出胁部当腋下3寸处天池穴，向上至腋窝下，沿上肢内侧中线入肘,过腕部,人掌中，沿中指桡侧至末端中冲穴。另一分支从掌中分出，沿无名指尺侧端行，经气于关冲穴与手少阳三焦经相接。

V005-N00505.label: 手厥阴心包经
V005-N00505.path: 传统医学证候｜经络证｜十二正经证

V005-N00505.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00505.label: 手厥阴心包经
V005-N00505.pinyinNames: shǒu jué yīn xīn bāo jīng
V005-N00505.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00505.definition: The pericardium meridian pertains to the pericardium and connects with the Sanjiao. It mainly travels along the palmar aspect of the upper arm and moves towards the forearm running between the tendons of the m. palmaris longus and m. flexor carpi radialis.

V005-N00505.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00505.label: 手厥阴心包经
V005-N00505.englishNames: pericardium meridian of hand jueyin; pericardiummeridian/channel of hand reverting yin(PC)
V005-N00505.pinyinNames: shou jue yin xin bao jing

V005-N00505.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00505.label: 手厥阴心包经
V005-N00505.englishNames: pericardium meridian (PC); hand reverting yin pericardium meridian; channel $ PC
V005-N00505.pinyinNames: shou jue yin xin bao jing

V005-N00508.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00508.definition: 本经起于食指桡侧端(商阳穴),经过手背行于上肢伸侧前缘，上肩，至肩关节前缘，向后与督脉在大椎穴处相会，再向前下行入锁骨上窝(缺盆)，进入胸腔络肺，通过膈肌下行，入属大肠。其分支从锁骨上窝上行,经颈部至面颊,入下齿中，回出夹口两旁，左右交叉于人中,至对侧鼻翼旁，经气于迎香穴处与足阳明胃经相接。

V005-N00509.label: 手少阳三焦经
V005-N00509.englishNames: Shaoyang Sanjiao Channel of Hand;Shaoyang Sanjiao Meridianof Hand
V005-N00509.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00509.definition: 本经起于无名指尺侧端关冲穴，向上沿无名指尺侧至手腕背面，上行尺骨、桡骨之间，通过肘尖,沿上臂外侧向上至肩部,向前行入缺盆,布于膻中,散络心包,穿过膈肌,属上、中、下三焦。其分支从膻中分出，上行出缺盆,至肩部,左右交会并与督脉相会于大椎，上行到项,沿耳后直上出耳上角,然后屈曲向下经面颊部至目眶下。其另一分支从耳后分出，进入耳中，出走耳前，至目外毗，经气于瞳子膠穴与足少阳胆经相接。

V005-N00509.label: 手少阳三焦经
V005-N00509.path: 传统医学证候｜经络证｜十二正经证

V005-N00509.definition: The Sanjiao meridian pertains to Sanjiao and connects with the pericardium. It is mainly distributed along the dorsal aspect of the forearm between the radius and ulna and reaches the ears and face.

V005-N00510.definition: 本经起于手小指尺侧端少泽穴,沿手背、上肢外侧后缘，过肘部，到肩关节后面，绕肩胛部,左右交会并与督脉在大椎穴处相会，前行入缺盆，深入体腔，络心，沿食道，穿过膈肌,到达胃部，下行,属小肠。其分支从面颊部分出,向上行于眼下，至目内毗，经气于睛明穴与足太阳膀胱经相接。

V005-N00512.definition: 十二经脉之一。起于鼻翼两侧，属于胃，联络脾脏，止于次趾外侧。

V005-N00512.label: 足阳明胃经
V005-N00512.englishNames: Yangming Stomach Channel of Foot;Yangming Stomach Meridian of Foot
V005-N00512.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00512.definition: 本经起于鼻翼两旁迎香穴，夹鼻上行，至鼻根部，与足太阳膀胱经相交于目内，向下沿鼻柱外侧，入上齿中，还出，环绕嘴唇，在颏唇沟承浆穴处左右相交，退回沿下颌骨后下缘经下颌角上行过耳前，沿发际，到额前神庭穴。其下行支脉沿喉咙向下后行，左右交会并与督脉在大椎穴处相会，折向前行，入缺盆，深入体腔，下行穿过膈肌，属胃，络脾。其直行主干从缺盆出体表，沿乳中线下行，夹脐两旁旁开2寸，下行至腹股沟处的气街穴，沿大腿前侧，至膝膑，沿下肢胫骨前缘下行至足背，入足第二趾外侧端厉兑穴。另一分支从足背上冲阳穴分出，前行入足大趾内侧端，经气于隐白穴与足太阴脾经相接。

V005-N00512.label: 足阳明胃经
V005-N00512.path: 传统医学证候｜经络证｜十二正经证

V005-N00512.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00512.label: 足阳明胃经
V005-N00512.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00512.definition: The stomach meridian pertains to the stomach and connects with the spleen. It starts directly below the pupil between the eyeball and the infraorbital ridge. Running downward along the lateral side of the nose, to the lateral corner of the mouth. Curving posterior to the anterior angle of the mandible. Then it travels to the posterior aspect of the mandible ascending in front of the ear and following the anterior hairline, it reaches the forehead. It then runs along the throat and enters the supraclavicular fossa. The straight line of the meridian separates the supraclavicular fossa and runs downward along the middle mammillary line. It travels to the side of the umbilicus and descends to the inguinal groove. Running downward it travels along the anterior aspect of the thigh and reaches the knee. From there is continues further down along the anterior border of the lateral aspect of the tibia to the dorsum of the foot and reaches the lateral side of the tip of the second toe.

V005-N00513.label: 足少阳胆经
V005-N00513.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00513.definition: Channel of Foot；Shaoyang Gallbladder Meridian of Foot本经起于目外毗瞳子膠穴，上至头角，再向下到耳后，再折向上行,经额部至眉上，又向后折至枕部，沿颈下行至肩上，左右交会并与督脉相会于大椎穴，前行人缺盆。其分支：从目外毗分出，下行至大迎穴，行至目眶下,分支经过下颌角部下行至颈部，入缺盆后，深入体腔，穿过膈肌,络肝,属胆,沿胁里浅出气街,绕毛际,横向至环跳穴处。直行主干从缺盆下行腋部，沿胸侧,过季肋，下行至环跳穴处与前脉会合，再向下沿大腿外侧、膝关节外缘，行于腓骨前面，直下至腓骨下端，浅出外踝之前，沿足背行出于足第四趾外侧端窍阴穴。其分支从足背分出，前行出足大趾外侧端，折回穿过爪甲,分布于足大趾爪甲后丛毛中，经气由此处与足厥阴肝经相接。

V005-N00513.label: 足少阳胆经
V005-N00513.path: 传统医学证候｜经络证｜十二正经证

V005-N00513.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00513.label: 足少阳胆经
V005-N00513.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00513.definition: The gallbladder meridian pertains to the gallbladder and connects with the liver. It is mainly distributed over the head, sides of the head, chest, and abdomen and descends down to the lateral aspect of the leg.

V005-N00513.aliases: 胆经； 胆足少阳之脉； 足少阳
V005-N00513.englishNames: gallbladder meridian (GB); Gallbladder Meridian of Foot-Shaoyang
V005-N00513.definition: one of the twelve regular meridians which runs from tongziliao (GB1) at the lateral canthus of the eye, through the regions of the temple, ear, neck, shoulder, flank, and the outer side of the lower limb, terminating at zuqiaoyin (GB44) on the lateral

V005-N00514.label: 足太阳膀胱经
V005-N00514.path: 经络｜十二经脉｜足三阳经
V005-N00514.definition: 十二经脉之一。起于目内眦，属于膀胱，联络肾脏，止于小趾外侧。

V005-N00514.label: 足太阳膀胱经
V005-N00514.englishNames: Taiyang Bladder Channel of Foot;Taiyang Bladder Meridian of Foot
V005-N00514.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00514.definition: 本经起于目内毗睛明穴，向上至额部，左右交会并与督脉相会于头顶部百会穴。直行主干从头顶部分别向后行至枕骨处，进入颅腔,络脑，回出至后项部左右分开向下。一支沿肩胛内侧,脊柱两旁旁开1.5寸，到达腰部,进入脊柱两旁的肌肉，深入体腔，络肾，属膀胱。另一支经肩脾内侧,从附分穴挟脊旁开3寸下行至髀枢，经大腿后侧至腘窝中，然后下行穿过腓肠肌,出走于足外踝后,沿足背外侧缘至小趾外侧端，经气于至阴穴与足少阴肾经相接。

V005-N00514.label: 足太阳膀胱经
V005-N00514.path: 传统医学证候｜经络证｜十二正经证

V005-N00514.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00514.label: 足太阳膀胱经
V005-N00514.pinyinNames: zú tài yáng páng guāng jīng
V005-N00514.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00514.definition: The bladder meridian pertains to the urinary bladder and connects with the kidney. It is mainly distributed over the head, back and along the back of the leg.

V005-N00514.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00514.label: 足太阳膀胱经
V005-N00514.englishNames: bladder meridian of foot taiyang; bladder meridian/channel of foot greater yang(BL); Taiyang Bladder Channel of Foot; Taiyang Bladder Meridian of Foot
V005-N00514.pinyinNames: zu tai yang pang guang jing

V005-N00514.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00514.label: 足太阳膀胱经
V005-N00514.englishNames: bladder meridian (BL); foot greater yang bladder meridian; channel $ BL
V005-N00514.pinyinNames: zu tai yang pang guang jing

V005-N00514.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00514.label: 足太阳膀胱经
V005-N00514.aliases: 膀胱经； 膀胱足太阳之脉； 输脉； 足太阳
V005-N00514.englishNames: bladder meridian (BL); Bladder Meridian of Foot-Taiyang
V005-N00514.pinyinNames: zu tai yang pang guang jing
V005-N00514.definition: one of the twelve regular meridians which runs from jingming (BL1) at the medial canthus of the eye, ascends the forehead to the vertex and then enters the brain and exits at the nape of the neck where it divides into two parallel branches: the first

V005-N00515.label: 足三阴经
V005-N00515.definition: 足太阴脾经、足少阴肾经和足厥阴肝经的总称。

V005-N00515.label: 足三阴经
V005-N00515.englishNames: three yin channels of foot; three yin meridians of foot
V005-N00515.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00515.definition: 足太阴脾经、足少阴肾经和足厥阴肝经的合称。

V005-N00515.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00515.label: 足三阴经
V005-N00515.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00515.definition: The three foot-yin meridians are spleen meridian, kidney meridian and liver meridian.

V005-N00515.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00515.label: 足三阴经
V005-N00515.englishNames: three yin meridians of foot; three yin meridians/channels of foot; three yin channels of foot

V005-N00515.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00515.label: 足三阴经
V005-N00515.englishNames: three yang meridians of the foot
V005-N00515.definition: the meridians/channels running from the head through the back downward to the feet, namely, the stomach meridian, the bladder meridian and the gallbladder meridian

V005-N00515.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00515.label: 足三阴经
V005-N00515.aliases: 足之六阴； Three Yin Channels of Foot
V005-N00515.englishNames: three yin meridians of the foot; Three Yin Meridians of Foot
V005-N00515.definition: the meridians/channels running through the medial side of the lower limbs from the feet to the abdomen and chest, namely, the spleen meridian, the kidney meridian and the liver meridian

V005-N00516.label: 足太阴脾经
V005-N00516.path: 经络｜十二经脉｜足三阴经
V005-N00516.definition: 十二经脉之一。起于足大趾内侧端，属于脾，联络胃，止于舌根，散布舌下。

V005-N00516.label: 足太阴脾经
V005-N00516.englishNames: Taiyin Spleen Channel of Foot;Taiyin Spleen Meridian of Foot
V005-N00516.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00516.definition: 本经起于足大趾内侧端隐白穴，沿内侧赤白肉际上行,过内踝的前缘,沿小腿内侧正中线上行,在内踝上8寸处,交出足厥阴肝经之前，上行沿大腿内侧前缘,进入腹部，属脾,络胃。向上穿过膈肌,沿食道两旁，连舌本,散舌下。其分支从胃别出,上行通过膈肌,注入心中,经气于此与手少阴心经相接。

V005-N00516.label: 足太阴脾经
V005-N00516.path: 传统医学证候｜经络证｜十二正经证

V005-N00516.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00516.label: 足太阴脾经
V005-N00516.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00516.definition: The spleen meridian pertains to the spleen and connects with the stomach. It mainly travels along the anterior border of the medial aspect of the leg and passes through the chest and abdomen.

V005-N00516.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00516.label: 足太阴脾经
V005-N00516.englishNames: spleen meridian of foot taiyin; spleen meridian/channel of foot greater yin(SP); Taiyin Spleen Channel of Foot; Taiyin Spleen Meridian of Foot

V005-N00516.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00516.label: 足太阴脾经
V005-N00516.englishNames: spleen meridian (SP); foot greater yin spleen meridian; channel$ SP

V005-N00516.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00516.label: 足太阴脾经
V005-N00516.englishNames: spleen meridian (SP); foot greater yin spleen meridian; channel$ SP
V005-N00516.definition: one of the twelve regular meridians which runs from yinbai (SP1) at the medial side of the great toe, ascends along the medial side of the foot and tibia and anteromedial side of the thigh to the lower abdomen. It then enters the abdomen and connects

V005-N00517.label: 足厥阴肝经
V005-N00517.path: 经络｜十二经脉｜足三阴经
V005-N00517.definition: 十二经脉之一。起于足大趾背毫毛处，属于肝，联络胆，连目系，止于巅。

V005-N00517.label: 足厥阴肝经
V005-N00517.englishNames: Jueyin Liver Channel of Foot;Jueyin Liver Meridian of Foot
V005-N00517.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00517.definition: 本经起于足大趾爪甲后丛毛处，向上沿足背至内踝前1寸处，向上沿胫骨内缘，在内踝上8寸处交出足太阴脾经之后，上行过膝内侧，沿大腿内侧中线进入阴毛中，绕阴器，至小腹,夹胃两旁,属肝,络胆,向上穿过膈肌,分布于胁肋部。沿喉咙的后边，向上进入鼻咽部，上行连接目系，出于额，上行与督脉会于头顶部。其分支从肝分出，穿过膈肌，向上注入肺，经气由此处与手太阴肺经相接。

V005-N00517.label: 足厥阴肝经
V005-N00517.path: 传统医学证候｜经络证｜十二正经证

V005-N00517.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00517.label: 足厥阴肝经
V005-N00517.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00517.definition: The liver meridian pertains to the liver and connects with the gallbladder. It mainly travels along the medial aspect of the leg, passes over the chest and abdomen, and its divergent meridian reaches the vertex.

V005-N00517.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00517.label: 足厥阴肝经
V005-N00517.englishNames: liver meridian of foot jueyin; liver meridian/channel of foot reverting yin(LR); Jueyin Liver Channel of Foot; Jueyin Liver Meridian of Foot

V005-N00517.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00517.label: 足厥阴肝经
V005-N00517.englishNames: liver meridian (LR); foot reverting yin liver meridian; channel $ LR

V005-N00517.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00517.label: 足厥阴肝经
V005-N00517.aliases: 肝经； 肝足厥阴之脉； 足厥阴
V005-N00517.englishNames: liver meridian (LR); Liver Meridian of Foot-Jueyin
V005-N00517.definition: one of the twelve regular meridians which runs from dadun (LR1) on the medial aspect of the big toe just behind the nail, through the inner side of the lower limb, external genitalia and abdomen, to qimen (LR14), a point about 2 cun below the nipple.

V005-N00518.label: 足少阴肾经
V005-N00518.path: 经络｜十二经脉｜足三阴经
V005-N00518.definition: 十二经脉之一。起于足小趾之下，属于肾，联络膀胱，止于舌根两侧。

V005-N00518.label: 足少阴肾经
V005-N00518.englishNames: Shaoyin Kidney Channel of Foot;Shaoyin Kidney Meridian of Foot
V005-N00518.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00518.definition: 本经起于足小趾下,斜行于足心涌泉穴,出行于舟骨粗隆之下，沿内踝后,分出进入足跟,向上沿小腿内侧后缘,至腘内侧，上股内侧后缘入脊内,穿过脊柱,属肾,络膀胱。其直行主干从肾分出,上行,穿过肝和膈肌,进入肺,沿喉咙,到舌根两旁。其分支从肺中分出,络心，注于胸中,经气于此处与手厥阴心包经相接。

V005-N00518.label: 足少阴肾经
V005-N00518.path: 传统医学证候｜经络证｜十二正经证

V005-N00518.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00518.label: 足少阴肾经
V005-N00518.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00518.definition: The kidney meridian pertains to the kidney and connects with the urinary bladder. It mainly travels along the posterior border of the medial aspect of the leg and passes through the chest and abdomen, finally terminating at the root of the tongue.

V005-N00518.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00518.label: 足少阴肾经
V005-N00518.englishNames: kidney meridian of foot shaoyin; kidney meridian/channel of foot lesser yin(KI)

V005-N00518.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00518.label: 足少阴肾经
V005-N00518.englishNames: kidney meridian (KI); foot lesser yin kidney meridian; channel $ KL

V005-N00518.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00518.label: 足少阴肾经
V005-N00518.englishNames: kidney meridian (KI); foot lesser yin kidney meridian; channel $ KL
V005-N00518.definition: one of the twelve regular meridians which begins on the plantar tip of the small toe and travels to yongquan (KI1) in the center of the sole, continues along the medial side of the lower limb to the symphysis pubis, turns internally to the kidney and

V005-N00519.label: 十二经别
V005-N00519.definition: 十二经脉别行而离入出合，深入体腔的支脉。

V005-N00519.label: 经别
V005-N00519.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00519.definition: 十二经脉别行深入体腔，循行于胸腔、腹腔及头部的重要支脉，具有补充十二经脉内外循行联系，加强经脉所属络的脏腑在体腔深部之联系的功能。

V005-N00519.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00519.label: 十二经别
V005-N00519.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00519.definition: The twelve divergent meridians branch out from the twelve regular meridians and are deeper in the body. They function to strengthen the connection between internally-externally coupled meridians.

V005-N00519.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00519.label: 十二经别
V005-N00519.englishNames: twelve divergent meridians; twelve meridian/channel divergences

V005-N00519.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00519.label: 经别

V005-N00519.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00519.label: 十二经别
V005-N00519.englishNames: twelve meridian divergences; Branches of the Twelve Regular Channels; Collaterals of Twelve Meridians; the Branches of the Twelve Meridians; the Twelve Divergent Meridians; Twelve Meridian Divergences
V005-N00519.definition: the divergent passages of the twelve main meridians going deep in the body

V005-N00519.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00519.label: 经别
V005-N00519.definition: the divergent passage of a regular meridian going deep in the body

V005-N00520.label: 经筋
V005-N00520.definition: 人体经络系统中具有连属和运动作用的筋肉体系。皆从四肢末端走向头身，结聚于关节、骨骼部。

V005-N00520.label: 十二经筋
V005-N00520.definition: 十二经脉之气濡养筋肉骨节的体系，附属于十二经的筋肉系统。

V005-N00520.label: 经筋
V005-N00520.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00520.definition: 附属十二经脉的筋膜系统,是十二经脉之气濡养筋肉骨节的体系,具有约束骨骼,屈伸关节的功能。

V005-N00520.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00520.label: 十二经筋
V005-N00520.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00520.definition: The twelve muscle regions are corresponding sites where the qi and blood of the twelve meridians to nourish the muscles and tendons. Their distributions are almost the same as that of the twelve meridians.

V005-N00520.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00520.label: 十二经筋
V005-N00520.englishNames: tendons along twelve meridians; twelve meridian/channel sinews

V005-N00520.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00520.label: 经筋

V005-N00520.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00520.label: 十二经筋
V005-N00520.englishNames: twelve meridian sinews; Twelve Meridian Sinews
V005-N00520.definition: the sinew systems attributed to the twelve meridians

V005-N00520.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00520.label: 经筋
V005-N00520.definition: the sinew system attributed to a certain meridian/ channel

V005-N00521.label: 十二皮部
V005-N00521.definition: 十二经脉的功能活动反应于体表的部位，也是十二经脉在体表的划分区域。

V005-N00521.label: 皮部
V005-N00521.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00521.definition: 十二经脉及其所属络脉在体表的分区,经气布散之所在,具有保卫机体,抗御外邪的功能,并能反映十二经脉的病证。

V005-N00521.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00521.label: 十二皮部
V005-N00521.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00521.definition: The twelve cutaneous regions are corresponding sites where the qi and blood of the twelve meridians to nourish the skin. They are generally known as the outward manifestations of the twelve meridians and collaterals.

V005-N00521.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00521.label: 十二皮部
V005-N00521.englishNames: twelve skin regions; twelve cutaneous regions

V005-N00521.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00521.label: 皮部

V005-N00521.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00521.label: 十二皮部
V005-N00521.aliases: 六经皮部； 皮部； 皮有分部； Twelve Skin Areas
V005-N00521.englishNames: twelve cutaneous regions; Twelve Cutaneous Regions; Twelve Skin Areas
V005-N00521.definition: the regions of the skin reflecting the functional condition of the twelve meridians respectively

V005-N00521.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00521.label: 皮部
V005-N00521.definition: the region of the skin reflecting the functional condition of a certain meridian

V005-N00522.label: 奇经八脉
V005-N00522.definition: 督脉、任脉、冲脉、带脉、阴维脉、阳维脉、阴跷脉和阳跷脉的总称。

V005-N00522.label: 奇经八脉
V005-N00522.englishNames: Eight Extraordinary Channels;Eight Extraordinary Meridians nels;Eight Extraordinary Meridians
V005-N00522.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00522.definition: 督脉、任脉、冲脉、带脉、阴维脉、阳维脉、阴晓脉、阳晓脉的合称。

V005-N00522.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00522.label: 奇经八脉
V005-N00522.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00522.definition: The eight extraordinary meridians are different from the twelve regular meridians with special distributions and functions. They are Du meridian, Ren meridian, Chong meridian, Dai meridian, Yinwei meridian, Yangwei meridian, Yinqiao meridian and Yangqiao meridian.

V005-N00522.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00522.label: 奇经八脉
V005-N00522.englishNames: eight extra meridians; eight extra meridians/channels; Eight Extraordinary Channels; Eight Extraordinary Meridians

V005-N00522.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00522.label: 奇经八脉
V005-N00522.englishNames: eight extra meridians; Eight Extra Meridians
V005-N00522.definition: a collective term for governor vessel, conception vessel, thoroughfare vessel, belt vessel, yin heel vessel, yang heel vessel, yin link vessel, and yang link vessel

V005-N00523.label: 督脉
V005-N00523.definition: 奇经八脉之一。起于小腹内，下出会阴，向后行于脊内，入脑，上巅顶，止于唇。

V005-N00523.label: 督脉
V005-N00523.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00523.definition: 起于胞中，下出会阴，沿脊柱里边直向上行，至项后风府穴处进入颅内，络脑，并由项沿头部正中线，上行颠顶，沿前额正中，鼻柱正中,至上唇系带处。

V005-N00523.label: 督脉
V005-N00523.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜妇科学｜生理
V005-N00523.definition: 起于胞中，上行人脑，并主一身之阳经，下出会阴，沿脊柱里边直向上行，至项后风府穴处进人颅内，络脑，并由项沿头部正中线，上行颠顶，沿前额正中，鼻柱正中，至上唇系带处。起于季胁，斜向下行到带脉穴，五枢穴、维道穴，约束冲任督三脉，横行腰腹，绕身一周。

V005-N00523.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00523.label: 督脉
V005-N00523.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00523.definition: The Du meridian is mainly distributed over the head, face and along the midline of the back.

V005-N00523.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00523.label: 阳脉之海
V005-N00523.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00523.definition: The Du meridian governs meridian qi of all yang meridians and is therefore known as “the sea of yang meridians”.

V005-N00523.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00523.label: 督脉
V005-N00523.englishNames: governor vessel; governor vessel(GV); Governor Channel; Governor Vessel

V005-N00523.label: 督脉
V005-N00523.definition: one of the eight extra meridians which originates in the lower abdomen and exits at changqiang (GV1), a point at the back of the anus, sending one branch forward to huiyin (CV1). The main portion of the meridian/channel ascends along the midline of th

V005-N00524.label: 任脉
V005-N00524.definition: 奇经八脉之一。起于小腹内，下出会阴，沿腹上达咽喉，环绕口唇，止于目下。

V005-N00524.label: 任脉
V005-N00524.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00524.definition: 起于胞中,下出会阴,向上前行至阴毛部位，沿腹部和胸部正中线直上，经咽喉，至下颌，环绕口唇，沿面颊，分行至目眶下。

V005-N00524.label: 任脉
V005-N00524.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜妇科学｜生理
V005-N00524.definition: 起于胞中，主胞宫和妊娠，并主一身之阴经，下出会阴，向上前行至阴毛部位，沿腹部和胸部正中线直上，经咽喉，至下颌，环绕口唇，沿面颊，分行至目眶下。

V005-N00524.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00524.label: 任脉
V005-N00524.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00524.definition: The Ren meridian is mainly distributed over the neck, face and along the midline of the chest and abdomen.

V005-N00524.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00524.label: 阴脉之海
V005-N00524.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00524.definition: The Ren meridian governs meridian qi of all yin meridians and is therefore known as “the sea of yin meridians”.

V005-N00524.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00524.label: 任脉
V005-N00524.englishNames: conception vessel; conception vessel(CV); Conception Channel; Conception Vessel

V005-N00524.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00524.label: 任脉

V005-N00524.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00524.label: 任脉
V005-N00524.definition: one of the eight extra meridians which originates in the lower abdomen, exists at huiyin (CV1), a point in the center of perineum, and ascends the midline of the abdominal wall and chest to chengjiang (CV24), midpoint of the mentolabial sulcus. The i

V005-N00525.label: 冲脉
V005-N00525.definition: 经脉之海奇经八脉之一。起于小腹内，下出会阴，上行脊内，沿腹两侧，上达咽喉，环绕口唇而终。

V005-N00525.label: 冲脉
V005-N00525.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00525.definition: 起于胞中，下出会阴后,从气街部起与足少阴经相并,夹脐上行，散入胸中，上达咽喉，环绕口唇。

V005-N00525.label: 冲脉
V005-N00525.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜妇科学｜生理
V005-N00525.definition: 起于胞中，为月经之本，下出会阴后，从气街部起与足少阴经相并，夹脐上行，散入胸中，上达咽喉，环绕口唇。

V005-N00525.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00525.label: 冲脉
V005-N00525.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00525.definition: The Chong meridian is mainly distributed over the chest and face, inside the spine and along the first lateral line of the abdomen.

V005-N00525.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00525.label: 冲脉
V005-N00525.englishNames: thoroghfare vessel; thoroughfare vessel(TV); Chong Channel; Chong Vessel

V005-N00525.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00525.label: 冲脉
V005-N00525.definition: one of the eight extra meridians which originates in the lower abdomen, exits at the perineum, and comes into confluence with kidney meridian and then runs upward along the two sides of the abdomen to the chest

V005-N00527.label: 阴维脉
V005-N00527.definition: 奇经八脉之一。起于足跟内侧，沿大腿内侧上行至腹部，与足太阴经相合，过胸部与任脉会于颈部。

V005-N00527.label: 阴维脉
V005-N00527.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00527.definition: 起于小腿内侧足三阴经交会之处，沿下肢内侧上行，至腹部，与足太阴脾经同行，到胁部，与足厥阴经相合，然后上行至咽喉，合于任脉。

V005-N00527.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00527.label: 阴维脉
V005-N00527.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00527.definition: The Yinwei meridian is mainly distributed over the medial aspect of the leg and thigh and ascends along the third lateral line of the abdomen. It reaches the throat and meets with the Ren meridian at Tiantu (Ren 22) and Lianquan (Ren 23).

V005-N00527.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00527.label: 阴维脉
V005-N00527.englishNames: yin link vessel; yin link vessel(Yin LV); Yin Link Channel; Yin Link Vessel

V005-N00527.label: 阴维脉
V005-N00527.englishNames: yin link vessel; Yin Link Channel
V005-N00527.definition: one of the eight extra meridians which originates from the upper part of the inner ankle, running upward along the medial side of the lower limb, through the abdomen, chest and throat, terminating at the back of the neck

V005-N00528.label: 阳维脉
V005-N00528.definition: 奇经八脉之一。起于足跟外侧，上经外踝，沿足少阳经上行髋关节，经胁肋后侧，从腋后上肩，至前额，达项后，合于督脉。

V005-N00528.label: 阳维脉
V005-N00528.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜经络
V005-N00528.definition: 起于足跟外侧，向上经过外踝，与足少阳胆经并行，沿下肢外侧上行至髋部，经胁肋后侧，从腋后上肩，至前额，再到项后，合于督脉。

V005-N00528.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00528.label: 阳维脉
V005-N00528.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V005-N00528.definition: The Yangwei meridian is mainly distributed below the external malleolus, the lateral aspect of the leg, and over the subcostal area, shoulder and sides of the head. It meets with the Du meridian at Fengfu (Du 16) and Yamen (Du 15).

V005-N00528.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00528.label: 阳维脉
V005-N00528.englishNames: yang link vessel; Yang Link Channel
V005-N00528.definition: one of the eight extra meridians which originates from the lower part of the outer ankle running upward along the lateral side of the lower limb, through the side of the trunk, the shoulder, neck and terminating at the top of the head

V005-N00529.label: 阴跷脉
V005-N00529.definition: 奇经八脉之一。起于足跟内侧直上沿大腿内侧，过阴部，沿腹、胸内侧入锁骨上窝，经人迎，过鼻旁至目内眦。

V005-N00529.englishNames: yin heel vessel; yin heel vessel(Yin HV); Yin Heel Channel; Yin Heel Vessel

V005-N00529.englishNames: yin heel vessel; Yin Heel Channel
V005-N00529.definition: one of the eight extra meridians which originates from the medial side of the heel, running upward along the medial side of the lower limb, through the front external genitalia, the abdomen, chest, neck, either side of the nose and terminating in the

V005-N00530.label: 阳跷脉
V005-N00530.definition: 奇经八脉之一。起于足跟外侧，沿股外侧和胁后上肩，过颈挟口角，入目内眦再上行至额。

V005-N00530.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V005-N00531.label: 十五络脉
V005-N00531.definition: 十二经脉和任、督二脉各自别出之络与脾之大络的总称。

V005-N00531.definition: The fifteen collaterals include the collaterals of the twelve meridians, the collaterals of the Du and Ren meridian as well as the major collateral of the spleen.

V005-N00532.definition: 循行于人体浅表部位且常浮现的络脉。

V005-N00560.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜儿科学｜生理
V005-N00560.definition: 小儿阳气未盛的生理特点。

V005-N00561.label: 变蒸
V005-N00561.englishNames: changing steaming in infant; growing fever and perspiration
V005-N00561.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜气血津液精神
V005-N00561.definition: 婴儿在生长发育过程中，精神、形体出现阶段性的代谢旺盛的生理现象，如出现轻度身热、汗出等。

V005-N00563.definition: 研究病因的分类及各种病因的性质、致病特点、致病途径的理论。

V005-N00564.pinyinNames: biàn zhèng qiú yīn; bian zheng qiu yin
V005-N00564.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类

V005-N00564.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V005-N00565.label: 病起过用
V005-N00565.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00565.definition: 中医病因学的基本观点。认为四季六气与饮食营养本是人赖以生存的必备条件，七情本是人对生存环境的精神活动,劳逸作息本是人类生存和繁衍的行为方式，但是如果气候反常、饮食失调及人的各种活动过极，就成为导致疾病的根本原因。

V005-N00566.label: 三因学说
V005-N00566.englishNames: theory of three types of disease causes
V005-N00566.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00566.definition: 是宋代陈言关于中医病因分类的学说,六淫为外因;七情为内因;饮食所伤、劳倦过度、外伤、虫兽伤、溺水等为不内外因。

V005-N00566.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00566.label: 三因学说
V005-N00566.englishNames: Theory of three etiological categories; theory of three categories of disease cause; theory of three types of disease causes; theroy of three types of disease cause
V005-N00566.pinyinNames: sān yīn xué shuō; san yin xue shuo
V005-N00566.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00566.definition: A theory that classifies etiological factors into internal, external and neither internal nor external.

V005-N00567.definition: 内因、外因、不内外因的合称。现代中医学中很少用"不内外因"来归类,而将内因、外因之外的病因概括为“其他病因”。
