V005-N00567.label: 三因
V005-N00567.englishNames: three categories of disease cause; three causes
V005-N00567.definition: external cause, internal cause, and cause neither internal nor external － an ancient classification of causes of disease, also called three categories of causes of disease

V005-N00568.label: 内因
V005-N00568.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00568.definition: 三因学说中指喜、怒、忧、思、悲、恐、惊七情内伤过度。现将七情过极、劳倦损伤和饮食失调等能导致气机紊乱，脏腑受损的病因称为内伤病因。

V005-N00568.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00568.label: 内因
V005-N00568.definition: one of the three causes of disease, one that arises within the body, referring chiefly to the excessive emotional changes

V005-N00569.label: 外因
V005-N00569.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00569.definition: 三因学说中指外感风、寒、暑、湿、燥、火六淫病邪。现将六淫和各种疫病病邪统属外感病因;跌仆、虫兽伤、烧伤、冻伤等称为外伤病因。

V005-N00569.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00569.label: 外因
V005-N00569.definition: one of the three causes of disease, one that originates outside the body, referring chiefly to the six excesses and pestilential pathogens

V005-N00570.label: 不内外因
V005-N00570.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00570.definition: 三因学说中指饮食所伤、劳倦过度、外伤、虫兽所伤，以及溺水等多种致病因素。现代中医学中已很少用此分类法。

V005-N00570.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00570.label: 不内外因
V005-N00570.englishNames: Neither internal nor external etiological factors; cause neither internal nor external; non-endo-non-exogenous cause; non-endo-exogenous
V005-N00570.pinyinNames: bù nèi wài yīn; bu nei wai yin
V005-N00570.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00570.definition: Pathogenic factors that are not categorized as external or internal, such as improper diet, over-exertion, traumatic injuries, animal/insect bites, drowning etc.

V005-N00570.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00570.label: 不内外因
V005-N00570.englishNames: cause neither internal nor external; non-endo-non-exogenous cause; non-endo-exogenous

V005-N00571.label: 病因
V005-N00571.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论

V005-N00571.label: 病因
V005-N00571.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00571.definition: 导致人体发生疾病的原因。

V005-N00571.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00571.label: 病因
V005-N00571.englishNames: Causative factors; cause of disease; disease cause; pathogenic factors
V005-N00571.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类

V005-N00571.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00571.label: 病因

V005-N00571.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00571.label: 病因

V005-N00572.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00572.label: 外感病因
V005-N00572.englishNames: Exogenous etiological factors; cause of exogenous contraction
V005-N00572.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00572.definition: Pathogenic factors that attack the body through the skin, mouth and nose, including six pathogenic factors and epidemic qi.

V005-N00573.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00573.label: 内伤病因
V005-N00573.englishNames: cause of endogenous injury; Endogenous etiological factors
V005-N00573.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00573.definition: Internal dysfunctions due to extreme emotions, over-exertion, and improper diet.

V005-N00573.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00573.label: 内伤
V005-N00573.englishNames: internal damage; Internal Damage; endogenous injury

V005-N00573.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00573.label: 内伤
V005-N00573.englishNames: endogenous injury; internal damage; Internal Damage
V005-N00573.definition: any detrimental effect on visceral qi produced by intemperance of the seven emotions, overexertion and fatigue, improper diet and sexual overindulgence

V005-N00575.label: 邪气
V005-N00575.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因

V005-N00575.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00575.label: 邪气
V005-N00575.englishNames: pathogenic qi; Pathogenic Factors; Pathogenic qi
V005-N00575.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00575.definition: Opposite to healthy qi, it is a collective term for all pathogenic factors.

V005-N00575.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00575.label: 邪气

V005-N00575.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00575.label: 病邪
V005-N00575.definition: an agent causing disease, also called pathogenic factor or pathogenic qi

V005-N00576.label: 阳邪
V005-N00576.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因

V005-N00576.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00576.label: 阳邪
V005-N00576.englishNames: yang pathogen; Yang pathogens; pathogen attacking yang meridians/channels
V005-N00576.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00576.definition: Opposite to yin pathogens, refers to pathogenic factors of yang nature, such as wind, summer-heat or fire-heat.

V005-N00576.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00576.label: 阳邪
V005-N00576.englishNames: yang pathogen; pathogen attacking yang meridians/channels

V005-N00576.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00576.label: 阳邪

V005-N00577.label: 阴邪
V005-N00577.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因

V005-N00577.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00577.label: 阴邪
V005-N00577.englishNames: yin pathogen; pathogen attacking yin meridians/channels; Yin pathogens
V005-N00577.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00577.definition: Opposite to yang pathogens, refers to pathogenic factors of yin nature, such as cold or dampness.

V005-N00577.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00577.label: 阴邪
V005-N00577.englishNames: yin pathogen; pathogen attacking yin meridians/channels

V005-N00577.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00577.label: 阴邪

V005-N00578.label: 五邪
V005-N00578.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00578.definition: (1)邪在五脏;(2)中风、伤暑、伤寒、中湿、饮食劳倦五种病因；(3)根据五脏五行属性进行分类的实邪、虚邪、贼邪、微邪、正邪的合称。邪气从子脏传向母脏为实邪，从母脏传向子脏为虚邪，从所不胜传所胜为贼邪，从所胜传所不胜为微邪，感五行中同行之邪为正邪。

V005-N00578.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00578.label: 五邪
V005-N00578.englishNames: five pathogens; five categories of pathogen

V005-N00579.label: 虚邪
V005-N00579.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00579.definition: (1)体虚受邪;(2)从母脏传向子脏的邪气。

V005-N00579.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00579.label: 虚邪
V005-N00579.englishNames: Deficiency pathogens; deficiency-type pathogen; pathogen from mother-organ; deficient pathogen; pathogen attack in deficiency condition
V005-N00579.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00579.definition: Opposite to excess pathogens, it is a collective term for exogenous pathogenic factors that invade the body when the body is weak. Alternatively, it refers to pathogenic qi that transmits from the mother organ to the son organ.

V005-N00579.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00579.label: 虚邪
V005-N00579.englishNames: deficiency-type pathogen; pathogen from mother-organ; deficient pathogen; pathogen attack in deficiency condition

V005-N00580.label: 实邪
V005-N00580.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00580.definition: 亢盛的邪气，也指从子脏传向母脏的邪气。

V005-N00580.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00580.label: 实邪
V005-N00580.englishNames: excess pathogen; Excess pathogens; pathogen from child-organ; excessive pathogen
V005-N00580.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00580.definition: Opposite to deficiency pathogens, it is a collective term for pathogenic factors. Alternatively, it refers to pathogenic qi that transmits from the son organ to the mother organ.

V005-N00580.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00580.label: 实邪
V005-N00580.englishNames: excess pathogen; pathogen from child-organ; excessive pathogen

V005-N00581.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00581.label: 贼邪

V005-N00582.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00582.label: 微邪

V005-N00583.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00583.label: 正邪
V005-N00583.englishNames: healthy qi and pathogenic qi; regular pathogen; regular pathogen$healthy and pathogenic qi

V005-N00584.label: 时邪
V005-N00584.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00584.definition: 与四季气候相关的病邪，为各种季节性流行病病因的统称。

V005-N00584.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00584.label: 时邪
V005-N00584.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00584.definition: A collective term for epidemic, etiological factors associated with the four seasons.

V005-N00584.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00584.label: 时邪

V005-N00584.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00584.label: 时邪
V005-N00584.definition: a general designation for the pathogenic factors causing seasonal diseases

V005-N00585.label: 客邪
V005-N00585.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00585.definition: 从外而来，侵袭机体的邪气。

V005-N00585.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00585.label: 客邪
V005-N00585.englishNames: intruding pathogen; visiting pathogen; Exogenous pathogenic factors
V005-N00585.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00585.definition: External pathogenic factors that damage the human body.

V005-N00585.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00585.label: 客邪

V005-N00585.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00585.label: 外邪
V005-N00585.definition: any pathogen originating outside the body

V005-N00586.label: 外感
V005-N00586.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00586.definition: 六淫、疫之气等病邪侵犯人体，导致疾病的过程。

V005-N00586.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00586.label: 外感
V005-N00586.englishNames: external contraction; exogenous contraction; exogenous disease

V005-N00586.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00586.label: 外感
V005-N00586.definition: disease or morbid condition produced by any of the six excesses (external etiological factors) or other noxious factors, the same as exopathic disease

V005-N00587.label: 内伤
V005-N00587.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00587.definition: 七情过极、劳倦损伤、饮食失调等致病因素导致气机紊乱，脏腑受损而发病的过程。

V005-N00587.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00587.label: 内伤
V005-N00587.englishNames: internal damage; Internal Damage; endogenous injury

V005-N00587.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00587.label: 内伤
V005-N00587.englishNames: endogenous injury; internal damage; Internal Damage
V005-N00587.definition: any detrimental effect on visceral qi produced by intemperance of the seven emotions, overexertion and fatigue, improper diet and sexual overindulgence

V005-N00588.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00588.label: 合邪
V005-N00588.englishNames: combined pathogen; Combined pathogens; combined pathogens
V005-N00588.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00588.definition: Two or more external pathogenic factors invade the body. Alternatively, it means exogenous pathogenic factors triggering previously existing diseases.

V005-N00588.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00588.label: 合邪

V005-N00588.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00588.label: 合邪
V005-N00588.definition: any combination of more than one pathogen

V005-N00589.label: 六淫
V005-N00589.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00589.definition: 风、寒、暑、湿、燥、火六种外感病邪的合称。

V005-N00589.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00589.label: 六淫
V005-N00589.englishNames: Six pathogenic factors; six climatic exopathogens; six climatic influences; Six Climatic Exopathogens; six excesses
V005-N00589.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00589.definition: A collective term for six exogenous pathogenic factors: wind, cold, summer-heat, dampness, dryness and fire.

V005-N00589.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00589.label: 六淫
V005-N00589.englishNames: six climatic exopathogens; six climatic influences; Six Climatic Exopathogens; six excesses

V005-N00589.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00589.label: 六淫
V005-N00589.definition: a collective term for the six excessive or untimely climatic influences as external pathogenic factors: wind, cold, summerheat, dampness, dryness and fire, also the same as six climatic pathogenic factors

V005-N00590.label: 风邪
V005-N00590.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00590.definition: 具有轻扬开泄、善动不居、升发、向上、向外特性的邪气。

V005-N00590.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00590.label: 风邪
V005-N00590.englishNames: wind pathogen; Pathogenic wind; Pathogenic Wind
V005-N00590.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00590.definition: A pathogenic factor characterized by opening the skin pores, high mobility and upward/outward movement.

V005-N00590.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00590.label: 风

V005-N00590.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00590.label: 风
V005-N00590.definition: wind as a pathogenic factor characterized by its rapid movement, swift changes, and ascending and opening actions, also called pathogenic wind

V005-N00591.label: 风性开泄
V005-N00591.englishNames: wind pathogen being characterized by openingdispersing
V005-N00591.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00591.definition: 风邪致病常使人皮毛滕理疏泄而开张，表现为出汗、恶风等症。

V005-N00591.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00591.label: 风性开泄
V005-N00591.englishNames: wind pathogen being characterized by openingdispersing; wind attributing to opening and releasing; Wind opens and disperses
V005-N00591.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00591.definition: Wind loosens the interspace between skin/muscle fibers and opens the skin pores, resulting in sweating and aversion to wind.

V005-N00592.label: 风易伤阳位
V005-N00592.englishNames: wind being apt to attack yang portion of body
V005-N00592.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00592.definition: 风邪致病，常伤及人体的上部(头面)、阳经和肌表的致病特点。

V005-N00593.label: 风性主动
V005-N00593.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00593.definition: 风邪致病具有动摇不定的特点，常表现为眩晕、震颤、四肢抽搐、角弓反张、直视上吊等症。

V005-N00593.label: 风胜则动
V005-N00593.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00593.definition: 风邪侵袭，或肝风内动,出现头目肢体动摇、震颤等的病理变化。

V005-N00593.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00593.label: 风性主动
V005-N00593.englishNames: Wind causes movement; characteristic of wind being mobile; wind attributing to mobility
V005-N00593.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00593.definition: Wind is characterized by constant moving. It causes the limbs to tremble.

V005-N00593.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00593.label: 风胜则动

V005-N00595.label: 风为百病之长
V005-N00595.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00595.definition: 风邪常为外邪致病的先导，凡寒、湿、燥、热等病邪均可依附于风而侵犯人体。

V005-N00595.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00595.label: 风为百病之长
V005-N00595.aliases: 风为百病之首； Wind is the spearhead of a hundred diseases
V005-N00595.englishNames: wind being primary pathogen; wind being leading cause of diseases; Wind is the leading cause of diseases
V005-N00595.pinyinNames: fēng wéi bǎi bìng zhī zhǎng
V005-N00595.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00595.definition: Wind may cause a wide variety of conditions. It is the spearhead of exogenous pathogenic factors and liable to associate itself with cold, dampness, dryness and heat.

V005-N00596.label: 寒邪
V005-N00596.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00596.definition: 具有寒冷、凝滞、收引等特性的邪气

V005-N00596.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00596.label: 寒邪
V005-N00596.englishNames: Pathogenic cold; Pathogenic Cold; cold pathogen
V005-N00596.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00596.definition: A pathogenic factor characterized by coldness, stagnation, congealing and contraction.

V005-N00596.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00596.label: 寒

V005-N00596.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00596.label: 寒
V005-N00596.definition: cold as a pathogenic factor characterized by the damage to yang qi, deceleration of activity, congealing and contracting actions, also called pathogenic cold

V005-N00597.label: 寒易伤阳
V005-N00597.englishNames: cold pathogen being apt to attack yang
V005-N00597.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00597.definition: 寒邪致病易伤人阳气，常表现为恶寒、肢冷、心腹冷痛等症。

V005-N00597.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00597.label: 寒易伤阳
V005-N00597.englishNames: cold tending to injure yang; cold pathogen being apt to attack yang; Cold tends to impair yang
V005-N00597.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00597.definition: Cold is yin in nature and can easily impair yang qi.

V005-N00598.label: 寒性凝滞
V005-N00598.englishNames: cold having property of coagulation and stagnation
V005-N00598.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00598.definition: 寒邪致病可使人体气血运行不畅，经络不通，常表现为各种疼痛症状。

V005-N00598.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00598.label: 寒性凝滞
V005-N00598.englishNames: cold having property of coagulation and stagnation; Cold congeals and stagnates; cold attributing to congealing
V005-N00598.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00598.definition: Pathogenic cold causes qi/blood to stagnate, blocks meridians, and causes pain.

V005-N00599.label: 寒性收引
V005-N00599.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00599.definition: 寒邪致病易使人体气机收敛，滕理紧闭，脉络拘紧，筋肉挛急，常表现为无汗，肢体疼痛，活动不利等症。

V005-N00599.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00599.label: 寒性收引
V005-N00599.englishNames: cold having property of contraction; cold attributing to contraction; Cold causes contraction/contracture
V005-N00599.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00599.definition: Pathogenic cold constricts qi, blocks the skin pores, and causes contractions.

V005-N00599.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00599.label: 寒则气收

V005-N00600.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00600.label: 风寒

V005-N00600.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00600.label: 风寒
V005-N00600.definition: a combined pathogen of external wind and cold

V005-N00601.label: 暑邪
V005-N00601.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00601.definition: 夏至以后，立秋之前，具有炎热、升散等特性的邪气。

V005-N00601.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00601.label: 暑邪
V005-N00601.englishNames: summerheat pathogen; Pathogenic summer heat; Pathogenic Summer Heat
V005-N00601.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00601.definition: A pathogenic factor commonly seen between the summer solstice and beginning of autumn. It is characterized by flames ascending and dispersing.

V005-N00601.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00601.label: 暑
V005-N00601.definition: summerheat as a pathogenic factor, only occurring in summer, characterized by hotness and evaporation, also called pathogenic summerheat

V005-N00602.label: 暑性炎热
V005-N00602.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00602.definition: 暑为夏季火热之气所化，暑邪致病，多表现出一系列阳热症状。

V005-N00602.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00602.label: 暑性炎热
V005-N00602.englishNames: summer attributing to burning heat; characteristic of summerheat being scorchinghot; Summer heat causes flaming heat
V005-N00602.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00602.definition: Pathogenic summer heat is characterized by extreme hotness. Often causes hyperactive yang heat.

V005-N00603.label: 暑性升散
V005-N00603.englishNames: characteristic of summerheat being ascending and dispersive
V005-N00603.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00603.definition: 暑为阳邪，阳性升散,故暑邪致病，多直入气分，可致滕理开泄而多汗。

V005-N00603.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00603.label: 暑性升散
V005-N00603.englishNames: summerheat attributing to rise and dispersion; Summer heat ascends and disperses; characteristic of summerheat being ascending and dispersive
V005-N00603.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00603.definition: Summer heat ascends and disperses. Often directly affects the qi phase, opens the sweating pores and damages body fluids.

V005-N00604.label: 暑易夹湿
V005-N00604.englishNames: summerheat being likely to be mixed with dampness
V005-N00604.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00604.definition: 暑季常多雨潮湿，热蒸湿动，暑邪为病，常夹湿邪而侵袭人体。

V005-N00605.label: 暑易扰心
V005-N00605.englishNames: summerheat being likely to disturb heart
V005-N00605.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00605.definition: 暑邪致病，有易扰动心神的特点，常导致心烦不宁，甚则突然昏倒，不省人事。

V005-N00607.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00607.label: 风热
V005-N00607.definition: a combined pathogen of external wind and heat

V005-N00608.label: 湿邪
V005-N00608.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00608.definition: 具有易阻气机、重浊、黏滞、趋下等特性的邪气。

V005-N00608.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00608.label: 湿邪
V005-N00608.englishNames: Pathogenic dampness; dampness pathogen; Pathogenic Dampness
V005-N00608.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00608.definition: A pathogenic factor that obstructs the flow of qi. It is characterized by heaviness, turbidity, stickiness and downward flowing.

V005-N00608.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00608.label: 湿
V005-N00608.definition: dampness as a pathogenic factor characterized by its impediment to qi movement and its turbidity, heaviness, stickiness and downward flowing properties, also called pathogenic dampness

V005-N00609.label: 湿阻气机
V005-N00609.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00609.definition: 湿邪致病，留滞于脏腑经络，有阻遏气机的特点，易使气机升降失常,经络气血不畅。.

V005-N00609.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00609.label: 湿阻气机
V005-N00609.englishNames: Dampness obstructs qi movement; dampness hampering qi movement
V005-N00609.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00609.definition: Dampness is a tangible pathogenic factor and is easy to obstruct qi movement.

V005-N00611.label: 湿性重浊
V005-N00611.englishNames: characteristic of dampness being heavy and turbid
V005-N00611.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00611.definition: 湿邪致病，常表现出易导致肢体沉重及分泌物混浊的特点。

V005-N00611.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00611.label: 湿性重浊
V005-N00611.englishNames: characteristic of dampness being heavy and turbid; Dampness is heavy and turbid; dampness attributing to heaciness and turbidity
V005-N00611.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00611.definition: Pathogenic dampness is characterized by its heaviness and turbidity. The diseases caused by it may lead to heaviness of the body and turbidity of secretions and excrements.

V005-N00612.label: 湿性黏滞
V005-N00612.englishNames: characteristic of dampness being sticky and stagnant
V005-N00612.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00612.definition: 湿邪致病，常表现出分泌物黏稠、排出困难且病程缠绵难愈的特点。

V005-N00612.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00612.label: 湿性黏滞
V005-N00612.englishNames: Dampness is sticky and stagnant; dampness attributing to viscosity and stagnation; characteristic of dampness being sticky and stagnant
V005-N00612.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00612.definition: Dampness is characterized by stickiness and stagnation. It causes sticky, viscous secretions and discharges. Dampness-induced conditions often last a long time.

V005-N00613.label: 湿性趋下
V005-N00613.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00613.definition: 湿邪致病，具有以发生于人体下部病变为主的特点。

V005-N00613.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00613.label: 湿性趋下
V005-N00613.englishNames: dampness characterized by downward going; Dampness tends to descend; characteristic of dampness being descending
V005-N00613.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00613.definition: Dampness move downward and affects the yin and lower parts of the body.

V005-N00614.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00614.label: 风湿

V005-N00614.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00614.label: 风湿
V005-N00614.definition: dampness produced in the body due to yang deficiency of the spleen and kidney with decreased fluid transportation and transformation and resultant water stagnation

V005-N00614.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00614.label: 风湿
V005-N00614.definition: (1) a combined pathogen of external wind and dampness; (2) arthritis with soft tissue inflammation

V005-N00615.label: 燥邪
V005-N00615.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00615.definition: 具有易损伤肺脏，易耗伤津液等特点的邪气。

V005-N00615.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00615.label: 燥邪
V005-N00615.englishNames: Pathogenic Dryness; dryness pathogen; Pathogenic dryness
V005-N00615.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00615.definition: A pathogenic factor that consumes body fluids and tends to damage the lung.

V005-N00615.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00615.label: 燥
V005-N00615.definition: dryness as a pathogenic factor characterized by dryness and is apt to injure the lung and consume fluid, also called pathogenic dryness

V005-N00616.label: 燥性干涩
V005-N00616.englishNames: characteristic of dryness being dry and puckery
V005-N00616.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00616.definition: 燥邪具有易伤人津液,导致人体阴津亏虚的特点，致病易表现出口鼻干燥、咽干口渴、皮肤干涩等症。

V005-N00616.label: 燥胜则干
V005-N00616.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00616.definition: 燥性干涩，燥邪致病易伤人津液，导致各种干燥症状的病理变化。

V005-N00616.label: 燥性干涩
V005-N00616.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜皮肤科学｜病因病机
V005-N00616.definition: 燥邪具有易伤人津液，导致人体阴津亏虚的特点，致病易表现出口鼻干燥、咽干口渴、皮肤干涩等症。

V005-N00616.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00616.label: 燥性干涩
V005-N00616.englishNames: dryness being dry and puckery; Dryness tends to desiccate; dryness characterized by aridity and astringency
V005-N00616.pinyinNames: zao xing gan se; zào xìng gān sè
V005-N00616.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00616.definition: Dryness desiccates by consuming body fluids and causing body fluid deficiency and lack of moisture.

V005-N00616.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00616.label: 燥胜则干
V005-N00616.englishNames: domination of dryness causing dry symptoms

V005-N00617.label: 燥易伤肺
V005-N00617.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00617.definition: 燥邪一般多从口鼻、肌表侵袭人体，肺外合皮毛，开窍于鼻，主敷布津液，故燥邪最易伤肺。

V005-N00617.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00617.label: 燥易伤肺
V005-N00617.englishNames: dryness tending to injure lung; dryness likely to injure lung; Dryness easily damages the lung
V005-N00617.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00617.definition: Dryness invades the body through the nose, mouth and skin pores. It easily damages the lung fluids and impairs the dispersing of lung qi.

V005-N00618.label: 风燥
V005-N00618.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因

V005-N00618.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00618.label: 风燥

V005-N00618.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00618.label: 风燥
V005-N00618.definition: a combined pathogen of external wind and dryness

V005-N00620.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V005-N00620.label: 凉燥
V005-N00620.path: 第1部分：内科学｜热病｜秋燥［病］
V005-N00620.definition: 感受秋燥偏寒之邪，以初起头痛身热，恶寒无汗，鼻塞流涕，状类风寒，惟唇燥咽干，干咳连声，苔薄白而干，脉浮弦紧等为特征的秋燥病。

V005-N00620.label: 凉燥
V005-N00620.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00620.definition: 感受燥邪而偏兼寒邪者，与温燥相对而言。

V005-N00620.label: 凉燥
V005-N00620.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病
V005-N00620.definition: 感受秋燥偏寒之邪，以初起头痛身热，恶寒无汗，鼻塞流涕，状类风寒，惟唇燥咽干，干咳连声，苔薄白而干，脉浮弦紧等为常见症的秋燥证候。与温燥相对而言。

V005-N00620.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00620.label: 凉燥病
V005-N00620.pinyinNames: liang zao bing; liáng zào bìng
V005-N00620.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V005-N00620.definition: A condition characterized by fever, chills, headache, absence of sweating, unproductive cough or difficulty expectoration of sputum, and a dry throat and lips. Often occurs in autumn when cool dryness affects the lung and consumes bodily fluids.

V005-N00620.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00620.label: 凉燥

V005-N00620.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00620.label: 凉燥
V005-N00620.definition: the pathogenic factor that causes cool dryness pattern/syndrome

V005-N00621.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V005-N00621.label: 温燥
V005-N00621.path: 第1部分：内科学｜热病｜秋燥［病］
V005-N00621.definition: 感受秋燥偏热之邪，以初起身热头痛，干咳无痰，即或有小量咯痰亦黏腻不爽，气逆而喘，咽喉干痛，鼻干唇燥，心烦口渴，舌边尖红，苔薄白而燥等为特征的秋燥病。

V005-N00621.label: 温燥
V005-N00621.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00621.definition: 感受燥邪而偏兼热邪者，与凉燥相对而言。

V005-N00621.label: 温燥
V005-N00621.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病
V005-N00621.definition: 感受秋燥偏热之邪，以初起身热头痛，干咳无痰，即或有小量咯痰亦黏腻不爽，气逆而喘，咽喉干痛，鼻干唇燥，心烦口渴，舌边尖红，苔薄白而燥等为常见症的秋燥证候。与凉燥相对而言。

V005-N00621.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00621.label: 温燥

V005-N00621.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00621.label: 温燥
V005-N00621.definition: the pathogenic factor that causes warm dryness pattern/syndrome

V005-N00622.label: 火邪
V005-N00622.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00622.definition: 具有炎上、易伤津耗气、生风动血，且易扰动心神特点的邪气。

V005-N00622.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00622.label: 火邪
V005-N00622.englishNames: fire pathogen; Pathogenic fire; Pathogenic Fire
V005-N00622.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00622.definition: A pathogenic factor that flames upward, consumes qi and body fluids, engenders wind, stirs blood, and harasses the heart spirit.

V005-N00622.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00622.label: 火邪

V005-N00622.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00622.label: 火
V005-N00622.definition: fire as a pathogenic factor characterized by intense heat that is apt to injure fluid, consume qi, engender wind, inducing bleeding, and disturb the mental activities, also called pathogenic fire

V005-N00623.label: 热邪
V005-N00623.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00623.definition: 又称"温邪”。易导致阳热性病证的邪气的统称,与火邪没有本质区别，常火热并称。

V005-N00623.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00623.label: 热邪
V005-N00623.aliases: 温邪； Heat Pathogen； 火热
V005-N00623.englishNames: heat pathogen; Pathogenic Heat; Pathogenic heat
V005-N00623.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00623.definition: A pathogenic factor that causes excessive pathological changes of hot and yang nature.

V005-N00623.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00623.label: 热
V005-N00623.definition: heat as a pathogenic factor that causes heat pattern/ syndrome, also called pathogenic heat

V005-N00624.label: 热邪
V005-N00624.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00624.definition: 又称"温邪”。易导致阳热性病证的邪气的统称,与火邪没有本质区别，常火热并称。

V005-N00624.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00624.label: 温邪
V005-N00624.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00624.definition: A collective term for pathogenic warm heat, including spring warmth, wind warmth, summer heat warmth, damp warmth, autumn dryness, winter warmth, pestilence warmth, warm toxin, warm malaria, etc.

V005-N00624.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00624.label: 热邪
V005-N00624.aliases: 温邪； Heat Pathogen； 火热
V005-N00624.englishNames: heat pathogen; Pathogenic Heat; Pathogenic heat
V005-N00624.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00624.definition: A pathogenic factor that causes excessive pathological changes of hot and yang nature.

V005-N00624.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00624.label: 温邪
V005-N00624.definition: a collective term for various pathogens causing acute febrile diseases

V005-N00625.label: 火性炎上
V005-N00625.englishNames: characteristic of fire being flaring up
V005-N00625.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00625.definition: 火邪致病具有炎热及向上趋势的特点。

V005-N00625.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00625.label: 火性炎上
V005-N00625.englishNames: characteristic of fire being flaring up; fire characterized by flaming; Fire flames upward
V005-N00625.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00625.definition: The nature of pathogenic fire flames upward. It causes heat symptoms and often affects the upper part of the body.

V005-N00626.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00626.label: 火易生风
V005-N00626.englishNames: fire tending to cause wind; Fire tends to generate wind
V005-N00626.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00626.definition: Fire tends to stir liver wind. Extreme heat can cause stirring of wind.

V005-N00627.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00627.label: 火易动血
V005-N00627.englishNames: fire tending to cause bleeding; Fire tends to cause bleeding
V005-N00627.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00627.definition: Since fire may burn the vessels and collaterals and cause the blood to move recklessly, it often results in bleeding or macular eruption.

V005-N00629.label: 火易扰心
V005-N00629.englishNames: fire being likely to disturb heart
V005-N00629.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00629.definition: 火性炎上，火邪致病有易扰乱神明的特点，常出现心烦失眠,狂躁妄动，神昏谵言等症。

V005-N00630.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00630.label: 疠气
V005-N00630.englishNames: Pestilence qi; pestilent qi; pestilential qi
V005-N00630.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00630.definition: A collective term for exogenous pathogenic factors with high contagiousness.

V005-N00630.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00630.label: 时行戾气

V005-N00630.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00630.label: 疠气

V005-N00630.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00630.label: 时行戾气
V005-N00630.definition: pathogen that cause an epidemic infectious diseases, also called pestilential qi

V005-N00631.label: 瘟毒
V005-N00631.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00631.definition: 瘟疫病邪中具有毒性者，即兼有易在皮肉组织蕴郁的特点，致病可兼见局部病变，如大头瘟之类。

V005-N00631.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V005-N00631.label: 温毒
V005-N00631.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜影响因素｜兼杂疾病因素

V005-N00631.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00631.label: 瘟毒
V005-N00631.aliases: 温毒； 温毒发斑； 瘟毒发斑； Pestilence eruptions
V005-N00631.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V005-N00631.definition: Characterized by high fever, headache, and presence of maculae or sores/ulcers. In severe cases, clouding of consciousness may be present. This condition often occurs when pestilence toxin enters the bloodstream with lice/fleas to damage the Ying nutrients or disturb the heart mind.

V005-N00631.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00631.label: 温毒

V005-N00632.label: 疟邪
V005-N00632.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因

V005-N00632.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00632.label: 疟邪

V005-N00633.label: 麻毒
V005-N00633.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因

V005-N00633.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00633.label: 麻毒
V005-N00633.englishNames: measles toxin; toxic pathogen causing measles

V005-N00633.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00633.label: 麻毒

V005-N00634.label: 瘴气
V005-N00634.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00634.definition: 中国南方山林荒野特有的病邪之统称，包括疟邪等。

V005-N00634.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00634.label: 瘴毒

V005-N00634.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00634.label: 瘴毒
V005-N00634.definition: noxious mountainous vapor alleged to be the cause of certain kinds of malaria, also known as miasma

V005-N00636.label: 七情所伤
V005-N00636.englishNames: damaged by excess of seven emotions
V005-N00636.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00636.definition: 喜、怒、忧、思、悲、恐、惊七种情志变化过于强烈、持久或突然，引起脏腑气机紊乱，功能失调而致病。

V005-N00636.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00636.label: 七情内伤
V005-N00636.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00636.definition: A collective term for damage caused by extreme emotions including joy, anger, anxiety, overthinking, grief, fear and fright.

V005-N00637.label: 大怒伤肝
V005-N00637.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00637.definition: 过度愤怒可使肝气横逆上冲,血随气逆，并走于上，而致气急上逆，面红目赤，或呕血，甚则昏厥等症。

V005-N00638.label: 怒则气上
V005-N00638.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00638.definition: 过度愤怒,可使肝气疏泄失常，过于升发而上逆,甚则血随气逆于上的病理变化。

V005-N00638.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00638.label: 怒则气上
V005-N00638.englishNames: Anger causes the qi to rise
V005-N00638.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜情志疗法
V005-N00638.definition: Rage and persistent anger cause disorderly ascending of the qi.

V005-N00638.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00638.label: 怒则气上
V005-N00638.englishNames: rage leading to qi ascending; rage causing qi rising

V005-N00639.label: 暴喜伤心
V005-N00639.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00639.definition: 暴喜过度，可伤心神，使心气涣散,神不守舍，而致精神涣散，甚则失神狂乱等症。

V005-N00640.label: 喜则气缓
V005-N00640.englishNames: excessive joy leading to qi loose
V005-N00640.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00640.definition: 暴喜过度，可导致心气弛缓，精神涣散的病理变化。

V005-N00640.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00640.label: 喜则气缓
V005-N00640.englishNames: Joy causes the qi to slack
V005-N00640.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜情志疗法
V005-N00640.definition: Excess joy and/or euphoria cause qi to move too slowly and the qi movement becomes sluggish.

V005-N00640.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00640.label: 喜则气缓
V005-N00640.englishNames: over-joy leading to qi sluggishness; over-joy causing qi to slacken; excessive joy leading to qi loose

V005-N00641.label: 思虑伤脾
V005-N00641.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00641.definition: 思虑劳神过度可伤神损脾，使脾气郁结，运化失职，而致纳呆、腹胀、便溏等症。

V005-N00642.label: 思则气结
V005-N00642.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00642.definition: 思虑过度，劳神损脾,而致气机郁结，阻滞脾胃运化功能的病理变化。

V005-N00642.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00642.label: 思则气结
V005-N00642.englishNames: pensiveness leading to qi knotting; pensiveness leading to qi stagnation; pensiveness causing qi stagnation

V005-N00643.label: 悲忧伤肺
V005-N00643.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00643.definition: 过度悲忧可使肺气抑郁，意志消沉，肺气耗伤，而致气短乏力等症。

V005-N00644.label: 悲则气消
V005-N00644.englishNames: excessive sorrow leading to qi consumption
V005-N00644.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00644.definition: 过度悲忧,使肺气抑郁不伸，气郁化热，耗气伤精的病理变化。

V005-N00644.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00644.label: 悲则气消
V005-N00644.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜情志疗法
V005-N00644.definition: Excess sorrow and grief weaken the qi.

V005-N00644.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00644.label: 悲则气消
V005-N00644.englishNames: excessive sorrow leading to qi consumption; grief leading to qi consumption; sorrow causing qi consumption

V005-N00645.label: 惊恐伤肾
V005-N00645.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00645.definition: 过度惊恐可使肾气不固,气泄于下，而致二便失禁，惊慌失措等症。

V005-N00646.label: 恐则气下
V005-N00646.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00646.definition: 恐惧过度，伤损肾气，气虚下陷，肾关不固，导致二便失禁的病理变化。

V005-N00646.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00646.label: 恐则气下
V005-N00646.englishNames: Fear causes the qi to descend
V005-N00646.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜情志疗法
V005-N00646.definition: Excess fear or an ongoing state of fearfulness causes qi to strongly descend.

V005-N00646.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00646.label: 恐则气下
V005-N00646.englishNames: terror leading to qi sinking; fear causing qi sinking; fear leading to qi sinking

V005-N00647.label: 惊则气乱
V005-N00647.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00647.definition: 大惊则气机紊乱,气血失调,使心无所倚，神无所归，导致心神不安，甚则精神错乱的病理变化。

V005-N00647.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00647.label: 惊则气乱
V005-N00647.englishNames: Fright causes the qi to become chaotic
V005-N00647.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜情志疗法
V005-N00647.definition: Sudden shock and fright disrupt the qi activity and causes qi movements to become confused and disorderly.

V005-N00647.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00647.label: 惊则气乱
V005-N00647.englishNames: fright causing disorder of qi; fright leading to qi turbulence

V005-N00648.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00648.label: 饮食失宜
V005-N00648.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00648.definition: Diet harmful to health, including unhealthy dietary habits, ingestion of contaminated food, dietary preference, etc.

V005-N00649.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V005-N00649.label: 饮食不节
V005-N00649.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜影响因素｜饮食因素

V005-N00649.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00649.label: 饮食不节
V005-N00649.englishNames: irregular eating; Improper Diet; Dietary irregularities; dietary irregularities
V005-N00649.pinyinNames: yin shi bu jie; yǐn shí bù jié
V005-N00649.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00649.definition: Improper diet, including excessive hunger and binge eating.

V005-N00649.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00649.label: 饮食不节
V005-N00649.englishNames: irregular eating; dietary irregularities; Improper Diet
V005-N00649.definition: diet harmful to health, including ingestion of raw, cold or contaminated food, voracious eating or excessive hunger, predilection for a special food, alcohol addiction, etc.

V005-N00650.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V005-N00650.label: 饮食不洁
V005-N00650.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜影响因素｜饮食因素

V005-N00650.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00650.label: 饮食不洁
V005-N00650.englishNames: contaminated food; Consumption of unclean food
V005-N00650.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00650.definition: Intake of contaminated or poisonous food.

V005-N00651.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00651.label: 饮食偏嗜
V005-N00651.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00651.definition: Excessive indulgence in specific food, including cold or hot food, certain flavours or alcohol.

V005-N00652.label: 膏粱厚味
V005-N00652.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00652.definition: 油腻或味道浓厚的食物。长期多食此类食物，不但损伤脾胃，还易发生痰热和疮疡等病证。

V005-N00653.label: 五味偏嗜
V005-N00653.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00653.definition: 长期偏好酸、甜、咸、苦、辛辣等食味而损害脏腑。现也包括偏食某种单一食物，以及饮食过寒、过热等饮食不合理的致病因素。

V005-N00653.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00653.label: 五味偏嗜
V005-N00653.englishNames: five-flavor preference; Flavour preference; flavor predilection
V005-N00653.pinyinNames: wǔ wèi piān shì; wu wei pian shi
V005-N00653.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00653.definition: The five flavours are spicy, sweet, sour, bitter and salty. Habitual preference for a particular flavour or taste may bring about adverse reactions or damage the five zang organs.

V005-N00653.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00653.label: 五味偏嗜

V005-N00653.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00653.label: 五味偏嗜
V005-N00653.definition: habitual preference for a particular flavor or taste that may give rise to disease, the same as flavor craving/ preference

V005-N00654.label: 酒客
V005-N00654.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因

V005-N00654.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00654.label: 酒客

V005-N00656.label: 湿家
V005-N00656.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因

V005-N00656.vocabName: T/CIATCM 104-2023（表14-表27）张仲景经方术语代码表
V005-N00656.label: 湿家

V005-N00656.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00656.label: 湿家
V005-N00656.englishNames: person suffering from dampness; patient with dampness

V005-N00657.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00657.label: 劳逸失度
V005-N00657.englishNames: maladjustment between work and rest; Work–rest imbalance
V005-N00657.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00657.definition: A collective term for over-exertion and physical inactivity.

V005-N00658.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00658.label: 过劳
V005-N00658.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00658.definition: Overwork can be physical, mental or sexual.

V005-N00659.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00659.label: 劳力过度
V005-N00659.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00659.definition: Excessive physical activities damage the zang–fu organs and cause qi deficiency of the zang organs.

V005-N00660.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00660.label: 劳神过度
V005-N00660.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00660.definition: Excessive mental activities tend to damage heart blood and spleen qi.

V005-N00661.label: 房劳
V005-N00661.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00661.definition: 性生活过度，可使肾之精气亏耗，成为致病因素。

V005-N00661.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V005-N00661.label: 房劳
V005-N00661.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜影响因素｜行为因素

V005-N00661.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00661.label: 房劳过度
V005-N00661.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00661.definition: Excessive sexual activities consume and damage kidney essence.

V005-N00661.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00661.label: 房劳

V005-N00662.label: 失精家
V005-N00662.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因

V005-N00662.vocabName: T/CIATCM 104-2023（表14-表27）张仲景经方术语代码表
V005-N00662.label: 失精家

V005-N00662.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00662.label: 失精家
V005-N00662.englishNames: patient with frequent seminal loss; person suffering from seminal loss

V005-N00663.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00663.label: 过逸
V005-N00663.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00663.definition: Physical inactivity leads to imbalances in the flow of qi and blood, weak tendons and bones, stagnant qi of the spleen and stomach. In severe cases, it may even cause other secondary diseases.

V005-N00664.label: 五劳
V005-N00664.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00664.definition: 久视、久卧、久坐、久立、久行五种过度劳累而致病的因素的合称。

V005-N00664.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00664.label: 五劳
V005-N00664.englishNames: Five exhaustions; five kinds of overstrain; five consumptions; five kinds of strain; five kinds of consuptive diseases
V005-N00664.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00664.definition: The five exhaustions are listed as follows: Long-time observation damages blood; long-time lying damages qi; long-time sitting damages muscles; long-time standing damages bones; and long-time walking damages sinews. Alternatively, the five overstrains refer to deficiencies of the five zang organs (i.e. liver, heart, spleen, lung and kidney).

V005-N00664.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00664.label: 五劳
V005-N00664.englishNames: five kinds of overstrain; five consumptions; five kinds of strain; five kinds of consuptive diseases

V005-N00665.label: 七伤
V005-N00665.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病因
V005-N00665.definition: 食伤、忧伤、饮伤、房室伤、饥伤、劳伤、经络营卫气伤的合称。

V005-N00665.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00665.label: 七伤
V005-N00665.englishNames: seven damages; Seven damages; seven injuries
V005-N00665.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V005-N00665.definition: Refers to the seven pathogenic factors that lead to deficiency and consumption, including improper diet, anxiety, drink, sex, hunger, over-exertion, and damage to meridians, collaterals, Ying-nutrients, Wei-defense and qi.

V005-N00665.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V005-N00699.label: 实

V005-N00699.definition: 与虚相对而言，指邪气亢盛，以邪气盛为矛盾主要方面的病理反应，表现为正气与邪气均较强盛，正邪相搏,斗争剧烈，反应明显，可见各种亢盛有余的证候。

V005-N00699.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00699.definition: Opposite to deficiency, it is a hyperactive pathological state due to a fierce struggle between excessive pathogenic factors and normal healthy qi.

V005-N00702.definition: 指正气不足，以正气虚损为矛盾主要方面的病理反应，表现为机体的精、气、血、津液亏少和功能衰弱，脏腑经络的功能低下，抗病能力减退，可见各种虚弱不足的证候。

V005-N00702.definition: Opposite to excess, it is a hypoactive pathological state due to the struggle between weak healthy qi and mild/moderate pathogenic factors.

This includes excessive yin rejecting yang and excessive yang rejecting yin.

V005-N00750.label: 寒热错杂
V005-N00750.definition: a pathological change that causes complicated heat and cold conditions such as heat in the upper body with cold in the lower body, and cold in the exterior and heat in the interior

V005-N00753.definition: 由于阴阳格拒而致与疾病本质相反的寒热表现,包括真寒假热、真热假寒等。

V005-N00753.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00753.label: 寒热真假
V005-N00753.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜辨证方法类
V005-N00753.definition: Refers to how extreme cold or heat may cause false symptoms in critical conditions, such as extreme cold manifesting as heat or extreme heat manifesting as cold.

V005-N00754.label: 真热假寒
V005-N00754.englishNames: true heat disease with false cold manifestation
V005-N00754.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00754.definition: 内热炽盛而外见寒象的病理变化。

V005-N00754.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00754.label: 真热假寒
V005-N00754.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜辨证方法类
V005-N00754.definition: A yang pattern with apparent yin symptoms. These include aversion to cold but no desire for more clothes or blanket; cold hands and feet but a burning sensation in the chest and abdomen; and watery diarrhoea with dry or strong-smelling stools. The pulse is deep but wiry, slippery and forceful upon pressure. In addition, excessive thirst, a dry mouth, a foul breath, a dry, white tongue coating, and yellow urine may be present. Often occurs when pathogenic factors enter the interior to transform into heat and causes yang excess to reject yin.

V005-N00754.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00754.label: 真热假寒
V005-N00754.englishNames: true heat with false cold; true heat disease with false cold manifestation

V005-N00754.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00754.label: 真热假寒
V005-N00754.definition: a pathological change marked by excessive heat in the interior with pseudo-cold manifestations

V005-N00755.label: 真寒假热
V005-N00755.englishNames: true cold disease with false heat manifestation
V005-N00755.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00755.definition: 阴寒内盛而外见热象的病理变化。

V005-N00755.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00755.label: 真寒假热
V005-N00755.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜辨证方法类
V005-N00755.definition: A yin pattern with apparent yang symptoms. These include fever but prefer more clothes or blanket; thirst but no desire to drink water; and restless hands and feet but mental tranquillity. The tongue coating is black but slippery and moist. The pulse is large and surging, but weak upon pressure. It is commonly seen in people with constitutional deficiency cold coupled with contraction of external pathogens or floating of deficiency yang (interior cold rejecting yang) due to over-exertion or dysfunctions of the zang–fu organs.

V005-N00755.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00755.label: 真寒假热
V005-N00755.englishNames: true cold with false heat; true cold disease with false heat manifestation

V005-N00787.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00787.definition: Stagnant movement of qi. It is often associated with emotions and disorder of qi and blood. Often refers to liver qi stagnation.

V005-N00787.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00787.label: 气郁

V005-N00787.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00787.label: 气机郁滞
V005-N00787.definition: depressed and stagnant flow of qi that causes dysfunction of internal organs and meridians/ channels, the same as qi stagnation

V005-N00788.label: 气郁化火
V005-N00788.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00788.definition: 气郁日久，化生火热而气火并存的病理变化。

V005-N00788.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00788.label: 气郁化火
V005-N00788.englishNames: transformation of qi depression into fire; stagnant qi transforming into fire; Qi stagnation transforming into fire; qi depression transforming into fire
V005-N00788.pinyinNames: qì yù huà huǒ; qi yu hua huo
V005-N00788.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00788.definition: A pathological state of prolonged qi stagnation transforming into fire heat.

V005-N00788.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00788.label: 气郁化火
V005-N00788.englishNames: transformation of qi depression into fire; qi depression transforming into fire

V005-N00788.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00788.label: 气郁化火
V005-N00788.definition: a pathological change of long-standing stagnation of qi that transforms into fire

V005-N00789.label: 气滞
V005-N00789.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00789.definition: 气运行不畅而停滞的病理变化。

V005-N00789.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00789.label: 气滞
V005-N00789.englishNames: qi stagnation; Qi impediment; qi stegnation
V005-N00789.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00789.definition: A pathological state in which the movement of qi is inhibited.

V005-N00789.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00789.label: 气滞

V005-N00789.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00789.label: 气滞
V005-N00789.definition: a pathological change characterized by impeded circulation of qi that leads to stagnation of qi movement and functional disorder of organs, manifested as distention or pain in the affected part

V005-N00791.label: 血虚
V005-N00791.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00791.definition: 血液亏虚，血的营养和滋润功能减退，以致脏腑百脉、形体器官失养的病理变化。

V005-N00791.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00791.label: 血虚
V005-N00791.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00791.definition: A pathological state in which deficient blood fails to nourish the zang–fu organs and meridians/channels.

V005-N00791.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00791.label: 血虚

V005-N00791.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00791.label: 血虚
V005-N00791.definition: any pathological change characterized by deficiency of blood which fails to nourish organs, tissues and meridians/channels

V005-N00792.label: 血瘀
V005-N00792.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00792.definition: 由于气滞、气虚、血虚、外伤、阴寒内盛等各种原因,导致血液郁滞于一定部位的病理变化。

V005-N00792.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00792.label: 血瘀
V005-N00792.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00792.definition: A pathological state of slow, coagulated or stagnant circulation of blood.

V005-N00792.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00792.label: 血瘀

V005-N00792.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00792.label: 血瘀
V005-N00792.definition: a morbid state of blood stagnancy in a certain area of the body caused by sluggish flow of qi, deficiency of qi or blood, trauma, or yin-cold

V005-N00793.label: 血寒
V005-N00793.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00793.definition: 外感寒邪,寒入血分，或阳虚不能温煦血脉，而使血行凝涩不畅的病理变化。

V005-N00793.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00793.label: 血寒
V005-N00793.englishNames: Blood cold; blood cold; cold in blood
V005-N00793.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00793.definition: A pathological state in which cold enters the blood phase and causes the blood to stagnate or coagulate.

V005-N00793.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00793.label: 血寒

V005-N00793.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00793.label: 血寒
V005-N00793.definition: a pathological change in which cold either externally contracted or originated from yang deficiency, entering the blood aspect, causes qi stagnation or blood stasis by its congealing effect

V005-N00794.label: 血热
V005-N00794.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00794.definition: 外感热邪,热入血分，血受热邪所迫而妄行，导致出血、发痴等的病理变化。

V005-N00794.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00794.label: 血热
V005-N00794.englishNames: blood heat; heat in blood; Blood heat
V005-N00794.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00794.definition: A pathological state in which heat enters the blood phase and causes the blood to move recklessly.

V005-N00794.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00794.label: 血热
V005-N00794.definition: a pathological change in which exuberant heat or fire enters the blood, usually causing hemorrhage

V005-N00796.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00796.label: 血不归经
V005-N00796.englishNames: Blood failing to flow within the vessels; blood flow outside channels; blood failing to stay in the meridians
V005-N00796.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00796.definition: A pathological state in which blood moves recklessly out of the vessels.

V005-N00796.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00796.label: 血不归经
V005-N00796.englishNames: blood failing to stay in the meridians
V005-N00796.definition: a pathological change that causes extravasation of blood

V005-N00797.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00797.label: 血不养筋
V005-N00797.englishNames: Blood failing to nourish the sinews; failure of blood to nourish tendons
V005-N00797.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00797.definition: A pathological state in which liver blood fails to nourish the sinews and causes muscle/tendon spasm.

V005-N00798.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00798.label: 气血两虚
V005-N00798.englishNames: Dual deficiency of qi and blood; deficiency of both qi and blood; dual deficiency of qi and blood
V005-N00798.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00798.definition: A pathological state of malnourishment of the body or weakened bodily function due to simultaneous presence of qi deficiency and blood deficiency.

V005-N00798.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00798.label: 气血两虚
V005-N00798.englishNames: dual deficiency of qi and blood
V005-N00798.definition: simultaneous presence of qi deficiency and blood deficiency

V005-N00799.label: 气滞血瘀
V005-N00799.englishNames: stagnation of qi and blood stasis
V005-N00799.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00799.definition: 气机运行不畅，以致血液运行障碍，形成气滞与血瘀并存的病理变化。

V005-N00799.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00799.label: 气滞血瘀
V005-N00799.englishNames: qi stagntion and blood stasis; qi stagnation and blood stasis; blood stasis due to qi stagnation; Blood stasis due to qi stagnation; stagnation of qi and blood stasis
V005-N00799.pinyinNames: qi zhi xue yu; qì zhì xuè yū
V005-N00799.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00799.definition: A pathological state in which stagnant qi affects the circulation of blood and causes simultaneous presence of qi stagnation and blood stasis.

V005-N00799.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00799.label: 气滞血瘀
V005-N00799.englishNames: qi stagnation and blood stasis; qi stagntion and blood stasis; stagnation of qi and blood stasis

V005-N00799.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00799.label: 气滞血瘀
V005-N00799.englishNames: blood stasis due to qi stagnation
V005-N00799.definition: a pathological change in which a long-standing or severe stagnation of qi impedes the flow of blood, a condition characterized by coexistence of qi stagnation and blood stasis

V005-N00800.label: 气虚血瘀
V005-N00800.englishNames: blood stasis due to qi deficiency
V005-N00800.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00800.definition: 气虚推动无力而导致血瘀，形成气虚与血瘀并存的病理变化。

V005-N00800.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00800.label: 气虚血瘀
V005-N00800.englishNames: Blood stasis due to qi deficiency; qi deficiency with blood stasis; qi deficiency and blood stasis; blood stasis due to qi deficiency
V005-N00800.pinyinNames: qì xū xuè yū; qi xu xue yu
V005-N00800.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00800.definition: A pathological state in which qi fails to promote the circulation of blood and causes blood stasis, resulting in simultaneous presence of qi deficiency and blood stasis.

V005-N00800.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00800.label: 气虚血瘀
V005-N00800.englishNames: qi deficiency and blood stasis; blood stasis due to qi deficiency

V005-N00800.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00800.label: 气虚血瘀
V005-N00800.definition: a pathological change of qi deficiency in which qi is insufficient to maintain blood flow, thus resulting in blood stasis

V005-N00801.label: 气不摄血
V005-N00801.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00801.definition: 由于气虚不足，统摄血液功能减退，以致血不循经，逸出脉外，从而导致各种失血的病理变化。

V005-N00801.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00801.label: 气不摄血
V005-N00801.englishNames: Qi failing to contain blood; failure of qi to control blood; qi failing to control blood
V005-N00801.pinyinNames: qì bú shè xuè; qi bu she xue
V005-N00801.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00801.definition: A pathological state in which qi fails to contain blood and allows the blood to flow out of the vessels.

V005-N00801.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00801.label: 气不摄血
V005-N00801.englishNames: failure of qi to control blood; qi failing to control blood

V005-N00801.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00801.label: 气虚不摄
V005-N00801.englishNames: qi deficiency failing to control blood
V005-N00801.definition: a pathological change of qi deficiency in which qi is unable to retain the fluids (including blood)

V005-N00802.label: 气随血脱
V005-N00802.englishNames: qi desertion due to blood depletion
V005-N00802.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00802.definition: 急性大出血时,气随血液的突然大量流失而脱散的危重病理变化。

V005-N00802.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00802.label: 气随血脱
V005-N00802.englishNames: qi prostration following blood loss; Qi collapse following heavy blood loss; qi collapse following blood loss; qi desertion due to blood depletion; qi collapse following bleeding
V005-N00802.pinyinNames: qì suí xuè tuō; qi sui xue tuo
V005-N00802.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00802.definition: A critical state in which massive blood loss causes sudden collapse of qi.

V005-N00802.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00802.label: 气随血脱
V005-N00802.englishNames: qi prostration following blood loss; qi collapse following blood loss; qi desertion due to blood depletion

V005-N00802.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00802.label: 气随血脱
V005-N00802.definition: a pathological change in which massive loss of blood leads to collapse of qi

V005-N00803.label: 血随气逆
V005-N00803.englishNames: bleeding due to qi reversed flow
V005-N00803.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00803.definition: 而上冲，甚则动血而吐血，或壅闭清窍而昏厥的病理变化。

V005-N00803.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00803.label: 血随气逆
V005-N00803.englishNames: bleeding due to qi reversed flow; blood flowing counterflow with qi; bleeding following qi counterflow; Blood counterflow with qi
V005-N00803.pinyinNames: xuè suí qì nì; xue sui qi ni
V005-N00803.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00803.definition: A pathological state in which upward adverse flow of qi leads to blood rushing upward and results in haematemesis, haemoptysis or stroke.

V005-N00803.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00803.label: 血随气逆
V005-N00803.englishNames: bleeding following qi counterflow; bleeding due to qi reversed flow

V005-N00803.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00803.label: 血随气逆
V005-N00803.definition: a pathological change in which the upward adverse flow of qi leads blood rushing upward

V005-N00804.label: 气病及血
V005-N00804.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00804.definition: 先发气病，然后累及于血的传变趋势。

V005-N00804.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00804.label: 气病及血
V005-N00804.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类

V005-N00804.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00804.label: 气病及血
V005-N00804.definition: a pathological change in which diseased conditions of qi tend to induce blood disorders

V005-N00805.label: 血病及气
V005-N00805.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00805.definition: 先发血病,然后累及于气的传变趋势。

V005-N00806.label: 伤津
V005-N00806.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00806.definition: 由于高热、汗出过多，或感受燥邪而导致的肺、胃津液损伤的病理变化。

V005-N00806.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00806.label: 伤津
V005-N00806.englishNames: impairment of fluid; Damage to thin body fluid; damage to fluid
V005-N00806.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00806.definition: A pathological state in which the thin, clear fluids are consumed.

V005-N00806.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00806.label: 伤津
V005-N00806.englishNames: damage to fluid; impairment of fluid

V005-N00806.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00806.label: 伤津
V005-N00806.definition: a general term for various impairments and loss of body fluid

V005-N00807.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V005-N00807.label: 津脱
V005-N00807.definition: 津液大量急剧耗失，气阴欲脱，以形体消瘦，口唇焦裂，皮肤枯瘪，眼眶凹陷，关节不利，小便短少，大便干结，舌干无津,脉细弱，血压持续下降，低于90/60 mmHg等为特征的脱病。

V005-N00807.label: 津脱
V005-N00807.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00807.definition: 大汗伤津，或吐下伤津，造成津液大量脱失的病理变化。

V005-N00807.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00807.label: 津脱
V005-N00807.englishNames: fluid depletion; fluid collapse; clear fluid depletion

V005-N00807.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00807.label: 津脱
V005-N00807.definition: a severe form of damage to fluid, usually due to profuse sweating, excessive vomiting or diarrhea

V005-N00809.label: 气随液脱
V005-N00809.englishNames: depletion of fluid involving qi desertion
V005-N00809.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00809.definition: 大汗、大吐、大泻，使津液大量丢失,气亦随津液大量外泄而脱失的危重病理变化。

V005-N00809.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00809.label: 气随液脱
V005-N00809.englishNames: depletion of fluid involving qi desertion; Qi collapse following loss of thick fluids; qi prostration following liquid depletion; qi collapse due to humor depletion
V005-N00809.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00809.definition: A critical state in which a massive loss of bodily fluids causes sudden collapse/loss of yang qi.

V005-N00809.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00809.label: 气随液脱
V005-N00809.englishNames: qi collapse due to humor depletion
V005-N00809.definition: a pathological change in which qi collapse occurs following massive loss of fluid

V005-N00810.label: 气化无权
V005-N00810.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00810.definition: 由于阳气不足,气化作用失职，影响气、血、精、津液等的化生，导致津液代谢产物排除不利而贮留于体内的病理变化。

V005-N00810.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00810.label: 气化不利

V005-N00810.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00810.label: 气化无权

V005-N00810.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00810.label: 气化不利
V005-N00810.definition: a pathological change of yang qi deficiency that decreases digestion and absorption, or impairs fluid metabolism leading to water-dampness retention or phlegm retention

V005-N00811.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00811.label: 水不化气
V005-N00811.englishNames: failure of water to transform into qi; water failing to transform

V005-N00812.label: 津枯血燥
V005-N00812.englishNames: depletion of fluid causing blood dryness
V005-N00812.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00812.definition: 津血同源，津液亏乏，血亏而燥，以致虚热内生或血燥生风的病理变化。

V005-N00812.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N00812.label: 津枯血燥
V005-N00812.englishNames: fluid consumption and blood dryness; fluid exhaustion with blood dryness; fluid exhaustion and blood dryness; depletion of fluid causing blood dryness; Fluid exhaustion leading to blood dryness
V005-N00812.pinyinNames: jin ku xue zao; jīn kū xuè zào
V005-N00812.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N00812.definition: A pathological state in which fluids fail to supplement blood and causes blood dryness and internal dry heat.

V005-N00815.definition: 又称"肝风内动”，“虚风内动”。指由脏腑机能失调而引起具有动摇、震颤特点之各种症状的病理变化，与肝脏关系最为密切。包括阴虚风动、肝阳化风、血虚生风、热极生风等。

V005-N00815.definition: Opposite to external wind, it is a pathological state of yang qi hyperactivity and wind stirring due to disordered qi and blood of the zang–fu organs. This includes extreme heat generating wind, liver yang transforming into wind, blood deficiency generating wind and yin deficiency stirring wind.

V005-N00971.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准

V005-N00972.pinyinNames: wei ruo ying qiang; wèi ruò yíng qiáng

V005-N00972.englishNames: weak defensive qi and strong nutrient qi; weak defense qi and strong nutrient

V005-N00972.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准

V005-N00973.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V005-N00978.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机

V005-N00984.label: 太阴虚寒
V005-N00984.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机

V005-N00994.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V005-N00995.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
