V005-N00998.label: 卫气同病
V005-N00998.englishNames: disease involving both defense and qi levels; disease of both defense and qi; disease involving weifen and qifen

V005-N00998.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00998.label: 卫气同病
V005-N00998.englishNames: disease of both defense and qi aspects
V005-N00998.definition: coexistence of diseases in both the defense and qi aspects

V005-N00999.label: 营分
V005-N00999.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N00999.definition: 温热病由气分深人,热陷心包，心神被扰，并伤津动血的病理阶段。

V005-N00999.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N00999.label: 营分
V005-N00999.englishNames: nutrient level; nutrient aspect; yingfen; nutrient tier

V005-N00999.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N00999.label: 营分
V005-N00999.definition: that stratum of the body between the qi and blood aspects

V005-N01001.label: 心营过耗
V005-N01001.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01001.definition: 温热病邪入里,伤及心营，灼伤津液的病理变化。

V005-N01001.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01001.label: 心营过耗
V005-N01001.englishNames: over-consumption of heart nutriment; overconsumption of heart nutrient; over consumption of heart nutrient

V005-N01001.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01001.label: 心营过耗
V005-N01001.definition: a pathological change in which the nutrient of the heart is excessively consumed by heat or a chronic deficiency conditions, causing emaciation, night fever, and vexation

V005-N01002.label: 营阴损伤
V005-N01002.englishNames: nutrient qi and yin fluid being damaged
V005-N01002.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01002.definition: 温热病邪侵人营分，耗损血中阴津的病理变化。

V005-N01003.label: 气营两燔
V005-N01003.englishNames: flaring heat in qifen and yingfen
V005-N01003.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01003.definition: 温热病中,邪热入于营分，而气分证候未解，气分、营分病变同在而邪热炽盛的病理变化。

V005-N01003.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01003.label: 气营两燔
V005-N01003.englishNames: blazing of both qi and nutrient levels; blazing of both qi and nutrient; flaring heat in qifen and yingfen

V005-N01003.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01003.label: 气营两燔
V005-N01003.englishNames: blazing of both qi and nutrient
V005-N01003.definition: a pathological change characterized by simultaneous existence of exuberant pathogenic heat in the qi and nutrient aspects

V005-N01004.label: 气血两燔
V005-N01004.englishNames: flaring heat in qifen and xuefen
V005-N01004.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01004.definition: 温热病中，邪热入于血分，而气分证候未解，气分、血分病变同在而邪热炽盛的病理变化。

V005-N01004.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01004.label: 气血两燔
V005-N01004.englishNames: blazing of both qi and blood levels; blazing of both qi and blood; flaring heat in qifen and xuefen

V005-N01004.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01004.label: 气血两燔
V005-N01004.englishNames: blazing of both qi and blood
V005-N01004.definition: a pathological change characterized by the presence of exuberant pathogenic heat in both the qi and blood aspects causing damage to body fluids and hemorrhages

V005-N01005.label: 卫营同病
V005-N01005.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01005.definition: 温热病中，邪热入于营分，而卫分病证未解，卫分、营分病变同在的病理变化。

V005-N01005.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01005.label: 卫营同病
V005-N01005.englishNames: Pattern involving both the Wei-defence and Ying nutrients
V005-N01005.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜辨证方法类
V005-N01005.definition: Characterized by Ying nutrients phase symptoms including fever that worsens at night, mental cloudiness and a deep red tongue as well as Wei-defence phase symptoms including aversion to cold, cough and a thin, white tongue coating. Often occurs when a Wei-defence phase pattern transmits to the pericardium or to the Ying nutrients phase; however, pathogenic factors still retain in the Wei-defence phase.

V005-N01005.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01005.label: 卫营同病
V005-N01005.englishNames: disease involving both defense and nutrient levels; disease of both defense and nutrient; disease involving weifen and yingfen

V005-N01005.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01005.label: 卫营同病
V005-N01005.englishNames: disease of both defense and nutrient aspects
V005-N01005.definition: coexistence of diseases in both the defense and nutrient aspects

V005-N01006.label: 血分
V005-N01006.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01006.definition: 温热病最深重的病理阶段，邪热壅盛，迫血妄行，扰乱心神，伤阴动风的病理阶段。

V005-N01006.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01006.label: 血分
V005-N01006.englishNames: blood level; blood aspect; xuefen; blood tier

V005-N01006.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01006.label: 血分
V005-N01006.definition: the deepest stratum of the body involved in the severest stage of an acute febrile disease

V005-N01007.label: 热入血分
V005-N01007.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01007.definition: 温热病邪侵入血分，迫血妄行，扰乱心神，伤阴动风的病理变化。

V005-N01007.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01007.label: 热入血分
V005-N01007.englishNames: entering of heat into blood level; heat invading blood aspect; heat invading xuefen

V005-N01007.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01007.label: 热入血分
V005-N01007.definition: a pathological change characterized by the pathogenic heat entering the blood aspect, causing hemorrhages, mental disturbances, and even convulsions

V005-N01008.label: 血分瘀热
V005-N01008.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01008.definition: 邪热深人营血，迫血离经致瘀，或热邪壅阻血络而夹瘀,以致瘀热互结于血分的病理变化。

V005-N01008.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01008.label: 血分瘀热
V005-N01008.englishNames: stagnation of heat in blood level; stagnated heat in blood aspect; stagnated heat in xuefen

V005-N01009.label: 血分热毒
V005-N01009.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01009.definition: 热毒深陷血分，耗血、伤阴,甚则蒙闭心神，危及生命的病理变化。

V005-N01009.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01009.label: 血分热毒
V005-N01009.englishNames: heat-toxin in blood level; heat toxin in blood aspect; heattoxicity in xuefen

V005-N01009.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01009.label: 血分热毒
V005-N01009.definition: a pathological change characterized by the heat toxin penetrating deeply in the blood aspect, causing high fever with macular eruption, hemorrhages and even mental clouding

V005-N01011.label: 上焦湿热
V005-N01011.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01011.definition: 湿热之邪侵袭上焦,困遏卫阳,肺气不宣的理病变化。

V005-N01012.label: 中焦湿热
V005-N01012.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01012.definition: 湿热之邪侵袭中焦脾胃，湿邪阻遏，热邪不得透发,脾胃纳运功能失常的病理变化。

V005-N01013.label: 下焦湿热
V005-N01013.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01013.definition: 又称"湿热下注”。湿热流注于下焦肠腑、膀胱，湿聚热蕴，气机受阻，气化失司，腑气不利的病理变化。

V005-N01013.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01013.label: 下焦湿热
V005-N01013.englishNames: dampness-heat in lower energizer; dampnessheat in lower jiao

V005-N01013.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01013.label: 下焦湿热
V005-N01013.definition: a pathological change characterized by dampnessheat pouring down into the lower energizer, including large intestinal dampness-heat, bladder dampnessheat, dampness-heat obstructing the essence chamber, and morbid leukorrhea, pudental itch, and painful

V005-N01015.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01015.label: 病性

V005-N01015.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01015.label: 病性
V005-N01015.definition: the heat, cold, excess or deficiency quality of a disease

V005-N01016.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01016.label: 病位

V005-N01016.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01016.label: 病位
V005-N01016.definition: the part of the body affected by a disease

V005-N01017.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01017.label: 病势

V005-N01018.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01018.label: 传化
V005-N01018.englishNames: transmission and transformation; Transmission and transformation; (transmission and) transformation
V005-N01018.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V005-N01018.definition: Transmission and transformation of diseases among five zang organs.

V005-N01018.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01018.label: 传化

V005-N01018.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01018.label: 传化
V005-N01018.definition: development of disease: transmission from one meridian/channel to another with shift of pathological changes

V005-N01019.label: 传变
V005-N01019.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01019.definition: 病位的传移和病情的变化。

V005-N01019.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01019.label: 传变

V005-N01019.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01019.label: 传变
V005-N01019.definition: development of a disease: transmission from one meridian/channel to another with change in the manifestations

V005-N01020.label: 顺传
V005-N01020.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01020.definition: 外感病按一般规律由浅入深，由轻逐渐变重的传变方式。如温热病按卫、气、营、血顺序进行传变为顺。

V005-N01020.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01020.label: 顺传

V005-N01020.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01020.label: 顺传
V005-N01020.definition: transmission of a febrile disease following normal sequence, e.g., from the defense aspect to the qi aspect, the same as sequential transmission

V005-N01021.label: 逆传
V005-N01021.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01021.definition: 外感病传变的反常情况，与顺传相对而言，病情迅速发展到危重阶段的传变方式。如温热病变从卫分不经气分，直接入营的传变为逆传。

V005-N01021.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01021.label: 逆传
V005-N01021.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜辨证方法类
V005-N01021.definition: Refers to pathogenic factors directly entering the Ying nutrients and blood phases from the Wei-defence phase (skipping the qi phase). Often indicates a more severe condition.

V005-N01021.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01021.label: 逆传

V005-N01021.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01021.label: 逆传
V005-N01021.definition: transmission of a febrile disease contrary to the normal sequence, e.g., from the defense aspect directly to the nutrient aspect and blood aspect, instead of by way of the qi aspect, the same as non-sequential transmission

V005-N01022.label: 循经传
V005-N01022.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01022.definition: 伤寒病的发展按太阳、阳明、少阳、太阴、少阴、厥阴的次序而传变。

V005-N01022.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01022.label: 循经传
V005-N01022.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜辨证方法类
V005-N01022.definition: This means that externally contracted conditions transmit according to the sequence of six meridians.

V005-N01022.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01022.label: 循经传
V005-N01022.englishNames: sequential meridian/channel transmission; sequential transmission along channel

V005-N01022.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01022.label: 循经传
V005-N01022.definition: transmission of a cold-damage disease from one meridian/channel to another, by the order of greater yang, yang brightness, lesser yang, greater yin, lesser yin and reverting yin

V005-N01023.label: 越经传
V005-N01023.englishNames: transmission of skipping to other channel
V005-N01023.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01023.definition: 伤寒病的发展在太阳、阳明、少阳、太阴、少阴、厥阴的传经次序上有所跨越地进行传变。

V005-N01023.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01023.label: 越经传
V005-N01023.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜辨证方法类
V005-N01023.definition: This means that externally contracted conditions skip one or two meridians and directly transmit to the next meridian.

V005-N01023.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01023.label: 越经传
V005-N01023.englishNames: skip-over meridian/channel transmission; transmission of skipping to other channel

V005-N01023.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01023.label: 越经传
V005-N01023.definition: transmission of a cold-damage disease from one meridian/channel to another with skipping of one or more meridians/channels, e.g., transmission from greater yang to lesser yang with yang brightness skipped over

V005-N01024.label: 再经
V005-N01024.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01024.definition: 伤寒六经病证中，一经病证未愈，又传入他经。

V005-N01024.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01024.label: 再经
V005-N01024.englishNames: transmission from meridian/channel to the next; disease involving other channel

V005-N01024.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01024.label: 再经
V005-N01024.definition: the process of a cold-damage disease in which one meridian/channel syndrome passes into another meridian/channel syndrome while the former persists

V005-N01025.label: 合病
V005-N01025.englishNames: disease involving two or more channels
V005-N01025.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01025.definition: 伤寒六经病证中，两经或三经同时受邪而发病。

V005-N01025.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01025.label: 合病
V005-N01025.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜辨证方法类
V005-N01025.definition: Refers to pattern involving two or three meridians simultaneously.

V005-N01025.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01025.label: 合病
V005-N01025.englishNames: combination of diseases; disease involving two or more channels

V005-N01025.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01025.label: 合病
V005-N01025.definition: combination of two or more meridian/channel diseases appearing at the same time

V005-N01026.label: 并病
V005-N01026.englishNames: disease of one channel involvinganother channel
V005-N01026.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01026.definition: 伤寒一经病变未解,又出现另一经的病变，两经病证同时存在。

V005-N01026.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01026.label: 并病
V005-N01026.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜辨证方法类
V005-N01026.definition: This means one meridian pattern develops before another meridian pattern resolves.

V005-N01026.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01026.label: 并病
V005-N01026.englishNames: overlap of diseases; disease of one channel involving another channel

V005-N01026.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01026.label: 并病
V005-N01026.definition: overlapping of two meridian/channel diseases, in which they appear in succession and then coexist

V005-N01027.label: 经尽
V005-N01027.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01027.definition: 伤寒六经病证中，病变发展止于一经。

V005-N01027.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01027.label: 经尽
V005-N01027.englishNames: end of meridian/channel transmission; disease of one channel without transmission

V005-N01027.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01027.label: 经尽
V005-N01027.definition: exogenous febrile disease stops progressing and begins recovering when it reaches a certain meridian/ channel or certain stage of development

V005-N01028.label: 从化
V005-N01028.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01028.definition: 病证的性质随体质阴阳而变化，如从阳而化热、从阴而化寒等。

V005-N01028.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01028.label: 从化

V005-N01028.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01028.label: 从化
V005-N01028.definition: the process of developing a pattern/syndrome in conformity with the patient’s constitution, e.g., heat pattern/syndrome in a patient of yang constitution, and cold pattern/syndrome in a patient of yin constitution

V005-N01029.label: 从阳化热
V005-N01029.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01029.definition: 指病邪入里，因阳盛体质而转化为热性病变。

V005-N01030.label: 从阴化寒
V005-N01030.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01030.definition: 指病邪入里，因阴盛体质而转化为寒性病变。

V005-N01031.label: 实则阳明
V005-N01031.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01031.definition: 人体感受寒邪，太阳病不解,病邪内传，若患者体质阳气素旺,寒邪入里易于化热伤津，形成燥热内盛之阳明病。

V005-N01032.label: 虚则太阴
V005-N01032.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01032.definition: 人体感受寒邪，太阳病不解，病邪内传,若患者素体阳虚，脾胃虚弱，寒邪入里则可从阴化寒，形成脾胃虚寒之太阴病。

V005-N01033.label: 阳病入阴
V005-N01033.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01033.definition: 邪气由表入里，或阳气受伤，阳病转变为阴病,均称为“阳病入阴”,大多表示病情加重。

V005-N01033.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01033.label: 阳病入阴

V005-N01034.label: 阴病出阳
V005-N01034.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01034.definition: 邪气由里出表，或阳气来复，阴病转变为阳病，均称为"阴病出阳”，大多表示病情好转。

V005-N01034.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01034.label: 阴病出阳
V005-N01034.englishNames: passing of disease from yin to yang; yin disease involving yang

V005-N01035.label: 上盛下虚
V005-N01035.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01035.definition: 邪气实于上而正气虚于下的病理变化。

V005-N01035.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01035.label: 上盛下虚

V005-N01035.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01035.label: 上盛下虚
V005-N01035.definition: exuberance of pathogenic qi in the upper body and deficiency of healthy qi in the lower body, the same as excess above and deficiency below

V005-N01036.label: 上虚下实
V005-N01036.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01036.definition: 正气虚于上而邪气实于下的病理变化。

V005-N01036.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01036.label: 上虚下实
V005-N01036.englishNames: upper deficiency and lower excess; upper deficiency and lowerexcess

V005-N01036.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01036.label: 上虚下实
V005-N01036.definition: deficiency of healthy qi in the upper body and excess of pathogenic qi in the lower body, the same as deficiency above and excess below

V005-N01037.label: 上损及下
V005-N01037.englishNames: deficiency transmitted from upper body to lower body
V005-N01037.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01037.definition: 虚损由上部脏腑发展到下部脏腑的传变趋势,如由肺损开始累及心、脾、肝、肾等其他脏腑。

V005-N01037.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01037.label: 上损及下
V005-N01037.englishNames: upper impairment affecting lower; deficiency transmitted from upper body to lower body

V005-N01038.label: 下损及上
V005-N01038.englishNames: deficiency transmitted from lower body to upper body
V005-N01038.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01038.definition: 虚损由下部脏腑发展到上部脏腑的传变趋势，如由肾损开始累及肝、脾、心、肺等其他脏腑。

V005-N01038.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01038.label: 下损及上
V005-N01038.englishNames: lower impairment affecting upper; deficiency transmitted from lower body to upper body

V005-N01039.label: 转归
V005-N01039.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01039.definition: 疾病发展的结局,包括痊愈、死亡，或后遗症等各种情况。

V005-N01040.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01040.label: 养生预防类

V005-N01041.label: 养生
V005-N01041.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜推拿学、养生学、康复学
V005-N01041.definition: 根据中医理论，运用调神、导引、四时调摄、食养、药养等方法的中国传统保健方法。

V005-N01041.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01041.label: 养生
V005-N01041.path: 中医基础理论术语｜养生预防类
V005-N01041.definition: The activities to maintain physical and mental health and prevent illnesses.

V005-N01041.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01041.label: 养生
V005-N01041.definition: traditional health-care to promote health, prevent disease and enhance longevity, also called health preservation/cultivation

V005-N01042.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01042.label: 天年
V005-N01042.englishNames: Natural life span; natural life span
V005-N01042.path: 中医基础理论术语｜养生预防类

V005-N01042.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01042.label: 天年

V005-N01042.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01042.label: 天年

V005-N01045.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01045.label: 法于阴阳
V005-N01045.englishNames: following rule of yin and yang

V005-N01046.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01046.label: 春夏养阳
V005-N01046.englishNames: Protecting yang in spring and summer
V005-N01046.path: 中医基础理论术语｜养生预防类
V005-N01046.definition: Yang qi rises and grows in the spring and the summer. It is necessary to protect and nourish the internal yang qi to keep it sufficient along with the seasons.

V005-N01047.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01047.label: 秋冬养阴
V005-N01047.englishNames: Nourishing yin in autumn and winter
V005-N01047.path: 中医基础理论术语｜养生预防类
V005-N01047.definition: Everything is stored in the autumn and the winter. It is necessary to protect and store the internal yin essence to keep it internally accumulated along with the seasons.

V005-N01050.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01050.label: 恬淡虚无
V005-N01050.path: 治则、治法与疗法｜导引气功
V005-N01050.definition: A state of peaceful inner joy and free from ego or desires. This principle on health cultivation was recorded in the Huang Di Nei Jing (Yellow Emperor’s Internal Classic) and highly valued by generations of qigong masters.

V005-N01050.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01050.label: 恬淡虚无

V005-N01051.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01051.label: 精神内守
V005-N01051.englishNames: keeping essence and spirit in interior

V005-N01052.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01052.label: 积精全神

V005-N01053.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01053.label: 形与神俱
V005-N01053.englishNames: harmony of body and spirit; Healthy body and mind
V005-N01053.pinyinNames: xin yu shen ju; xíng yǔ shén jù
V005-N01053.path: 中医基础理论术语｜养生预防类
V005-N01053.definition: The physical appearance and the mental activities are inseparable. The robust physical appearance and sound vitality is the sign of body–mind wellness.

V005-N01053.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01053.label: 形与神俱

V005-N01054.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01054.label: 呼吸精气

V005-N01069.label: 康复
V005-N01069.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜病机
V005-N01069.definition: 疾病痊愈，完全恢复健康，为疾病转归的最佳结局。

V005-N01069.label: 康复
V005-N01069.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜推拿学、养生学、康复学
V005-N01069.definition: 根据中医理论，运用药物和非药物方法，恢复残疾者的机体结构、功能和心理的传统医学方法。

V005-N01069.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01069.label: 康复
V005-N01069.definition: the treatment of an ill, injured, or disabled patient with the aim of restoring normal health and function or to prevent a disability from deteriorating

V005-N01071.label: 治则
V005-N01071.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V005-N01071.definition: 对临床的具体立法、处方、用药等具有普遍的指导意义，在治疗疾病时必须遵循的基本原则。

V005-N01071.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01071.label: 治则
V005-N01071.englishNames: therapeutic principle; Therapeutic Principles; Treatment principles

V005-N01071.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01071.label: 治则
V005-N01071.definition: a general rule that should be followed in treating disease

V005-N01073.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01073.label: 正治
V005-N01073.definition: use of medicines opposite in nature to the disease, e.g., treating heat syndrome with medicines cold in nature

V005-N01077.label: 实者泻之
V005-N01077.englishNames: treating excess syndrome with purgative methods
V005-N01077.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V005-N01077.definition: 又称"实则泻之”。针对性质属实的病证采用攻泻方药进行治疗的原则。

V005-N01078.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01078.label: 反治
V005-N01078.englishNames: treatment contrary to routine; paradoxical treatment
V005-N01078.definition: use of medicines similar in nature to the disease

V005-N01089.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01089.label: 祛邪
V005-N01089.definition: a general term for treating disease by dispelling the pathogenic factors from the body

V005-N01093.label: 同病异治
V005-N01093.englishNames: treating same disease with different methods
V005-N01093.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V005-N01093.definition: 表现相同的疾病，可因人、因时、因地的不同,或由于病情的发展、病机的变化、正邪的消长等差异，采取不同治法的治疗原则。

V005-N01093.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01093.label: 同病异治
V005-N01093.englishNames: Different treatments for same disease; different treatments for the same disease; different treatment for the same disease; Same Disease Different Treatments
V005-N01093.pinyinNames: tóng bìng yì zhì; tong bing yi zhi
V005-N01093.definition: A principle to use different treatments for the same disease caused by different etiological factors; or a principle to treat the same disease according to differences in individuality, time, geographic features, disease severity, differentiated patterns, and ongoing struggle between anti-pathogenic qi and pathogenic factors.

V005-N01093.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01093.label: 同病异治
V005-N01093.englishNames: different treatments for the same disease
V005-N01093.definition: applying different methods of treatment to the same kind of disease but have different patterns/syndromes

V005-N01094.label: 异病同治
V005-N01094.englishNames: treating different diseases with same method
V005-N01094.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜治疗学｜总论
V005-N01094.definition: 表现不同的疾病，由于发病机理相同，采取相同治法的治疗原则。

V005-N01094.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01094.label: 异病同治
V005-N01094.aliases: Differ Dis Same Treat； Different Diseases in Same Treatment
V005-N01094.englishNames: Same treatment for different diseases; Treating Different Diseases with Same Method; same treatment for different disease; same treatment for different diseases
V005-N01094.pinyinNames: yì bìng tóng zhì; yi bing tong zhi
V005-N01094.definition: A principle to use same treatment for different diseases that share the same pathogenesis.

V005-N01094.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01094.label: 异病同治
V005-N01094.definition: applying the same method of treatment to patients with different kinds of disease but have the same pattern/syndrome

V005-N01099.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01099.label: 阳病治阴

V005-N01100.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01100.label: 阴病治阳

V005-N01111.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01111.label: 腑病治脏

V005-N01112.label: 上病下取
V005-N01112.englishNames: treating upper disorder with lower point
V005-N01112.definition: 上部的病症选取下部腧穴。

V005-N01113.label: 下病上取
V005-N01113.englishNames: treating lower disorder with upper point
V005-N01113.definition: 下部的病症选取其高位的腧穴。

V005-N01114.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01114.label: 微者逆之

V005-N01115.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01115.label: 甚者从之
V005-N01115.englishNames: treating severe case in compliance with pseudo-symptom

V005-N01116.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01116.label: 坚者削之

V005-N01117.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01117.label: 客者除之

V005-N01118.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01118.label: 结者散之

V005-N01119.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01119.label: 留者攻之

V005-N01120.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01120.label: 燥者濡之

V005-N01121.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01121.label: 急者缓之

V005-N01122.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01122.label: 散者收之

V005-N01123.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01123.label: 逸者行之

V005-N01124.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01124.label: 惊者平之

V005-N01125.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01125.label: 劳者温之

V005-N01126.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01126.label: 损者温之

V005-N01127.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01127.label: 甚者独行
V005-N01127.englishNames: treating severe case with single focal method

V005-N01128.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01128.label: 间者并行
V005-N01128.englishNames: treating root and accompamying symptoms simultaneousli for mild case

V005-N01129.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01129.label: 五运六气类
V005-N01129.englishNames: Five movements and six qi; five circuits and six qi

V005-N01130.label: 运气学说
V005-N01130.englishNames: doctrine of five evolutive phases and six climatic factors
V005-N01130.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N01130.definition: 在中医学中，通过观察每年运与气之间相互生治与承制的关系，用以推测每年气象特点及气候变化对疾病发生影响的一般规律的学说。

V005-N01131.label: 运气
V005-N01131.englishNames: five evolutive phases and six climatic factors
V005-N01131.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论

V005-N01131.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01131.label: 五运六气
V005-N01131.aliases: 运气（中医）； D 5 Elem Evol 6 Natur Factors； Five Circuits and Six Qi； Five Elements' Evolution & Six Kinds of Natural Factors； Five Evolutive Phases and Six Climatic Factors
V005-N01131.englishNames: five circuits and six qi; Five movements and six qi
V005-N01131.pinyinNames: wǔ yùn liù qì; wu yun liu qi
V005-N01131.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01131.definition: A collective name of wood movement, fire movement, earth movement, metal movement, water movement, and the collective name of wind, summer heat (heat), dampness, dryness, fire, cold in the natural world.

V005-N01133.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01133.label: 天干
V005-N01133.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01133.definition: The collective name of jia, yi, bing, ding, wu, ji, geng, xin, ren, and gui.

V005-N01134.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01134.label: 地支
V005-N01134.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01134.definition: The collective name of zi, chou, yin, mou, chen, si, wu, wei, shen, you, xu, and hai.

V005-N01135.label: 甲子
V005-N01135.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N01135.definition: 天干始于甲,地支始于子,天干与地支循环相配，可成甲子、乙丑、丙寅等60组，循环使用，以纪日或者纪年，称为甲子。

V005-N01135.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01135.label: 甲子
V005-N01135.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01135.definition: The heavenly stems pair with the earthly branches, following their orders, from jia–zi to gui–hai, forming a complete cycle of sixty years. The heavenly stems initiate with jia and the earthly branches initiate with zi. The combination is used to number years, months, days and times.

V005-N01135.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01135.label: 甲子

V005-N01135.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01135.label: 甲子
V005-N01135.definition: combination of the heavenly stems and earthly branches used to designate years, months, days and hours

V005-N01139.label: 干支
V005-N01139.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N01139.definition: 天干与地支的合称。天干即甲、乙、丙、丁、戊、己、庚、辛、壬、癸,共十干;地支即子、丑、寅、卯、辰、巳、午、未、申、酉、戌、亥，共十二支。

V005-N01139.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01139.label: 干支

V005-N01139.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01139.label: 干支
V005-N01139.definition: a collective name for the ten heavenly stems and the twelve earthly branches, both used as serial numbers

V005-N01140.label: 五运
V005-N01140.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N01140.definition: 木运、火运、土运、金运、水运的合称，即木、火、土、金、水五行之气在天地间的运行变化。

V005-N01140.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01140.label: 五运
V005-N01140.englishNames: five circuits; Five movements; five evolutive phases
V005-N01140.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01140.definition: The collective name of wood movement, fire movement, earth movement, metal movement, and water movement. It reflects the changes of qi of five elements between heaven and earth. Ten heavenly stems of jia, yi, bing, ding, wu, ji, geng, xin, ren, and gui are used to record the movements.

V005-N01140.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01140.label: 五运

V005-N01140.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01140.label: 五运
V005-N01140.definition: a collective name for wood, fire, earth, metal and water circuits

V005-N01146.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01146.label: 五步推运

V005-N01148.label: 运气太过
V005-N01148.englishNames: excess of five evolutive phases and six climatic factors
V005-N01148.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N01148.definition: 即运气盛而有余。凡阳干之年，如甲、丙、戊、庚、壬年分，均属运气太过，太过为本运气胜，则本气流行。

V005-N01149.label: 运气不及
V005-N01149.englishNames: deficiency of five evolutive phases and six climatic factors
V005-N01149.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N01149.definition: 即运气衰而不足。凡阴干之年，如乙、丁、己、辛、癸年分，均属运气不及，不及为本运气衰，则克气大行。

V005-N01150.label: 平气
V005-N01150.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N01150.definition: 指该年岁运之气平和，无太过或不及等情况。

V005-N01150.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01150.label: 平气
V005-N01150.englishNames: normal circuit qi; normal climatic factors; Balanced movements
V005-N01150.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01150.definition: The excess of qi is restrained and the insufficiency of qi is compensated in the five movements.

V005-N01150.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01150.label: 平气

V005-N01150.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01150.label: 平气
V005-N01150.definition: the circuit qi that is neither excessive nor insufficient, rarely causing disease

V005-N01151.label: 岁运
V005-N01151.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N01151.definition: 统管全年的五运之气，每年由一运所主，按五行相生的顺序，五年为一个周期。

V005-N01151.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01151.label: 岁运
V005-N01151.englishNames: circuit of year; year evolutive phase; Movement of the year
V005-N01151.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01151.definition: The movement governs the year, being jia and ji in category of earth movement, yi and geng in category of metal movement, bing and xin in category of water movement, ding and ren in category of wood movement, and wu and gui in category of fire movement. For example, jia and ji is in category of earth movement, the movement of the year of the jia-zi year is earth.

V005-N01151.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01151.label: 岁运
V005-N01151.definition: the circuit qi that controls the meteorological features and changes of a given year as well as the corresponding prevalence of disease

V005-N01152.label: 主运
V005-N01152.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N01152.definition: 分别主管一年五时的五运之气,可反映一年五时的正常气候变化。每运主一时，各七十三天零五刻，依五行相生的顺序，始于木而终于水。

V005-N01152.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01152.label: 主运
V005-N01152.englishNames: Host movement; domination in circuit by element qi; host evolutive phase; domination in circuit
V005-N01152.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01152.definition: Each of the five movements dominates in spring, summer, later summer, autumn and winter. Starting from the severe cold and following the order of generating cycle of five elements, the first movement is wood, the second is fire, the third is earth, the fourth is metal, and the fifth is water.

V005-N01152.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01152.label: 主运
V005-N01152.englishNames: domination in circuit by element qi

V005-N01153.label: 客运
V005-N01153.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N01153.definition: 以中运为初运分别轮值客行于一年五时的五运之气。其运行程式是以每年的中运为初运，按五行相生的次序分做五运，每运各为七十三日零五刻，临加行于主运之上。

V005-N01153.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01153.label: 客运
V005-N01153.englishNames: gust circuit; subordination of circuit; guest evolutive phase; Guest movement
V005-N01153.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01153.definition: The special climatic changes of the five seasons. It varies in every season in every year. Starting from the movement of the year as the initial movement, calculate in five steps according to the excess and insufficiency order of five elements. Ten years is a complete cycle and covers ten heavenly stems. Ten years is a complete cycle that covers ten heavenly stems. Then the cycle starts all over agin.

V005-N01153.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01153.label: 客运

V005-N01154.label: 六气
V005-N01154.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N01154.definition: 即厥阴风木、少阴君火、少阳相火、太阴湿土、阳明燥金、太阳寒水的合称，配一年主气六步分六气。初之气配厥阴风木、二之气配少阴君火、三之气配少阳相火、四之气配太阴湿土、五之气配阳明燥金、六(终)之气配太阳寒水。

V005-N01154.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01154.label: 六气
V005-N01154.englishNames: six qi; six climatic factors; Six qi
V005-N01154.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01154.definition: The six normal climatic phenomena of wind, summer heat (heat), dampness, dryness, fire, and cold in the natural world. The twelve earthly branches of zi, chou, yin, mou, chen, si, wu, wei, shen, you, xu, and hai are used to record the six qi.

V005-N01154.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01154.label: 六气

V005-N01154.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01154.label: 六气
V005-N01154.definition: six normal climatic phenomena: wind, cold, summerheat, dampness, dryness and fire (heat)

V005-N01155.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01155.label: 六元
V005-N01155.englishNames: Six origins; six essentials; six pathogenic factors; six climatic conditions
V005-N01155.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01155.definition: The combination of wind, cold, dampness, dryness, sovereign fire, ministerial fire with host qi in six steps. The initial qi is in association with Jueyin, wind and wood, the second qi with Shaoyin and sovereign fire, the third qi with Shaoyang and ministerial fire, and the forth qi with Taiyin, dampness and earth, the fifth qi with yang ming, dryness and metal, the sixth (final) qi with Taiyang, cold and water.

V005-N01155.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01155.label: 六元
V005-N01155.englishNames: six pathogenic factors; six climatic conditions

V005-N01160.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01160.label: 火化少阳

V005-N01161.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01161.label: 湿化太阴

V005-N01162.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01162.label: 燥化阳明

V005-N01167.label: 主气
V005-N01167.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N01167.definition: 统管一年的正常季节性气候变化的气，也叫主时之气,分为六步，年年不变。

V005-N01167.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01167.label: 主气
V005-N01167.englishNames: dominant qi; Host qi; host climatic qi
V005-N01167.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01167.definition: The collective name of wind, cold, dampness, dryness, sovereign fire and ministerial fire, being opposed to the guest qi. It reflects the normal seasonal climatic changes of the year. The calculation is to relate twenty four solar terms to six qi in six steps. The four solar terms consist of one step, being six steps for one year. The calculation starts from the severe cold.

V005-N01167.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01167.label: 主气

V005-N01167.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01167.label: 主气
V005-N01167.definition: the qi that controls the regular seasonal changes of the climate

V005-N01169.label: 客气
V005-N01169.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N01169.definition: 与主气相对而言，主所值之年气候的季节性变化，是在天的三阴三阳之气的运行变化。

V005-N01169.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01169.label: 客气
V005-N01169.englishNames: guest climatic qi; subordinate qi; guest qi; exogenous pathogenic qi; Guest qi
V005-N01169.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01169.definition: 1) Reflects the abnormal climatic changes of the year, being opposed to the host qi. It includes the celestial qi, the terrestrial qi, and the four right and left intervening qi. The first yin is in association with Jueyin, wind, and wood, the second yin with Shaoyin and sovereign fire, and the third yin with Taiyin, dampness, and earth. The first yang is in association with Shaoyang and ministerial fire, the second yang with yang ming, dryness, and metal, the third yang with Taiyang, cold, and water. The calculation is to combine the above yin–yang order with twelve earthly branches. 2) External pathogenic factors.

V005-N01169.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01169.label: 客气

V005-N01169.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01169.label: 客气
V005-N01169.definition: the qi that controls the seasonal changes of the climate in a particular year

V005-N01170.label: 司天
V005-N01170.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N01170.definition: 客气中主岁之气。位当三之气，主管上半年的气候、物候等变化。

V005-N01170.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01170.label: 司天
V005-N01170.englishNames: celestial manager qi; celestial control; Celestial controlling
V005-N01170.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01170.definition: The guest qi governing the climatic changes of the first half of the year.

V005-N01170.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01170.label: 司天

V005-N01170.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01170.label: 司天
V005-N01170.definition: the guest qi that controls the climatic changes in the first half of the year

V005-N01171.label: 在泉
V005-N01171.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N01171.definition: 客气中在位置上与司天相对之气。位当终之气，主管下半年的气候、物候等变化。

V005-N01171.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01171.label: 在泉
V005-N01171.englishNames: Terrestrial controlling; terrestrial effect; qi in the earth
V005-N01171.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01171.definition: The guest qi governing the climatic changes of the second half of the year. It is opposite to celestial qi.

V005-N01171.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01171.label: 在泉

V005-N01171.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01171.label: 在泉
V005-N01171.definition: the guest qi that controls the climatic changes in the latter half of the year

V005-N01172.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01172.label: 间气
V005-N01172.englishNames: qi at sides; intermediate qi; Intervening qi
V005-N01172.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01172.definition: The qi left and right to the celestial qi and the qi left and right to the terrestrial qi.

V005-N01172.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01172.label: 间气

V005-N01172.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01172.label: 间气
V005-N01172.definition: that part of guest qi, other than the qi controlling the heaven and the qi with terrestrial effect, called intermediate qi because of its existence between the heaven and earth

V005-N01173.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01173.label: 迁正
V005-N01173.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01173.definition: The intervening qi left to the celestial qi becomes the celestial qi and the intervening qi left to the terrestrial qi becomes the terrestrial qi.

V005-N01175.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01175.label: 退位
V005-N01175.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01175.definition: The celestial qi becomes the intervening qi right to the celestial qi and the terrestrial qi becomes the intervening qi right to the terrestrial qi.

V005-N01179.label: 客主加临
V005-N01179.englishNames: guest climatic qi adding to fixed host qi
V005-N01179.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N01179.definition: 指每年轮值的客气六步,分别加在年年不变的主气六步之上。

V005-N01179.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01179.label: 客主加临
V005-N01179.englishNames: join of subordinate qi to dominant qi

V005-N01180.label: 运气相合
V005-N01180.englishNames: combined analysis of five evolutive phases and six climatic factors
V005-N01180.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N01180.definition: 各年气候变化的详细情况单从运上来分析或单从气上来分析都不够，必须把各年的干支结合起来，也就是要把运和气结合起来，才能分析和推算出每年不同的大致情况，称为运气相合。

V005-N01181.label: 运气盛衰
V005-N01181.englishNames: rise and fall of five evolu-
V005-N01181.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N01181.definition: tive phases and six climatic factors根据运和气的五行生克关系以测定运和气的盛衰。运生气或者运克气为运盛气衰；气生运或者气克运为气盛运衰。

V005-N01184.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01184.label: 运气同化
V005-N01184.englishNames: assimilation of circuit and qi; Compatibility of movements and qi
V005-N01184.pinyinNames: yun qi tong hua; yùn qì tóng huà
V005-N01184.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01184.definition: The five movements and six qi share the same category of the five elements.

V005-N01184.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01184.label: 运气同化

V005-N01185.label: 天符
V005-N01185.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N01185.definition: 岁运之气与司天之气的五行属性相符合。

V005-N01185.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01185.label: 天符
V005-N01185.englishNames: coincidence of heavenly qi; Heavenly complements; celestial correspondence
V005-N01185.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01185.definition: The movement qi of the year and the celestial qi share the same category of the five elements in one year.

V005-N01185.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01185.label: 天符

V005-N01185.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01185.label: 天符
V005-N01185.definition: coincidence of the circuit qi of the year with the qi controlling the heaven in terms of the five phases, occurring in a cycle of sixty years

V005-N01186.label: 岁会
V005-N01186.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N01186.definition: 岁运与岁支的五行属性相同。

V005-N01186.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01186.label: 岁会
V005-N01186.englishNames: convergent year; yearly weather; Annual congruence
V005-N01186.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01186.definition: The movement qi of the year and the earthly branch of the year share the same category of the five elements in one year.

V005-N01186.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01186.label: 岁会

V005-N01186.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V005-N01186.label: 岁会
V005-N01186.definition: coincidence of the circuit qi of the year with the earthly branch in terms of the five phases, happening in eight years of a sixty-year cycle

V005-N01187.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01187.label: 同天符
V005-N01187.englishNames: Identical heavenly complements; same celestial correspondence
V005-N01187.pinyinNames: tóng tiān fú; tong tian fu
V005-N01187.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01187.definition: The heavenly stem and the earthly branch of the year are both yang and the movement of the year and the terrestrial qi share the same category of the five elements in one year.

V005-N01187.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01187.label: 同天符

V005-N01188.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01188.label: 同岁会
V005-N01188.pinyinNames: tong sui hui; tóng suì huì
V005-N01188.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01188.definition: The heavenly stem and the earthly branch of the year are both yin and the movement of the year and the terrestrial qi share the same category of the five elements in one year.

V005-N01188.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01188.label: 同岁会

V005-N01189.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01189.label: 太乙天符
V005-N01189.englishNames: celestial correspondence in convergent year; Taiyi heavenly complements
V005-N01189.pinyinNames: tài yǐ tiān fú; tai yi tian fu
V005-N01189.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01189.definition: The movement of the year, the celestial qi, and earthly branch of the year share the same category of the five elements in one year.

V005-N01189.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01189.label: 太乙天符

V005-N01190.label: 标本中气
V005-N01190.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜中医基础理论｜总论
V005-N01190.definition: 风、热、湿、燥、寒、火，天之六气为本，少阳、太阳、阳明、少阴、太阴、厥阴，三阴三阳为六气之标，与标气互为表里之气为中气。本气在上，标气在下，中气在中，标本中气互相影响而有非常之变，人生存于其间，易感而生病。

V005-N01190.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01190.label: 标本中气
V005-N01190.englishNames: manifestation、root cause and medial qi; manifestation， root cause and medial qi; Tip qi, root qi and middle qi; human-heavenly-medial qi
V005-N01190.pinyinNames: biao ben zhong qi; biāo běn zhōng qì
V005-N01190.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01190.definition: The study of relationship between six qi of heaven and six qi of the human body. It is used to determine the principle of the treatment based on interactions between human and nature.

V005-N01190.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V005-N01190.label: 标本中气

V005-N01191.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01191.label: 本气
V005-N01191.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01191.definition: Six qi of heaven, being wind, heat, dampness, dryness, cold and fire.

V005-N01192.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01192.label: 标气
V005-N01192.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01192.definition: Qi of six meridians of Shaoyang, Taiyang, Yangming, Shaoyin, Taiyin and Jueyin.

V005-N01197.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01197.label: 胜复
V005-N01197.englishNames: Prevailing and retaliation; dominantion and retaliation
V005-N01197.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01197.definition: The relationship between the prevailing qi and the retaliating qi in five movements and six qi. They coexist by increasing and decreasing in the same direction.

V005-N01198.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01198.label: 胜气
V005-N01198.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01198.definition: The qi that is stronger and restrain another qi in the five movements and six qi.

V005-N01199.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V005-N01199.label: 复气
V005-N01199.path: 中医基础理论术语｜五运六气类
V005-N01199.definition: The qi that is weaker and is restrained from another qi in the five movements and six qi.
